Python[STRESS] Quality-max smoke: 4096x20 r64 a128, 20 steps, 2-GPU DDP (stream)[12]

  
# [STRESS] Vat triet de + chat luong cao nhat: 4096x20 r64 alpha128, 20 step, torchrun 2-GPU
# Stream realtime tung dong + timestamp. INTERRUPT de dung.
import os, sys, time, datetime, subprocess, signal
t0=time.time()
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")} +{time.time()-t0:6.1f}s]'

SCRIPT='/tmp/train_unsloth_gemma4_2gpu_ddp_PATCHED.py'
env=dict(os.environ)
env.update({
  'MODEL_DIR':'/tmp/google_gemma4_e4b_model',
  'DATA_PATH':'/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/train.jsonl',
  'OUT_DIR':'/tmp/gemma4_stress_q4096x20_r64',
  'MAX_LEN':'4096','BATCH':'20','GRAD_ACC':'1','MAX_STEPS':'20',
  'LORA_R':'64','LORA_ALPHA':'128','LR':'7e-5',
  'HF_HUB_OFFLINE':'1','TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE':'1','TOKENIZERS_PARALLELISM':'false','PYTHONUNBUFFERED':'1',
})
cmd=['torchrun','--standalone','--nproc_per_node=2',SCRIPT]
print(ts(),'launch:', ' '.join(f'{k}={env[k]}' for k in ['MAX_LEN','BATCH','MAX_STEPS','LORA_R','LORA_ALPHA']), flush=True)
print(ts(),'cmd:', ' '.join(cmd), flush=True)
print(ts(),'(model load ~3-6 phut roi moi stream step; INTERRUPT de dung)', flush=True)

proc=subprocess.Popen(cmd, env=env, stdout=subprocess.PIPE, stderr=subprocess.STDOUT, text=True, bufsize=1)
try:
    for line in proc.stdout:
        print(ts(), line.rstrip(), flush=True)
    proc.wait()
    print(ts(),'EXIT rc=',proc.returncode, flush=True)
except KeyboardInterrupt:
    print(ts(),'INTERRUPT -> terminating torchrun...', flush=True)
    proc.send_signal(signal.SIGINT); time.sleep(5)
    if proc.poll() is None: proc.terminate(); time.sleep(3)
    if proc.poll() is None: proc.kill()
    print(ts(),'stopped.', flush=True)

# [STRESS-2] Fix: dung VENV python lam launcher (torchrun PATH tro nham /opt python -> thieu unsloth)
import os, sys, time, datetime, subprocess, signal
t0=time.time()
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")} +{time.time()-t0:6.1f}s]'
SCRIPT='/tmp/train_unsloth_gemma4_2gpu_ddp_PATCHED.py'
env=dict(os.environ)
env.update({
  'MODEL_DIR':'/tmp/google_gemma4_e4b_model',
  'DATA_PATH':'/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/train.jsonl',
  'OUT_DIR':'/tmp/gemma4_stress_q4096x20_r64',
  'MAX_LEN':'4096','BATCH':'20','GRAD_ACC':'1','MAX_STEPS':'20',
  'LORA_R':'64','LORA_ALPHA':'128','LR':'7e-5',
  'HF_HUB_OFFLINE':'1','TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE':'1','TOKENIZERS_PARALLELISM':'false','PYTHONUNBUFFERED':'1',
})
cmd=[sys.executable,'-m','torch.distributed.run','--standalone','--nproc_per_node=2',SCRIPT]
print(ts(),'py launcher:', sys.executable, flush=True)
print(ts(),'launch 4096x20 r64 a128 steps20 | model load ~3-6min then stream. INTERRUPT de dung.', flush=True)
proc=subprocess.Popen(cmd, env=env, stdout=subprocess.PIPE, stderr=subprocess.STDOUT, text=True, bufsize=1)
try:
    for line in proc.stdout:
        print(ts(), line.rstrip(), flush=True)
    proc.wait(); print(ts(),'EXIT rc=',proc.returncode, flush=True)
except KeyboardInterrupt:
    print(ts(),'INTERRUPT -> stop torchrun...', flush=True)
    proc.send_signal(signal.SIGINT); time.sleep(5)
    if proc.poll() is None: proc.terminate(); time.sleep(3)
    if proc.poll() is None: proc.kill()
    print(ts(),'stopped.', flush=True)

Python[STRESS-3] same run, save full log + filtered stream + tail (find real error)[14]

  
# [STRESS-3] Chay lai, luu full log /tmp/stress.log, stream dong quan trong, in tail de thay loi that
import os, sys, time, datetime, subprocess, signal, re
t0=time.time()
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")} +{time.time()-t0:6.1f}s]'
SCRIPT='/tmp/train_unsloth_gemma4_2gpu_ddp_PATCHED.py'; LOG='/tmp/stress.log'
env=dict(os.environ); env.update({
  'MODEL_DIR':'/tmp/google_gemma4_e4b_model','DATA_PATH':'/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/train.jsonl',
  'OUT_DIR':'/tmp/gemma4_stress_q4096x20_r64','MAX_LEN':'4096','BATCH':'20','GRAD_ACC':'1','MAX_STEPS':'20',
  'LORA_R':'64','LORA_ALPHA':'128','LR':'7e-5','HF_HUB_OFFLINE':'1','TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE':'1',
  'TOKENIZERS_PARALLELISM':'false','PYTHONUNBUFFERED':'1','TORCHELASTIC_ERROR_FILE':'/tmp/torch_err.json'})
KEY=re.compile(r'(loss|step|frize|froze|trainable|START|READY|Error|error|Traceback|Exception|OOM|CUDA|num_kv|RuntimeError|AttributeError|[Ii]mage|VRAM|world=|saved|SUMMARY|\{)')
cmd=[sys.executable,'-m','torch.distributed.run','--standalone','--nproc_per_node=2',SCRIPT]
print(ts(),'launch (filtered stream). INTERRUPT de dung.', flush=True)
lines=[]
with open(LOG,'w') as f:
    proc=subprocess.Popen(cmd, env=env, stdout=subprocess.PIPE, stderr=subprocess.STDOUT, text=True, bufsize=1)
    try:
        for line in proc.stdout:
            f.write(line); f.flush(); lines.append(line.rstrip())
            if KEY.search(line): print(ts(), line.rstrip(), flush=True)
        proc.wait()
    except KeyboardInterrupt:
        print(ts(),'INTERRUPT', flush=True); proc.send_signal(signal.SIGINT); time.sleep(5)
        if proc.poll() is None: proc.terminate(); time.sleep(3)
        if proc.poll() is None: proc.kill()
print(ts(),'EXIT rc=',proc.returncode, flush=True)
print(ts(),'===== TAIL 50 =====', flush=True)
for l in lines[-50:]: print('   ',l, flush=True)

# [STRESS-4] Quality-max OOM-safe: 4096x16 r64 a128 + PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True
import os, sys, time, datetime, subprocess, signal, re
t0=time.time()
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")} +{time.time()-t0:6.1f}s]'
SCRIPT='/tmp/train_unsloth_gemma4_2gpu_ddp_PATCHED.py'; LOG='/tmp/stress4.log'
env=dict(os.environ); env.update({
  'MODEL_DIR':'/tmp/google_gemma4_e4b_model','DATA_PATH':'/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/train.jsonl',
  'OUT_DIR':'/tmp/gemma4_stress_q4096x16_r64','MAX_LEN':'4096','BATCH':'16','GRAD_ACC':'1','MAX_STEPS':'20',
  'LORA_R':'64','LORA_ALPHA':'128','LR':'7e-5','HF_HUB_OFFLINE':'1','TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE':'1',
  'TOKENIZERS_PARALLELISM':'false','PYTHONUNBUFFERED':'1','PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF':'expandable_segments:True'})
KEY=re.compile(r'(loss|step|froze|trainable|START|READY|Error|Traceback|Exception|OutOfMemory|out of memory|RuntimeError|VRAM|world=|saved|SUMMARY|examples|it/s|s/it|\{)')
cmd=[sys.executable,'-m','torch.distributed.run','--standalone','--nproc_per_node=2',SCRIPT]
print(ts(),'launch 4096x16 r64 a128 steps20 expandable. model load ~3min. INTERRUPT de dung.', flush=True)
lines=[]
with open(LOG,'w') as f:
    proc=subprocess.Popen(cmd, env=env, stdout=subprocess.PIPE, stderr=subprocess.STDOUT, text=True, bufsize=1)
    try:
        for line in proc.stdout:
            f.write(line); f.flush(); lines.append(line.rstrip())
            if KEY.search(line): print(ts(), line.rstrip()[:200], flush=True)
        proc.wait()
    except KeyboardInterrupt:
        print(ts(),'INTERRUPT', flush=True); proc.send_signal(signal.SIGINT); time.sleep(5)
        if proc.poll() is None: proc.terminate(); time.sleep(3)
        if proc.poll() is None: proc.kill()
print(ts(),'EXIT rc=',proc.returncode, flush=True)
print(ts(),'=== TAIL 30 ===', flush=True)
for l in lines[-30:]: print('   ',l[:200], flush=True)

=========== LINES 1..40 ===========



  1| 



  2| #!/usr/bin/env python3



  3| # -*- coding: utf-8 -*-



  4| import os, sys, json, time



  5| from pathlib import Path



  6| 



  7| os.environ.setdefault("HF_HUB_OFFLINE", "1")



  8| os.environ.setdefault("TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE", "1")



  9| os.environ.setdefault("PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF", "expandable_segments:True")



 10| os.environ.setdefault("TOKENIZERS_PARALLELISM", "false")



 11| os.environ.setdefault("NCCL_DEBUG", "WARN")



 12| os.environ.setdefault("CUDA_DEVICE_MAX_CONNECTIONS", "1")



 13| 



 14| import torch



 15| from datasets import load_dataset



 16| from transformers import Trainer, TrainingArguments



 17| 



 18| import unsloth



 19| try:



 20|     import unsloth_zoo.temporary_patches.gemma4 as g4patch



 21|     if hasattr(g4patch, "_Gemma4KVSharedSafeProxy"):



 22|         def _gemma4_proxy_passthrough(self, name):



 23|             return getattr(object.__getattribute__(self, "_real"), name)



 24|         g4patch._Gemma4KVSharedSafeProxy.__getattr__ = _gemma4_proxy_passthrough



 25| except Exception as e:



 26|     print("proxy patch warning", repr(e), flush=True)



 27| 



 28| from unsloth import FastLanguageModel



 29| 



 30| MODEL_DIR = os.environ.get("MODEL_DIR", "/tmp/google_gemma4_e4b_model")



 31| DATA_PATH = os.environ.get("DATA_PATH", "/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/train.jsonl")



 32| OUT_DIR = os.environ.get("OUT_DIR", "/tmp/gemma4_google_unsloth_2gpu_lora")



 33| MAX_LEN = int(os.environ.get("MAX_LEN", "3072"))



 34| BATCH = int(os.environ.get("BATCH", "8"))



 35| GRAD_ACC = int(os.environ.get("GRAD_ACC", "1"))



 36| MAX_STEPS = int(os.environ.get("MAX_STEPS", "150"))



 37| LR = float(os.environ.get("LR", "7e-5"))



 38| LORA_R = int(os.environ.get("LORA_R", "32"))



 39| LORA_ALPHA = int(os.environ.get("LORA_ALPHA", "64"))



 40| 



=========== LINES 41..80 ===========



 41| rank = int(os.environ.get("RANK", "0"))



 42| local_rank = int(os.environ.get("LOCAL_RANK", "0"))



 43| if torch.cuda.is_available():



 44|     torch.cuda.set_device(local_rank)



 45| 



 46| def log(x):



 47|     if rank == 0:



 48|         print(f"[{time.strftime('%H:%M:%S')}] {x}", flush=True)



 49| 



 50| if not Path(DATA_PATH).exists():



 51|     raise FileNotFoundError(f"DATA_PATH does not exist: {DATA_PATH}")



 52| 



 53| log(f"loading model={MODEL_DIR} max_len={MAX_LEN}")



 54| model, tokenizer = FastLanguageModel.from_pretrained(



 55|     model_name=MODEL_DIR,



 56|     max_seq_length=MAX_LEN,



 57|     load_in_4bit=False,



 58|     load_in_16bit=True,



 59|     full_finetuning=False,



 60|     local_files_only=True,



 61| )



 62| tokenizer = getattr(tokenizer, "tokenizer", tokenizer)  # PATCH: unwrap Gemma4Processor



 63| if tokenizer.pad_token is None:



 64|     tokenizer.pad_token = tokenizer.eos_token



 65| 



 66| model = FastLanguageModel.get_peft_model(



 67|     model,



 68|     r=LORA_R,



 69|     target_modules=["q_proj","k_proj","v_proj","o_proj","gate_proj","up_proj","down_proj"],



 70|     lora_alpha=LORA_ALPHA,



 71|     lora_dropout=0.0,



 72|     bias="none",



 73|     use_rslora=True,



 74|     use_gradient_checkpointing="unsloth",



 75| )



 76| 



 77| bad_keys = ["vision_tower", "audio_tower", "embed_vision", "embed_audio"]



 78| froze = 0



 79| for n, p in model.named_parameters():



 80|     if any(k in n for k in bad_keys):



=========== LINES 81..120 ===========



 81|         if p.requires_grad:



 82|             froze += 1



 83|         p.requires_grad_(False)



 84| bad_trainables = [n for n, p in model.named_parameters() if p.requires_grad and any(k in n for k in bad_keys)]



 85| if bad_trainables:



 86|     raise RuntimeError("DDP unsafe trainables in vision/audio: " + repr(bad_trainables[:20]))



 87| trainable = sum(p.numel() for p in model.parameters() if p.requires_grad)



 88| log(f"froze={froze} vision/audio tensors | trainable={trainable/1e6:.1f}M | bad_trainables=0")



 89| 



 90| SYSTEM_PROMPT = os.environ.get("SYSTEM_PROMPT", "You are an assistant for defensive fuzzing of PyTorch/TensorFlow APIs.")



 91| 



 92| def split_row(ex):



 93|     msgs = ex.get("messages")



 94|     if msgs:



 95|         if isinstance(msgs, str):



 96|             msgs = json.loads(msgs)



 97|         last_assistant = None



 98|         for i in range(len(msgs)-1, -1, -1):



 99|             if msgs[i].get("role") == "assistant":



100|                 last_assistant = i



101|                 break



102|         if last_assistant is not None:



103|             prompt_msgs = msgs[:last_assistant]



104|             completion = str(msgs[last_assistant].get("content", ""))



105|             prompt = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(prompt_msgs, tokenize=False, add_generation_prompt=True)



106|             return prompt, completion, False



107|         text = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(msgs, tokenize=False, add_generation_prompt=False)



108|         return "", text, True



109|     prompt = ex.get("prompt") or ex.get("instruction") or ex.get("input")



110|     completion = ex.get("completion") or ex.get("output") or ex.get("response")



111|     if prompt is not None and completion is not None:



112|         prompt_msgs = [{"role": "system", "content": SYSTEM_PROMPT}, {"role": "user", "content": str(prompt)}]



113|         prompt_txt = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(prompt_msgs, tokenize=False, add_generation_prompt=True)



114|         return prompt_txt, str(completion), False



115|     return "", str(ex.get("text") or ""), True



116| 



117| def tokenize_one(ex):



118|     prompt, completion, full_text = split_row(ex)



119|     if full_text:



120|         ids = tokenizer(completion, add_special_tokens=False)["input_ids"][:MAX_LEN]



=========== LINES 121..160 ===========



121|         labels = ids.copy()



122|     else:



123|         pids = tokenizer(prompt, add_special_tokens=False)["input_ids"]



124|         cids = tokenizer(completion, add_special_tokens=False)["input_ids"] + [tokenizer.eos_token_id]



125|         if len(pids) + len(cids) > MAX_LEN:



126|             keep_prompt = max(0, MAX_LEN - len(cids))



127|             pids = pids[-keep_prompt:] if keep_prompt else []



128|             cids = cids[:MAX_LEN - len(pids)]



129|         ids = pids + cids



130|         labels = [-100] * len(pids) + cids



131|     return {"input_ids": ids, "labels": labels, "attention_mask": [1] * len(ids), "n_tokens": len(ids)}



132| 



133| class PadCollator:



134|     def __init__(self, tokenizer):



135|         self.tokenizer = tokenizer



136|     def __call__(self, features):



137|         max_len = max(len(f["input_ids"]) for f in features)



138|         pad_id = self.tokenizer.pad_token_id



139|         input_ids, labels, attention_mask = [], [], []



140|         for f in features:



141|             n = len(f["input_ids"])



142|             pad = max_len - n



143|             input_ids.append(f["input_ids"] + [pad_id] * pad)



144|             labels.append(f["labels"] + [-100] * pad)



145|             attention_mask.append(f["attention_mask"] + [0] * pad)



146|         return {



147|             "input_ids": torch.tensor(input_ids, dtype=torch.long),



148|             "labels": torch.tensor(labels, dtype=torch.long),



149|             "attention_mask": torch.tensor(attention_mask, dtype=torch.long),



150|         }



151| 



152| log("loading dataset")



153| ds = load_dataset("json", data_files={"train": DATA_PATH})["train"]



154| cols = ds.column_names



155| ds = ds.map(tokenize_one, remove_columns=cols, desc="tokenize")



156| ds = ds.filter(lambda x: len(x["input_ids"]) > 0 and any(v != -100 for v in x["labels"]), desc="filter")



157| log(f"dataset rows={len(ds)} avg_tokens={sum(ds['n_tokens'])/max(1,len(ds)):.1f}")



158| 



159| args = TrainingArguments(



160|     output_dir=OUT_DIR,



=========== LINES 161..197 ===========



161|     bf16=True,



162|     tf32=True,



163|     per_device_train_batch_size=BATCH,



164|     gradient_accumulation_steps=GRAD_ACC,



165|     max_steps=MAX_STEPS,



166|     learning_rate=LR,



167|     warmup_ratio=0.03,



168|     lr_scheduler_type="cosine",



169|     optim="adamw_torch_fused",



170|     logging_steps=1,



171|     save_steps=max(50, MAX_STEPS),



172|     save_total_limit=2,



173|     report_to="none",



174|     remove_unused_columns=False,



175|     ddp_find_unused_parameters=False,



176|     dataloader_num_workers=2,



177|     dataloader_pin_memory=True,



178| )



179| 



180| trainer = Trainer(model=model, args=args, train_dataset=ds, data_collator=PadCollator(tokenizer))



181| log(f"START DDP: world={torch.cuda.device_count()} per_gpu_batch={BATCH} gacc={GRAD_ACC} r={LORA_R} steps={MAX_STEPS}")

 90| SYSTEM_PROMPT = os.environ.get("SYSTEM_PROMPT", "You are an assistant for defensive fuzzing of PyTorch/TensorFlow APIs.")
 91| 
 92| def split_row(ex):
 93|     msgs = ex.get("messages")
 94|     if msgs:
 95|         if isinstance(msgs, str):
 96|             msgs = json.loads(msgs)
 97|         last_assistant = None
 98|         for i in range(len(msgs)-1, -1, -1):
 99|             if msgs[i].get("role") == "assistant":
100|                 last_assistant = i
101|                 break
102|         if last_assistant is not None:
103|             prompt_msgs = msgs[:last_assistant]
104|             completion = str(msgs[last_assistant].get("content", ""))
105|             prompt = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(prompt_msgs, tokenize=False, add_generation_prompt=True)
106|             return prompt, completion, False
107|         text = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(msgs, tokenize=False, add_generation_prompt=False)
108|         return "", text, True
109|     prompt = ex.get("prompt") or ex.get("instruction") or ex.get("input")
110|     completion = ex.get("completion") or ex.get("output") or ex.get("response")
111|     if prompt is not None and completion is not None:
112|         prompt_msgs = [{"role": "system", "content": SYSTEM_PROMPT}, {"role": "user", "content": str(prompt)}]



===== 113..140 =====
113|         prompt_txt = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(prompt_msgs, tokenize=False, add_generation_prompt=True)
114|         return prompt_txt, str(completion), False
115|     return "", str(ex.get("text") or ""), True
116| 
117| def tokenize_one(ex):
118|     prompt, completion, full_text = split_row(ex)
119|     if full_text:
120|         ids = tokenizer(completion, add_special_tokens=False)["input_ids"][:MAX_LEN]
121|         labels = ids.copy()
122|     else:
123|         pids = tokenizer(prompt, add_special_tokens=False)["input_ids"]
124|         cids = tokenizer(completion, add_special_tokens=False)["input_ids"] + [tokenizer.eos_token_id]
125|         if len(pids) + len(cids) > MAX_LEN:
126|             keep_prompt = max(0, MAX_LEN - len(cids))
127|             pids = pids[-keep_prompt:] if keep_prompt else []
128|             cids = cids[:MAX_LEN - len(pids)]
129|         ids = pids + cids
130|         labels = [-100] * len(pids) + cids
131|     return {"input_ids": ids, "labels": labels, "attention_mask": [1] * len(ids), "n_tokens": len(ids)}
132| 
133| class PadCollator:
134|     def __init__(self, tokenizer):
135|         self.tokenizer = tokenizer
136|     def __call__(self, features):
137|         max_len = max(len(f["input_ids"]) for f in features)
138|         pad_id = self.tokenizer.pad_token_id
139|         input_ids, labels, attention_mask = [], [], []
140|         for f in features:



===== 141..168 =====
141|             n = len(f["input_ids"])
142|             pad = max_len - n
143|             input_ids.append(f["input_ids"] + [pad_id] * pad)
144|             labels.append(f["labels"] + [-100] * pad)
145|             attention_mask.append(f["attention_mask"] + [0] * pad)
146|         return {
147|             "input_ids": torch.tensor(input_ids, dtype=torch.long),
148|             "labels": torch.tensor(labels, dtype=torch.long),
149|             "attention_mask": torch.tensor(attention_mask, dtype=torch.long),
150|         }
151| 
152| log("loading dataset")
153| ds = load_dataset("json", data_files={"train": DATA_PATH})["train"]
154| cols = ds.column_names
155| ds = ds.map(tokenize_one, remove_columns=cols, desc="tokenize")
156| ds = ds.filter(lambda x: len(x["input_ids"]) > 0 and any(v != -100 for v in x["labels"]), desc="filter")
157| log(f"dataset rows={len(ds)} avg_tokens={sum(ds['n_tokens'])/max(1,len(ds)):.1f}")
158| 
159| args = TrainingArguments(
160|     output_dir=OUT_DIR,
161|     bf16=True,
162|     tf32=True,
163|     per_device_train_batch_size=BATCH,
164|     gradient_accumulation_steps=GRAD_ACC,
165|     max_steps=MAX_STEPS,
166|     learning_rate=LR,
167|     warmup_ratio=0.03,
168|     lr_scheduler_type="cosine",



===== 169..196 =====
169|     optim="adamw_torch_fused",
170|     logging_steps=1,
171|     save_steps=max(50, MAX_STEPS),
172|     save_total_limit=2,
173|     report_to="none",
174|     remove_unused_columns=False,
175|     ddp_find_unused_parameters=False,
176|     dataloader_num_workers=2,
177|     dataloader_pin_memory=True,
178| )
179| 
180| trainer = Trainer(model=model, args=args, train_dataset=ds, data_collator=PadCollator(tokenizer))
181| log(f"START DDP: world={torch.cuda.device_count()} per_gpu_batch={BATCH} gacc={GRAD_ACC} r={LORA_R} steps={MAX_STEPS}")
182| t0 = time.time()
183| result = trainer.train()
184| secs = time.time() - t0
185| if rank == 0:
186|     trainer.save_model(OUT_DIR)
187|     tokenizer.save_pretrained(OUT_DIR)
188|     max_vram = torch.cuda.max_memory_allocated() / 1024**3 if torch.cuda.is_available() else 0
189|     print(json.dumps({
190|         "engine": "unsloth-2gpu-ddp-google-gemma4",
191|         "steps": MAX_STEPS,
192|         "train_seconds": round(secs, 1),
193|         "loss": result.training_loss,

195|         "out_dir": OUT_DIR,
196|     }, indent=2), flush=True)



===== 197..197 =====
197| 






  
Python[WORKER-START] persistent 2-GPU worker (load once, file job-queue)[19]

  
# [WORKER-START] Bat worker thuong tru 2-GPU: load model+LoRA+dataset 1 lan, roi nhan job qua file-queue.
# Co dinh MAX_LEN=4096, r=64, alpha=128 (quality). Job doi: batch/grad_acc/steps/lr/out/save (KHONG reload).
import os, sys, time, datetime, subprocess, signal
t0=time.time()
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")} +{time.time()-t0:6.1f}s]'

SERVER = r'''
import os, sys, json, time, glob
from pathlib import Path
os.environ.setdefault("HF_HUB_OFFLINE","1"); os.environ.setdefault("TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE","1")
os.environ.setdefault("PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF","expandable_segments:True")
os.environ.setdefault("TOKENIZERS_PARALLELISM","false"); os.environ.setdefault("CUDA_DEVICE_MAX_CONNECTIONS","1")
import torch, torch.distributed as dist
from datasets import load_dataset
from transformers import Trainer, TrainingArguments, TrainerCallback
import unsloth
try:
    import unsloth_zoo.temporary_patches.gemma4 as g4patch
    if hasattr(g4patch, "_Gemma4KVSharedSafeProxy"):
        def _pt(self,name): return getattr(object.__getattribute__(self,"_real"),name)
        g4patch._Gemma4KVSharedSafeProxy.__getattr__=_pt
except Exception as e:
    print("proxy patch warning",repr(e),flush=True)
from unsloth import FastLanguageModel
MODEL_DIR=os.environ.get("MODEL_DIR","/tmp/google_gemma4_e4b_model")
DATA_PATH=os.environ.get("DATA_PATH","/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/train.jsonl")
MAX_LEN=int(os.environ.get("MAX_LEN","4096")); LORA_R=int(os.environ.get("LORA_R","64")); LORA_ALPHA=int(os.environ.get("LORA_ALPHA","128"))
SYSTEM_PROMPT=os.environ.get("SYSTEM_PROMPT","You are an assistant for defensive fuzzing of PyTorch/TensorFlow APIs.")
rank=int(os.environ.get("RANK","0")); local_rank=int(os.environ.get("LOCAL_RANK","0"))
if torch.cuda.is_available(): torch.cuda.set_device(local_rank)
def log(x):
    if rank==0: print(f"[{time.strftime('%H:%M:%S')}] {x}",flush=True)
log(f"loading model={MODEL_DIR} max_len={MAX_LEN} r={LORA_R} a={LORA_ALPHA}")
model,tokenizer=FastLanguageModel.from_pretrained(model_name=MODEL_DIR,max_seq_length=MAX_LEN,load_in_4bit=False,load_in_16bit=True,full_finetuning=False,local_files_only=True)
tokenizer=getattr(tokenizer,"tokenizer",tokenizer)
if tokenizer.pad_token is None: tokenizer.pad_token=tokenizer.eos_token
model=FastLanguageModel.get_peft_model(model,r=LORA_R,target_modules=["q_proj","k_proj","v_proj","o_proj","gate_proj","up_proj","down_proj"],lora_alpha=LORA_ALPHA,lora_dropout=0.0,bias="none",use_rslora=True,use_gradient_checkpointing="unsloth")
bad=["vision_tower","audio_tower","embed_vision","embed_audio"]; froze=0
for n,p in model.named_parameters():
    if any(k in n for k in bad):
        if p.requires_grad: froze+=1
        p.requires_grad_(False)
trainable=sum(p.numel() for p in model.parameters() if p.requires_grad)
log(f"froze={froze} trainable={trainable/1e6:.1f}M")
def split_row(ex):
    msgs=ex.get("messages")
    if msgs:
        if isinstance(msgs,str): msgs=json.loads(msgs)
        la=None
        for i in range(len(msgs)-1,-1,-1):
            if msgs[i].get("role")=="assistant": la=i; break
        if la is not None:
            pm=msgs[:la]; completion=str(msgs[la].get("content",""))
            prompt=tokenizer.apply_chat_template(pm,tokenize=False,add_generation_prompt=True)
            return prompt,completion,False
        return "",tokenizer.apply_chat_template(msgs,tokenize=False,add_generation_prompt=False),True
    prompt=ex.get("prompt") or ex.get("instruction") or ex.get("input")
    completion=ex.get("completion") or ex.get("output") or ex.get("response")
    if prompt is not None and completion is not None:
        pm=[{"role":"system","content":SYSTEM_PROMPT},{"role":"user","content":str(prompt)}]
        return tokenizer.apply_chat_template(pm,tokenize=False,add_generation_prompt=True),str(completion),False
    return "",str(ex.get("text") or ""),True
def tok_one(ex):
    p,c,ft=split_row(ex)
    if ft:
        ids=tokenizer(c,add_special_tokens=False)["input_ids"][:MAX_LEN]; labels=ids.copy()
    else:
        pids=tokenizer(p,add_special_tokens=False)["input_ids"]; cids=tokenizer(c,add_special_tokens=False)["input_ids"]+[tokenizer.eos_token_id]
        if len(pids)+len(cids)>MAX_LEN:
            kp=max(0,MAX_LEN-len(cids)); pids=pids[-kp:] if kp else []; cids=cids[:MAX_LEN-len(pids)]
        ids=pids+cids; labels=[-100]*len(pids)+cids
    return {"input_ids":ids,"labels":labels,"attention_mask":[1]*len(ids),"n_tokens":len(ids)}
class PadCollator:
    def __init__(self,tk): self.tk=tk
    def __call__(self,fts):
        ml=max(len(f["input_ids"]) for f in fts); pid=self.tk.pad_token_id
        ii,ll,am=[],[],[]
        for f in fts:
            n=len(f["input_ids"]); pad=ml-n
            ii.append(f["input_ids"]+[pid]*pad); ll.append(f["labels"]+[-100]*pad); am.append(f["attention_mask"]+[0]*pad)
        return {"input_ids":torch.tensor(ii,dtype=torch.long),"labels":torch.tensor(ll,dtype=torch.long),"attention_mask":torch.tensor(am,dtype=torch.long)}
log("loading dataset")
ds=load_dataset("json",data_files={"train":DATA_PATH})["train"]
ds=ds.map(tok_one,remove_columns=ds.column_names,desc="tok")
ds=ds.filter(lambda x: len(x["input_ids"])>0 and any(v!=-100 for v in x["labels"]),desc="flt")
log(f"dataset rows={len(ds)} avg_tokens={sum(ds['n_tokens'])/max(1,len(ds)):.1f}")
WDIR="/tmp/worker"; JOBS=WDIR+"/jobs"; RES=WDIR+"/results"
os.makedirs(JOBS,exist_ok=True); os.makedirs(RES,exist_ok=True)
def ready_ids(): return sorted(int(Path(p).stem) for p in glob.glob(JOBS+"/*.ready"))
last=max(ready_ids(),default=0)
dev=torch.device(f"cuda:{local_rank}")
class StopCB(TrainerCallback):
    def __init__(self,jid): self.flags=[WDIR+"/STOP",WDIR+f"/STOP_{jid}"]
    def on_step_end(self,a,s,c,**k):
        loc=1.0 if any(os.path.exists(f) for f in self.flags) else 0.0
        if dist.is_initialized():
            t=torch.tensor([loc],device=dev); dist.all_reduce(t,op=dist.ReduceOp.MAX); loc=t.item()
        if loc>0: c.should_training_stop=True
        return c
log(f"WORKER READY (resident) last_job={last} world={torch.cuda.device_count()}")
while True:
    todo=[i for i in ready_ids() if i>last]
    if not todo: time.sleep(2); continue
    jid=todo[0]
    try: spec=json.load(open(JOBS+f"/{jid}.json"))
    except Exception: time.sleep(1); continue
    BATCH=int(spec.get("batch",16)); GACC=int(spec.get("grad_acc",1)); STEPS=int(spec.get("max_steps",20))
    LR=float(spec.get("lr",7e-5)); OUT=spec.get("out_dir",f"/tmp/gemma4_job_{jid}"); SAVE=bool(spec.get("save",False)); SS=int(spec.get("save_steps",50))
    logf=JOBS+f"/{jid}.log"
    def jlog(x):
        if rank==0:
            open(logf,"a").write(f"[{time.strftime('%H:%M:%S')}] {x}\n"); print(f"[job{jid}] {x}",flush=True)
    class LogCB(TrainerCallback):
        def on_log(self,a,s,c,logs=None,**k):
            if rank==0 and logs:
                d={kk:(round(vv,4) if isinstance(vv,float) else vv) for kk,vv in logs.items()}; d["step"]=s.global_step
                jlog(json.dumps(d))
            return c
    torch.cuda.reset_peak_memory_stats()
    args=TrainingArguments(output_dir=OUT,bf16=True,tf32=True,per_device_train_batch_size=BATCH,gradient_accumulation_steps=GACC,max_steps=STEPS,learning_rate=LR,warmup_ratio=0.03,lr_scheduler_type="cosine",optim="adamw_torch_fused",logging_steps=1,save_steps=(SS if SAVE else 10**9),save_total_limit=2,report_to="none",remove_unused_columns=False,ddp_find_unused_parameters=False,dataloader_num_workers=2,dataloader_pin_memory=True)
    jlog(f"START batch={BATCH} gacc={GACC} steps={STEPS} lr={LR} out={OUT} save={SAVE}")
    tt=time.time()
    try:
        tr=Trainer(model=model,args=args,train_dataset=ds,data_collator=PadCollator(tokenizer),callbacks=[StopCB(jid),LogCB()])
        res=tr.train(); secs=time.time()-tt
        if rank==0:
            if SAVE: tr.save_model(OUT); tokenizer.save_pretrained(OUT)
            vram=torch.cuda.max_memory_allocated()/1024**3
            summ={"job":jid,"steps":res.global_step,"train_seconds":round(secs,1),"loss":round(res.training_loss,4),"max_vram_gb":round(vram,1),"out_dir":OUT,"saved":SAVE}
            json.dump(summ,open(RES+f"/{jid}.done","w"),indent=2); jlog("DONE "+json.dumps(summ))
    except Exception as e:
        import traceback; tb=traceback.format_exc()
        if rank==0:
            json.dump({"job":jid,"error":repr(e)},open(RES+f"/{jid}.done","w")); jlog("ERROR "+repr(e)); open(logf,"a").write(tb)
    if dist.is_initialized(): dist.barrier()
    for f in [WDIR+"/STOP",WDIR+f"/STOP_{jid}"]:
        if os.path.exists(f):
            try: os.remove(f)
            except: pass
    last=jid
'''
os.makedirs('/tmp/worker', exist_ok=True)
open('/tmp/worker_server.py','w').write(SERVER)
env=dict(os.environ); env.update({'MODEL_DIR':'/tmp/google_gemma4_e4b_model','DATA_PATH':'/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/train.jsonl','MAX_LEN':'4096','LORA_R':'64','LORA_ALPHA':'128','HF_HUB_OFFLINE':'1','TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE':'1','PYTHONUNBUFFERED':'1'})
LOG='/tmp/worker/server.log'; open(LOG,'w').close()
cmd=[sys.executable,'-m','torch.distributed.run','--standalone','--nproc_per_node=2','/tmp/worker_server.py']
proc=subprocess.Popen(cmd, env=env, stdout=open(LOG,'a'), stderr=subprocess.STDOUT, text=True)
open('/tmp/worker/server.pid','w').write(str(proc.pid))
print(ts(),'worker launched pid',proc.pid,'| waiting for READY (model load ~3min)...', flush=True)
import re
pos=0; ready=False; deadline=time.time()+540
while time.time()<deadline:
    if proc.poll() is not None:
        print(ts(),'WORKER PROCESS EXITED rc=',proc.returncode,'(see tail below)', flush=True); break
    with open(LOG) as f: f.seek(pos); new=f.read(); pos=f.tell()
    for ln in new.splitlines():
        if re.search(r'READY|froze=|dataset rows=|loading model|loading dataset|Error|Traceback|OutOfMemory|warning', ln):
            print(ts(), ln[:200], flush=True)
        if 'WORKER READY' in ln: ready=True
    if ready: break
    time.sleep(2)
print(ts(),'READY' if ready else 'NOT READY (check tail)', flush=True)
print(ts(),'--- server.log tail ---', flush=True)
print(subprocess.run(['tail','-n','12',LOG],capture_output=True,text=True).stdout, flush=True)

Python[WORKER-RUN] submit a job + stream per-step (no reload)[23]

  
# [WORKER-RUN] Gui 1 job toi worker (KHONG reload). Sua params ben duoi roi Run.
# 'Train den khi dung': dat JOB_STEPS rat lon + JOB_SAVE=True, roi chay [WORKER-STOP] de dung+luu.
JOB_BATCH      = 16
JOB_GRAD_ACC   = 1
JOB_STEPS      = 20
JOB_LR         = 7e-5
JOB_OUT        = '/tmp/gemma4_worker_run'
JOB_SAVE       = False
JOB_SAVE_STEPS = 50

import os, glob, json, time, datetime
t0=time.time()
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")} +{time.time()-t0:6.1f}s]'
WDIR='/tmp/worker'; JOBS=WDIR+'/jobs'; RES=WDIR+'/results'
if not os.path.exists(WDIR+'/server.pid'):
    print('WORKER chua chay. Chay [WORKER-START] truoc.'); raise SystemExit
os.makedirs(JOBS,exist_ok=True); os.makedirs(RES,exist_ok=True)
ids=[int(os.path.basename(p)[:-5]) for p in glob.glob(JOBS+'/*.json')]
jid=(max(ids)+1) if ids else 1
spec=dict(batch=JOB_BATCH,grad_acc=JOB_GRAD_ACC,max_steps=JOB_STEPS,lr=JOB_LR,out_dir=JOB_OUT,save=JOB_SAVE,save_steps=JOB_SAVE_STEPS)
json.dump(spec,open(JOBS+f'/{jid}.json','w')); open(JOBS+f'/{jid}.ready','w').close()
print(ts(),f'submitted job {jid}:',spec, flush=True)
print(ts(),'streaming (INTERRUPT chi dung xem, job van chay; dung han bang [WORKER-STOP])', flush=True)
logf=JOBS+f'/{jid}.log'; donef=RES+f'/{jid}.done'; pos=0
try:
    while True:
        if os.path.exists(logf):
            with open(logf) as f: f.seek(pos); new=f.read(); pos=f.tell()
            for ln in new.splitlines(): print(ts(), ln, flush=True)
        if os.path.exists(donef):
            time.sleep(0.5)
            with open(logf) as f: f.seek(pos); print(f.read(), flush=True)
            print(ts(),'=== JOB DONE ===', flush=True); print(open(donef).read(), flush=True); break
        time.sleep(1)
except KeyboardInterrupt:
    print(ts(),'stopped watching (job tiep tuc chay tren worker).', flush=True)

  
[11:55:57 +   0.0s] submitted job 1: {'batch': 16, 'grad_acc': 1, 'max_steps': 20, 'lr': 7e-05, 'out_dir': '/tmp/gemma4_worker_run', 'save': False, 'save_steps': 50}



[11:55:57 +   0.0s] streaming (INTERRUPT chi dung xem, job van chay; dung han bang [WORKER-STOP])

Python[WORKER-STOP] graceful stop current job (+optional shutdown)

  
# [WORKER-STOP] Dung job dang chay (graceful, luu neu save=True). Worker van song de chay job khac.
# De TAT han worker + giai phong GPU (het ton credit): dat SHUTDOWN=True.
SHUTDOWN = False
import os, time, datetime, signal
def ts(): return '['+datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%H:%M:%S')+']'
WDIR='/tmp/worker'
open(WDIR+'/STOP','w').close()
print(ts(),'wrote STOP flag -> job se dung o step ke tiep (graceful).', flush=True)
if SHUTDOWN:
    try:
        pid=int(open(WDIR+'/server.pid').read()); os.kill(pid, signal.SIGINT); time.sleep(3)
        try: os.kill(pid, signal.SIGTERM)
        except: pass
        print(ts(),'worker shutdown signal sent pid',pid,'(GPU se giai phong).', flush=True)
    except Exception as e:
        print(ts(),'shutdown err',repr(e), flush=True)

  




  
Python[WORKER-RUN b8] batch8 @4096 on current worker (no reload)[21]

  
# [WORKER-RUN b8] Job batch=8 @ MAX_LEN=4096 (worst-case logits ~17GB, an toan). Khong reload.
JOB_BATCH, JOB_GRAD_ACC, JOB_STEPS, JOB_LR = 8, 1, 20, 7e-5
JOB_OUT, JOB_SAVE, JOB_SAVE_STEPS = '/tmp/gemma4_worker_b8', False, 50
import os, glob, json, time, datetime
t0=time.time()
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")} +{time.time()-t0:6.1f}s]'
WDIR='/tmp/worker'; JOBS=WDIR+'/jobs'; RES=WDIR+'/results'
ids=[int(os.path.basename(p)[:-5]) for p in glob.glob(JOBS+'/*.json')]
jid=(max(ids)+1) if ids else 1
spec=dict(batch=JOB_BATCH,grad_acc=JOB_GRAD_ACC,max_steps=JOB_STEPS,lr=JOB_LR,out_dir=JOB_OUT,save=JOB_SAVE,save_steps=JOB_SAVE_STEPS)
json.dump(spec,open(JOBS+f'/{jid}.json','w')); open(JOBS+f'/{jid}.ready','w').close()
print(ts(),f'submitted job {jid}:',spec, flush=True)
logf=JOBS+f'/{jid}.log'; donef=RES+f'/{jid}.done'; pos=0
try:
    while True:
        if os.path.exists(logf):
            with open(logf) as f: f.seek(pos); new=f.read(); pos=f.tell()
            for ln in new.splitlines(): print(ts(), ln, flush=True)
        if os.path.exists(donef):
            time.sleep(0.5)
            with open(logf) as f: f.seek(pos); print(f.read(), flush=True)
            print(ts(),'=== JOB DONE ===', flush=True); print(open(donef).read(), flush=True); break
        time.sleep(1)
except KeyboardInterrupt:
    print(ts(),'stopped watching (job van chay).', flush=True)

Python[WORKER-RESTART] kill old worker + relaunch MAX_LEN=2048 (stable)[22]

  
# [WORKER-RESTART] Kill worker cu (giai phong GPU) + don job + bat lai o MAX_LEN=2048 (on dinh, batch<=16 an toan)
import os, sys, time, datetime, subprocess, signal, glob, re
t0=time.time()
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")} +{time.time()-t0:6.1f}s]'
def sh(c): return subprocess.run(c, shell=True, capture_output=True, text=True).stdout
WDIR='/tmp/worker'
# 1) kill old
sh('pkill -9 -f worker_server.py'); sh('pkill -9 -f torch.distributed.run'); time.sleep(4)
print(ts(),'after kill, GPU mem:', flush=True)
print(sh('nvidia-smi --query-gpu=index,memory.used,memory.total --format=csv,noheader'), flush=True)
# 2) clean job queue (giu lai log cu? xoa de sach)
for d in ['jobs','results']:
    for f in glob.glob(f'{WDIR}/{d}/*'):
        try: os.remove(f)
        except: pass
for f in glob.glob(f'{WDIR}/STOP*'):
    try: os.remove(f)
    except: pass
# 3) relaunch MAX_LEN=2048
env=dict(os.environ); env.update({'MODEL_DIR':'/tmp/google_gemma4_e4b_model','DATA_PATH':'/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/train.jsonl','MAX_LEN':'2048','LORA_R':'64','LORA_ALPHA':'128','HF_HUB_OFFLINE':'1','TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE':'1','PYTHONUNBUFFERED':'1'})
LOG=WDIR+'/server.log'; open(LOG,'w').close()
cmd=[sys.executable,'-m','torch.distributed.run','--standalone','--nproc_per_node=2','/tmp/worker_server.py']
proc=subprocess.Popen(cmd, env=env, stdout=open(LOG,'a'), stderr=subprocess.STDOUT, text=True, start_new_session=True)
open(WDIR+'/server.pid','w').write(str(proc.pid))
print(ts(),'relaunched pid',proc.pid,'MAX_LEN=2048 | waiting READY...', flush=True)
pos=0; ready=False; deadline=time.time()+540
while time.time()<deadline:
    if proc.poll() is not None:
        print(ts(),'EXITED rc=',proc.returncode, flush=True); break
    with open(LOG) as f: f.seek(pos); new=f.read(); pos=f.tell()
    for ln in new.splitlines():
        if re.search(r'READY|froze=|dataset rows=|loading|Error|Traceback|OutOfMemory', ln): print(ts(), ln[:200], flush=True)
        if 'WORKER READY' in ln: ready=True
    if ready: break
    time.sleep(2)
print(ts(),'READY' if ready else 'NOT READY', flush=True)

Python[WORKER-SWEEP] batch 24/32/40 @2048 r64 (no reload, OOM-safe, ranked)[24]

  
# [WORKER-SWEEP] Tang BATCH de vat GPU, giu MAX_LEN=2048 r64 (chat luong khong doi). KHONG reload.
# Dung ngay neu OOM (de khong hong worker). Do VRAM + samples/s + ~tok/s.
BATCHES=[24,32,40]; STEPS=15; LR=7e-5; AVG_TOK=437.0; WORLD=2
import os, glob, json, time, datetime
t0=time.time()
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")} +{time.time()-t0:6.1f}s]'
WDIR='/tmp/worker'; JOBS=WDIR+'/jobs'; RES=WDIR+'/results'
if not os.path.exists(WDIR+'/server.pid'): print('worker chua chay'); raise SystemExit
rows=[]
for b in BATCHES:
    ids=[int(os.path.basename(p)[:-5]) for p in glob.glob(JOBS+'/*.json')]
    jid=(max(ids)+1) if ids else 1
    spec=dict(batch=b,grad_acc=1,max_steps=STEPS,lr=LR,out_dir=f'/tmp/gemma4_sweep_b{b}',save=False,save_steps=10**9)
    json.dump(spec,open(JOBS+f'/{jid}.json','w')); open(JOBS+f'/{jid}.ready','w').close()
    print(ts(),f'--- submit batch={b} (job {jid}) ---', flush=True)
    logf=JOBS+f'/{jid}.log'; donef=RES+f'/{jid}.done'; pos=0; oom=False
    while True:
        if os.path.exists(logf):
            with open(logf) as f: f.seek(pos); new=f.read(); pos=f.tell()
            for ln in new.splitlines():
                if '"step":' in ln or 'START' in ln or 'ERROR' in ln or 'DONE' in ln: print(ts(), ln[-140:], flush=True)
        if os.path.exists(donef):
            s=json.load(open(donef))
            if 'error' in s:
                print(ts(),'OOM/ERROR @batch',b,'->',s['error'][:120], flush=True); oom=True
            else:
                sps=(b*WORLD*s['steps'])/s['train_seconds']; toks=sps*AVG_TOK
                rows.append((b,s['max_vram_gb'],round(sps,2),int(toks),s['loss']))
                print(ts(),f"OK batch={b} VRAM={s['max_vram_gb']}GB samples/s={sps:.2f} ~tok/s={int(toks)} loss={s['loss']}", flush=True)
            break
        time.sleep(1)
    if oom: print(ts(),'STOP sweep (worker can restart sau OOM).', flush=True); break
print('\n'+ts(),'===== RANK (tok/s) =====', flush=True)
for r in sorted(rows,key=lambda x:-x[3]):
    print(f'  batch={r[0]:>3}  VRAM={r[1]:>5}GB  samples/s={r[2]:>6}  ~tok/s={r[3]:>7}  loss={r[4]}', flush=True)

Python[RESETUP] rebuild /tmp after resume (model+support+wheels+patched)[1]

  
# [RESETUP] Dung lai env sau suspend: GET model + support, cai wheels offline, ghi patched script. Stream timestamp.
import os, sys, time, datetime, subprocess, glob
from snowflake.snowpark.context import get_active_session
session=get_active_session(); t0=time.time()
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")} +{time.time()-t0:6.1f}s]'
def sh(c): return subprocess.run(c,shell=True,capture_output=True,text=True).stdout
STAGE='@ML_DB.MODELS.FUZZ_DATASET_STAGE'; PACK='google_gemma4_e4b_unsloth_full_quality_pack_20260606'

if not glob.glob('/tmp/google_gemma4_e4b_model/*.safetensors'):
    os.makedirs('/tmp/google_gemma4_e4b_model',exist_ok=True)
    print(ts(),'GET model_snapshot (16GB)...',flush=True)
    session.file.get(f'{STAGE}/{PACK}/model_snapshot/','/tmp/google_gemma4_e4b_model/')
print(ts(),'model files:',[os.path.basename(x) for x in glob.glob('/tmp/google_gemma4_e4b_model/*')],flush=True)

if not os.path.isdir('/tmp/gemma4_full_support/wheels'):
    os.makedirs('/tmp/pack/support',exist_ok=True)
    print(ts(),'GET support tar (601MB)...',flush=True)
    session.file.get(f'{STAGE}/{PACK}/support/gemma4_full_support_pack.tar.gz','/tmp/pack/support/')
    os.makedirs('/tmp/gemma4_full_support',exist_ok=True)
    sh('cd /tmp/gemma4_full_support && tar -xzf /tmp/pack/support/gemma4_full_support_pack.tar.gz')
print(ts(),'support dirs:',sh('ls /tmp/gemma4_full_support').split(),flush=True)

WH='/tmp/gemma4_full_support/wheels'
EXCL=['xformers','datasets-','click-','certifi','urllib3','idna-','charset','requests-','protobuf','numpy-','pyarrow','safetensors-','tokenizers-']
def badp(b): return any(x in b for x in ['cp311','cp310','cp39','py39','cp38'])
sel=[w for w in sorted(glob.glob(WH+'/*.whl')) if not any(s in os.path.basename(w) for s in EXCL) and not badp(os.path.basename(w))]
print(ts(),f'pip install {len(sel)} wheels (offline --no-deps)...',flush=True)
p=subprocess.run([sys.executable,'-m','pip','install','--no-index','--no-deps','--upgrade','--find-links',WH]+sel,capture_output=True,text=True)
print(ts(),'pip rc=',p.returncode, p.stdout[-300:] if p.returncode==0 else p.stderr[-800:],flush=True)

# patched script copy (grad-ckpt + tokenizer unwrap)
SRC='/tmp/gemma4_full_support/scripts/train_unsloth_gemma4_2gpu_ddp.py'; DST='/tmp/train_unsloth_gemma4_2gpu_ddp_PATCHED.py'
if os.path.exists(SRC):
    txt=open(SRC).read().replace('use_gradient_checkpointing=False','use_gradient_checkpointing="unsloth"')
    if 'getattr(tokenizer, "tokenizer"' not in txt:
        txt=txt.replace('if tokenizer.pad_token is None:','tokenizer = getattr(tokenizer, "tokenizer", tokenizer)\nif tokenizer.pad_token is None:',1)
    open(DST,'w').write(txt)
print(ts(),'patched script written:',os.path.exists(DST),flush=True)
print(ts(),'DONE resetup.',flush=True)

Python[INTROSPECT] verify TrainingArguments 5.10.2 param names (no GPU)[2]

  
# [INTROSPECT] Kiem tra cac tham so co that trong TrainingArguments 5.10.2 (subprocess, khong dung GPU)
import subprocess, sys, datetime
def ts(): return '['+datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%H:%M:%S')+']'
code=r'''
import dataclasses, json
from transformers import TrainingArguments, __version__ as V
fields={f.name for f in dataclasses.fields(TrainingArguments)}
want=["train_sampling_strategy","length_column_name","group_by_length","ddp_static_graph","ddp_bucket_cap_mb","ddp_broadcast_buffers","dataloader_persistent_workers","dataloader_num_workers","neftune_noise_alpha","optim","lr_scheduler_type"]
print("transformers",V)
for w in want:
    print(("  OK  " if w in fields else " MISS "), w)
# neu co train_sampling_strategy, in cac gia tri hop le neu tim duoc
import inspect
try:
    src=inspect.getsource(TrainingArguments)
    import re
    for key in ["train_sampling_strategy","sampling_strategy"]:
        for line in src.splitlines():
            if key in line and ("group_by_length" in line or "Literal" in line or "=" in line):
                print("  HINT:", line.strip()[:160]); break
except Exception as e:
    print("src hint err", e)
'''
p=subprocess.run([sys.executable,'-c',code],capture_output=True,text=True)
print(ts(),'stdout:\n'+p.stdout, flush=True)
if p.returncode!=0: print(ts(),'stderr:\n'+p.stderr[-1500:], flush=True)

  
[13:23:09] stdout:
transformers 5.10.2
  OK   train_sampling_strategy
  OK   length_column_name
 MISS  group_by_length
  OK   ddp_static_graph
  OK   ddp_bucket_cap_mb
  OK   ddp_broadcast_buffers
  OK   dataloader_persistent_workers
  OK   dataloader_num_workers
  OK   neftune_noise_alpha
  OK   optim
  OK   lr_scheduler_type
  HINT: than computing them on train startup. Ignored unless `train_sampling_strategy` is `"group_by_length"` and the dataset
  HINT: than computing them on train startup. Ignored unless `train_sampling_strategy` is `"group_by_length"` and the dataset







  
Python[WORKER-START v5] group_by_length + persistent_workers + optional static_graph/neftune[3]

  
# [WORKER-START v5] Worker moi: them train_sampling_strategy=group_by_length, length_column_name=n_tokens,
# dataloader_persistent_workers, va cho phep ddp_static_graph/neftune theo job. Bao cao samples/s that.
import os, sys, time, datetime, subprocess, re
t0=time.time()
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")} +{time.time()-t0:6.1f}s]'
def sh(c): return subprocess.run(c,shell=True,capture_output=True,text=True).stdout
sh('pkill -9 -f worker_server'); sh('pkill -9 -f torch.distributed.run'); time.sleep(3)

SERVER = r'''
import os, sys, json, time, glob, dataclasses
from pathlib import Path
os.environ.setdefault("HF_HUB_OFFLINE","1"); os.environ.setdefault("TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE","1")
os.environ.setdefault("PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF","expandable_segments:True")
os.environ.setdefault("TOKENIZERS_PARALLELISM","false")
import torch, torch.distributed as dist
from datasets import load_dataset
from transformers import Trainer, TrainingArguments, TrainerCallback
import unsloth
try:
    import unsloth_zoo.temporary_patches.gemma4 as g4patch
    if hasattr(g4patch,"_Gemma4KVSharedSafeProxy"):
        def _pt(self,name): return getattr(object.__getattribute__(self,"_real"),name)
        g4patch._Gemma4KVSharedSafeProxy.__getattr__=_pt
except Exception as e:
    print("proxy warn",repr(e),flush=True)
from unsloth import FastLanguageModel
MODEL_DIR=os.environ.get("MODEL_DIR","/tmp/google_gemma4_e4b_model")
DATA_PATH=os.environ.get("DATA_PATH","/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/train.jsonl")
MAX_LEN=int(os.environ.get("MAX_LEN","2048")); LORA_R=int(os.environ.get("LORA_R","64")); LORA_ALPHA=int(os.environ.get("LORA_ALPHA","128"))
SYS=os.environ.get("SYSTEM_PROMPT","You are an assistant for defensive fuzzing of PyTorch/TensorFlow APIs.")
rank=int(os.environ.get("RANK","0")); local_rank=int(os.environ.get("LOCAL_RANK","0"))
if torch.cuda.is_available(): torch.cuda.set_device(local_rank)
def log(x):
    if rank==0: print(f"[{time.strftime('%H:%M:%S')}] {x}",flush=True)
log(f"v5 loading model={MODEL_DIR} max_len={MAX_LEN} r={LORA_R} a={LORA_ALPHA}")
model,tokenizer=FastLanguageModel.from_pretrained(model_name=MODEL_DIR,max_seq_length=MAX_LEN,load_in_4bit=False,load_in_16bit=True,full_finetuning=False,local_files_only=True)
tokenizer=getattr(tokenizer,"tokenizer",tokenizer)
if tokenizer.pad_token is None: tokenizer.pad_token=tokenizer.eos_token
model=FastLanguageModel.get_peft_model(model,r=LORA_R,target_modules=["q_proj","k_proj","v_proj","o_proj","gate_proj","up_proj","down_proj"],lora_alpha=LORA_ALPHA,lora_dropout=0.0,bias="none",use_rslora=True,use_gradient_checkpointing="unsloth")
bad=["vision_tower","audio_tower","embed_vision","embed_audio"]; froze=0
for n,p in model.named_parameters():
    if any(k in n for k in bad):
        if p.requires_grad: froze+=1
        p.requires_grad_(False)
log(f"froze={froze} trainable={sum(p.numel() for p in model.parameters() if p.requires_grad)/1e6:.1f}M")
def split_row(ex):
    msgs=ex.get("messages")
    if msgs:
        if isinstance(msgs,str): msgs=json.loads(msgs)
        la=None
        for i in range(len(msgs)-1,-1,-1):
            if msgs[i].get("role")=="assistant": la=i; break
        if la is not None:
            return tokenizer.apply_chat_template(msgs[:la],tokenize=False,add_generation_prompt=True),str(msgs[la].get("content","")),False
        return "",tokenizer.apply_chat_template(msgs,tokenize=False,add_generation_prompt=False),True
    p=ex.get("prompt") or ex.get("instruction") or ex.get("input"); c=ex.get("completion") or ex.get("output") or ex.get("response")
    if p is not None and c is not None:
        return tokenizer.apply_chat_template([{"role":"system","content":SYS},{"role":"user","content":str(p)}],tokenize=False,add_generation_prompt=True),str(c),False
    return "",str(ex.get("text") or ""),True
def tok_one(ex):
    p,c,ft=split_row(ex)
    if ft:
        ids=tokenizer(c,add_special_tokens=False)["input_ids"][:MAX_LEN]; labels=ids.copy()
    else:
        pids=tokenizer(p,add_special_tokens=False)["input_ids"]; cids=tokenizer(c,add_special_tokens=False)["input_ids"]+[tokenizer.eos_token_id]
        if len(pids)+len(cids)>MAX_LEN:
            kp=max(0,MAX_LEN-len(cids)); pids=pids[-kp:] if kp else []; cids=cids[:MAX_LEN-len(pids)]
        ids=pids+cids; labels=[-100]*len(pids)+cids
    return {"input_ids":ids,"labels":labels,"attention_mask":[1]*len(ids),"n_tokens":len(ids)}
class PadCollator:
    def __init__(self,tk): self.tk=tk
    def __call__(self,fts):
        ml=max(len(f["input_ids"]) for f in fts); pid=self.tk.pad_token_id
        ii,ll,am=[],[],[]
        for f in fts:
            n=len(f["input_ids"]); pad=ml-n
            ii.append(f["input_ids"]+[pid]*pad); ll.append(f["labels"]+[-100]*pad); am.append(f["attention_mask"]+[0]*pad)
        return {"input_ids":torch.tensor(ii),"labels":torch.tensor(ll),"attention_mask":torch.tensor(am)}
log("loading dataset")
ds=load_dataset("json",data_files={"train":DATA_PATH})["train"]
ds=ds.map(tok_one,remove_columns=ds.column_names,desc="tok")
ds=ds.filter(lambda x: len(x["input_ids"])>0 and any(v!=-100 for v in x["labels"]),desc="flt")
log(f"dataset rows={len(ds)} avg_tokens={sum(ds['n_tokens'])/max(1,len(ds)):.1f}")
WDIR="/tmp/worker"; JOBS=WDIR+"/jobs"; RES=WDIR+"/results"; os.makedirs(JOBS,exist_ok=True); os.makedirs(RES,exist_ok=True)
VALID={f.name for f in dataclasses.fields(TrainingArguments)}
def ready_ids(): return sorted(int(Path(p).stem) for p in glob.glob(JOBS+"/*.ready"))
last=max(ready_ids(),default=0); dev=torch.device(f"cuda:{local_rank}")
class StopCB(TrainerCallback):
    def __init__(self,jid): self.fl=[WDIR+"/STOP",WDIR+f"/STOP_{jid}"]
    def on_step_end(self,a,s,c,**k):
        loc=1.0 if any(os.path.exists(f) for f in self.fl) else 0.0
        if dist.is_initialized():
            t=torch.tensor([loc],device=dev); dist.all_reduce(t,op=dist.ReduceOp.MAX); loc=t.item()
        if loc>0: c.should_training_stop=True
        return c
log(f"WORKER READY (resident v5) last_job={last} world={torch.cuda.device_count()}")
while True:
    todo=[i for i in ready_ids() if i>last]
    if not todo: time.sleep(2); continue
    jid=todo[0]
    try: spec=json.load(open(JOBS+f"/{jid}.json"))
    except Exception: time.sleep(1); continue
    BATCH=int(spec.get("batch",16)); GACC=int(spec.get("grad_acc",1)); STEPS=int(spec.get("max_steps",20))
    LR=float(spec.get("lr",7e-5)); OUT=spec.get("out_dir",f"/tmp/gemma4_job_{jid}"); SAVE=bool(spec.get("save",False)); SS=int(spec.get("save_steps",50))
    SAMP=spec.get("sampling","group_by_length"); STATIC=bool(spec.get("static_graph",False)); NEF=spec.get("neftune",None); WK=int(spec.get("workers",4))
    logf=JOBS+f"/{jid}.log"
    def jlog(x):
        if rank==0:
            open(logf,"a").write(f"[{time.strftime('%H:%M:%S')}] {x}\n"); print(f"[job{jid}] {x}",flush=True)
    class LogCB(TrainerCallback):
        def on_log(self,a,s,c,logs=None,**k):
            if rank==0 and logs:
                d={kk:(round(vv,4) if isinstance(vv,float) else vv) for kk,vv in logs.items()}; d["step"]=s.global_step; jlog(json.dumps(d))
            return c
    kw=dict(output_dir=OUT,bf16=True,tf32=True,per_device_train_batch_size=BATCH,gradient_accumulation_steps=GACC,max_steps=STEPS,learning_rate=LR,warmup_ratio=0.03,lr_scheduler_type="cosine",optim="adamw_torch_fused",logging_steps=1,save_steps=(SS if SAVE else 10**9),save_total_limit=2,report_to="none",remove_unused_columns=False,ddp_find_unused_parameters=False,dataloader_num_workers=WK,dataloader_persistent_workers=(WK>0),train_sampling_strategy=SAMP,length_column_name="n_tokens",ddp_static_graph=STATIC)
    if NEF: kw["neftune_noise_alpha"]=float(NEF)
    kw={k:v for k,v in kw.items() if k in VALID}
    torch.cuda.reset_peak_memory_stats()
    jlog(f"START batch={BATCH} steps={STEPS} lr={LR} sampling={SAMP} static_graph={STATIC} neftune={NEF} workers={WK} out={OUT} save={SAVE}")
    tt=time.time()
    try:
        args=TrainingArguments(**kw)
        tr=Trainer(model=model,args=args,train_dataset=ds,data_collator=PadCollator(tokenizer),callbacks=[StopCB(jid),LogCB()])
        res=tr.train(); secs=time.time()-tt
        if rank==0:
            if SAVE: tr.save_model(OUT); tokenizer.save_pretrained(OUT)
            vram=torch.cuda.max_memory_allocated()/1024**3
            sps=res.metrics.get("train_samples_per_second")
            summ={"job":jid,"steps":res.global_step,"train_seconds":round(secs,1),"loss":round(res.training_loss,4),"max_vram_gb":round(vram,1),"samples_per_second":sps,"sampling":SAMP,"batch":BATCH,"static_graph":STATIC,"out_dir":OUT,"saved":SAVE}
            json.dump(summ,open(RES+f"/{jid}.done","w"),indent=2); jlog("DONE "+json.dumps(summ))
    except Exception as e:
        import traceback
        if rank==0:
            json.dump({"job":jid,"error":repr(e)},open(RES+f"/{jid}.done","w")); jlog("ERROR "+repr(e)); open(logf,"a").write(traceback.format_exc())
    if dist.is_initialized(): dist.barrier()
    for f in [WDIR+"/STOP",WDIR+f"/STOP_{jid}"]:
        if os.path.exists(f):
            try: os.remove(f)
            except: pass
    last=jid
'''
os.makedirs('/tmp/worker',exist_ok=True)
for d in ['jobs','results']:
    for f in __import__('glob').glob(f'/tmp/worker/{d}/*'):
        try: os.remove(f)
        except: pass
for f in __import__('glob').glob('/tmp/worker/STOP*'):
    try: os.remove(f)
    except: pass
open('/tmp/worker_server_v5.py','w').write(SERVER)
env=dict(os.environ); env.update({'MODEL_DIR':'/tmp/google_gemma4_e4b_model','DATA_PATH':'/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/train.jsonl','MAX_LEN':'2048','LORA_R':'64','LORA_ALPHA':'128','HF_HUB_OFFLINE':'1','TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE':'1','PYTHONUNBUFFERED':'1'})
LOG='/tmp/worker/server.log'; open(LOG,'w').close()
cmd=[sys.executable,'-m','torch.distributed.run','--standalone','--nproc_per_node=2','/tmp/worker_server_v5.py']
proc=subprocess.Popen(cmd,env=env,stdout=open(LOG,'a'),stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,text=True,start_new_session=True)
open('/tmp/worker/server.pid','w').write(str(proc.pid))
print(ts(),'worker v5 launched pid',proc.pid,'| waiting READY...',flush=True)
pos=0; ready=False; deadline=time.time()+540
while time.time()<deadline:
    if proc.poll() is not None: print(ts(),'EXITED rc=',proc.returncode,flush=True); break
    with open(LOG) as f: f.seek(pos); new=f.read(); pos=f.tell()
    for ln in new.splitlines():
        if re.search(r'READY|froze=|dataset rows=|loading|Error|Traceback|OutOfMemory|warn', ln): print(ts(), ln[:200], flush=True)
        if 'WORKER READY' in ln: ready=True
    if ready: break
    time.sleep(2)
print(ts(),'READY' if ready else 'NOT READY',flush=True)

Python[INTROSPECT2] train_sampling_strategy default + allowed values[4]

  
import subprocess, sys, datetime
def ts(): return '['+datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%H:%M:%S')+']'
code=r'''
import dataclasses, typing
from transformers import TrainingArguments
for f in dataclasses.fields(TrainingArguments):
    if f.name in ("train_sampling_strategy","length_column_name"):
        print(f.name,"| default=",repr(f.default),"| type=",f.type)
# try to find Literal options in source
import inspect,re
src=inspect.getsource(TrainingArguments)
for ln in src.splitlines():
    if "train_sampling_strategy" in ln and ("Literal" in ln or ":" in ln):
        print("DECL:",ln.strip()[:200])
'''
p=subprocess.run([sys.executable,'-c',code],capture_output=True,text=True)
print(ts(),p.stdout or p.stderr[-1200:], flush=True)

  
[13:30:28] train_sampling_strategy | default= 'random' | type= <class 'str'>
length_column_name | default= 'length' | type= <class 'str'>
DECL: train_sampling_strategy (`str`, *optional*, defaults to `"random"`):
DECL: train_sampling_strategy: str = field(
DECL: "help": "Column name for precomputed lengths. Ignored unless `train_sampling_strategy` is 'group_by_length'."







  
Python[WORKER-SWEEP v5] random vs group_by_length vs +static_graph (batch16, samples/s)[5]

  
# [WORKER-SWEEP v5] So sanh cong bang batch16 20step: padding reduction co tang samples/s that khong.
CONFIGS=[
  dict(tag='random',           batch=16, max_steps=20, sampling='random'),
  dict(tag='group_by_length',  batch=16, max_steps=20, sampling='group_by_length'),
  dict(tag='grouplen+static',  batch=16, max_steps=20, sampling='group_by_length', static_graph=True),
]
import os, glob, json, time, datetime
t0=time.time()
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")} +{time.time()-t0:6.1f}s]'
WDIR='/tmp/worker'; JOBS=WDIR+'/jobs'; RES=WDIR+'/results'
rows=[]
for cfg in CONFIGS:
    ids=[int(os.path.basename(p)[:-5]) for p in glob.glob(JOBS+'/*.json')]
    jid=(max(ids)+1) if ids else 1
    spec=dict(batch=cfg['batch'],grad_acc=1,max_steps=cfg['max_steps'],lr=7e-5,out_dir=f'/tmp/gemma4_v5_{cfg["tag"]}',save=False,save_steps=10**9,sampling=cfg['sampling'],static_graph=cfg.get('static_graph',False),workers=4)
    json.dump(spec,open(JOBS+f'/{jid}.json','w')); open(JOBS+f'/{jid}.ready','w').close()
    print(ts(),f"--- {cfg['tag']} (job {jid}) ---", flush=True)
    logf=JOBS+f'/{jid}.log'; donef=RES+f'/{jid}.done'; pos=0
    while True:
        if os.path.exists(logf):
            with open(logf) as f: f.seek(pos); new=f.read(); pos=f.tell()
            for ln in new.splitlines():
                if 'START' in ln or 'ERROR' in ln or 'DONE' in ln or '"step": 20' in ln: print(ts(), ln[-150:], flush=True)
        if os.path.exists(donef):
            s=json.load(open(donef))
            if 'error' in s: print(ts(),'ERROR',cfg['tag'],s['error'][:140]); rows.append((cfg['tag'],'ERR','ERR','ERR')); break
            rows.append((cfg['tag'],s.get('samples_per_second'),s['max_vram_gb'],s['loss']))
            print(ts(),f"OK {cfg['tag']}: samples/s={s.get('samples_per_second')} VRAM={s['max_vram_gb']}GB loss={s['loss']}", flush=True)
            break
        time.sleep(1)
print('\n'+ts(),'===== COMPARE (batch16, 20 step) =====', flush=True)
print(f"  {'config':18} {'samples/s':>10} {'VRAM_GB':>8} {'loss':>7}", flush=True)
for r in rows:
    print(f"  {r[0]:18} {str(r[1]):>10} {str(r[2]):>8} {str(r[3]):>7}", flush=True)

Python[WORKER-SWEEP v5b] group_by_length batch 24/32/40 (find max throughput, OOM-safe)[6]

  
# [WORKER-SWEEP v5b] group_by_length + tang batch de vat GPU. OOM-safe (dung neu loi).
BATCHES=[24,32,40]; STEPS=20
import os, glob, json, time, datetime
t0=time.time()
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")} +{time.time()-t0:6.1f}s]'
WDIR='/tmp/worker'; JOBS=WDIR+'/jobs'; RES=WDIR+'/results'
rows=[]
for b in BATCHES:
    ids=[int(os.path.basename(p)[:-5]) for p in glob.glob(JOBS+'/*.json')]
    jid=(max(ids)+1) if ids else 1
    spec=dict(batch=b,grad_acc=1,max_steps=STEPS,lr=7e-5,out_dir=f'/tmp/gemma4_v5b_b{b}',save=False,save_steps=10**9,sampling='group_by_length',static_graph=False,workers=4)
    json.dump(spec,open(JOBS+f'/{jid}.json','w')); open(JOBS+f'/{jid}.ready','w').close()
    print(ts(),f'--- group_by_length batch={b} (job {jid}) ---', flush=True)
    logf=JOBS+f'/{jid}.log'; donef=RES+f'/{jid}.done'; pos=0; err=False
    while True:
        if os.path.exists(logf):
            with open(logf) as f: f.seek(pos); new=f.read(); pos=f.tell()
            for ln in new.splitlines():
                if 'START' in ln or 'ERROR' in ln or 'DONE' in ln: print(ts(), ln[-150:], flush=True)
        if os.path.exists(donef):
            s=json.load(open(donef))
            if 'error' in s:
                print(ts(),'ERROR/OOM @batch',b,'->',s['error'][:140], flush=True); rows.append((b,'ERR','ERR','ERR')); err=True
            else:
                sps=s.get('samples_per_second'); toks=(sps or 0)*437.4
                rows.append((b,sps,s['max_vram_gb'],s['loss'])); print(ts(),f"OK batch={b} samples/s={sps} ~tok/s={int(toks)} VRAM={s['max_vram_gb']}GB loss={s['loss']}", flush=True)
            break
        time.sleep(1)
    if err: print(ts(),'STOP sweep (worker can can restart sau OOM).', flush=True); break
print('\n'+ts(),'===== group_by_length batch scaling =====', flush=True)
print(f"  {'batch':>5} {'samples/s':>10} {'~tok/s':>8} {'VRAM_GB':>8} {'loss':>7}", flush=True)
for r in rows:
    tk=int(r[1]*437.4) if isinstance(r[1],(int,float)) else 'ERR'
    print(f"  {r[0]:>5} {str(r[1]):>10} {str(tk):>8} {str(r[2]):>8} {str(r[3]):>7}", flush=True)

Python[TRAIN-REAL] group_by_length batch24 neftune5, ~3 epoch (312 steps), save[7]

  
# [TRAIN-REAL] Cau hinh toi uu: group_by_length + batch24 + neftune=5, ~3 epoch (312 step), luu checkpoint.
# Stream moi ~10 step + moc luu + summary. INTERRUPT chi dung xem (job van chay); dung han = [WORKER-STOP].
JOB = dict(batch=24, grad_acc=1, max_steps=312, lr=7e-5,
           out_dir='/tmp/gemma4_final_run', save=True, save_steps=100,
           sampling='group_by_length', static_graph=False, neftune=5, workers=4)
import os, glob, json, time, datetime, re
t0=time.time()
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")} +{time.time()-t0:6.1f}s]'
WDIR='/tmp/worker'; JOBS=WDIR+'/jobs'; RES=WDIR+'/results'
if not os.path.exists(WDIR+'/server.pid'): print('worker chua chay -> chay [WORKER-START v5]'); raise SystemExit
ids=[int(os.path.basename(p)[:-5]) for p in glob.glob(JOBS+'/*.json')]
jid=(max(ids)+1) if ids else 1
json.dump(JOB,open(JOBS+f'/{jid}.json','w')); open(JOBS+f'/{jid}.ready','w').close()
print(ts(),f'submitted REAL job {jid}:',JOB, flush=True)
print(ts(),f'~3 epoch (4969 rows / {JOB["batch"]*2} per step = ~104 step/epoch). Stream every ~10 steps...', flush=True)
logf=JOBS+f'/{jid}.log'; donef=RES+f'/{jid}.done'; pos=0
def stepnum(ln):
    m=re.search(r'"step":\s*(\d+)', ln); return int(m.group(1)) if m else None
try:
    while True:
        if os.path.exists(logf):
            with open(logf) as f: f.seek(pos); new=f.read(); pos=f.tell()
            for ln in new.splitlines():
                sn=stepnum(ln)
                show = ('START' in ln) or ('DONE' in ln) or ('ERROR' in ln) or ('train_runtime' in ln)
                if sn is not None and (sn<=3 or sn%10==0): show=True
                if show: print(ts(), ln[-160:], flush=True)
        if os.path.exists(donef):
            print(ts(),'=== JOB DONE ===', flush=True); print(open(donef).read(), flush=True); break
        time.sleep(1)
except KeyboardInterrupt:
    print(ts(),'stopped watching (job van chay tren worker; dung han bang [WORKER-STOP]).', flush=True)

Python[SAVE-TO-STAGE] persist final adapter + latest checkpoint to stage[8]

  
# [SAVE-TO-STAGE] Day adapter cuoi + checkpoint moi nhat len stage (giu duoc sau suspend). Stream.
import os, glob, time, datetime
from snowflake.snowpark.context import get_active_session
session=get_active_session(); t0=time.time()
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")} +{time.time()-t0:6.1f}s]'
OUT='/tmp/gemma4_final_run'; STAGE='@ML_DB.MODELS.FUZZ_DATASET_STAGE/gemma4_final_run_20260606'
print(ts(),'out_dir contents:', flush=True)
for p in sorted(glob.glob(OUT+'/*')): print('   ', os.path.basename(p), '(dir)' if os.path.isdir(p) else f"{os.path.getsize(p)//1024}KB", flush=True)
# 1) adapter top-level files -> /adapter
top=[p for p in glob.glob(OUT+'/*') if os.path.isfile(p)]
print(ts(),f'PUT {len(top)} adapter files -> {STAGE}/adapter/', flush=True)
for p in top:
    session.file.put(p, STAGE+'/adapter/', auto_compress=False, overwrite=True)
# 2) latest checkpoint dir -> /checkpoint
cks=sorted(glob.glob(OUT+'/checkpoint-*'), key=lambda x:int(x.split('-')[-1]))
if cks:
    ck=cks[-1]; cn=os.path.basename(ck)
    files=[p for p in glob.glob(ck+'/*') if os.path.isfile(p)]
    print(ts(),f'PUT {len(files)} files from {cn} -> {STAGE}/{cn}/', flush=True)
    for p in files:
        session.file.put(p, f'{STAGE}/{cn}/', auto_compress=False, overwrite=True)
print(ts(),'verify on stage:', flush=True)
r=session.sql(f"LIST {STAGE}").collect()
for row in r[:50]: print('   ', row[0], row[1], flush=True)
print(ts(),f'DONE -> {STAGE}', flush=True)

Python[INTROSPECT3] eval-related TrainingArguments params + dataset files[9]

  
import subprocess, sys, glob, os, datetime
def ts(): return '['+datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%H:%M:%S')+']'
print(ts(),'dataset dir:', flush=True)
for p in sorted(glob.glob('/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/*')): print('   ',os.path.basename(p), os.path.getsize(p)//1024,'KB', flush=True)
code=r'''
import dataclasses
from transformers import TrainingArguments
F={f.name for f in dataclasses.fields(TrainingArguments)}
for w in ["eval_strategy","evaluation_strategy","eval_steps","per_device_eval_batch_size","load_best_model_at_end","metric_for_best_model","greater_is_better","eval_on_start","save_strategy","num_train_epochs","weight_decay","warmup_ratio","max_grad_norm"]:
    print(("OK  " if w in F else "MISS"), w)
'''
p=subprocess.run([sys.executable,'-c',code],capture_output=True,text=True)
print(ts(),p.stdout or p.stderr[-800:], flush=True)

Python[WORKER-START v6] quality: MAX_LEN=4096 r=128 a=256 + eval set + group_by_length[10]

  
# [WORKER-START v6] Chat luong: MAX_LEN=4096, r=128/alpha=256, nap train+eval, eval-monitor + load_best.
import os, sys, time, datetime, subprocess, re
t0=time.time()
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")} +{time.time()-t0:6.1f}s]'
def sh(c): return subprocess.run(c,shell=True,capture_output=True,text=True).stdout
sh('pkill -9 -f worker_server'); sh('pkill -9 -f torch.distributed.run'); time.sleep(3)
SERVER = r'''
import os, sys, json, time, glob, dataclasses
from pathlib import Path
os.environ.setdefault("HF_HUB_OFFLINE","1"); os.environ.setdefault("TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE","1")
os.environ.setdefault("PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF","expandable_segments:True")
os.environ.setdefault("TOKENIZERS_PARALLELISM","false")
import torch, torch.distributed as dist
from datasets import load_dataset
from transformers import Trainer, TrainingArguments, TrainerCallback
import unsloth
try:
    import unsloth_zoo.temporary_patches.gemma4 as g4patch
    if hasattr(g4patch,"_Gemma4KVSharedSafeProxy"):
        def _pt(self,name): return getattr(object.__getattribute__(self,"_real"),name)
        g4patch._Gemma4KVSharedSafeProxy.__getattr__=_pt
except Exception as e:
    print("proxy warn",repr(e),flush=True)
from unsloth import FastLanguageModel
MODEL_DIR=os.environ.get("MODEL_DIR","/tmp/google_gemma4_e4b_model")
DATA_PATH=os.environ.get("DATA_PATH","/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/train.jsonl")
EVAL_PATH=os.environ.get("EVAL_PATH","/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/eval.jsonl")
MAX_LEN=int(os.environ.get("MAX_LEN","4096")); LORA_R=int(os.environ.get("LORA_R","128")); LORA_ALPHA=int(os.environ.get("LORA_ALPHA","256"))
SYS=os.environ.get("SYSTEM_PROMPT","You are an assistant for defensive fuzzing of PyTorch/TensorFlow APIs.")
rank=int(os.environ.get("RANK","0")); local_rank=int(os.environ.get("LOCAL_RANK","0"))
if torch.cuda.is_available(): torch.cuda.set_device(local_rank)
def log(x):
    if rank==0: print(f"[{time.strftime('%H:%M:%S')}] {x}",flush=True)
log(f"v6 loading model max_len={MAX_LEN} r={LORA_R} a={LORA_ALPHA}")
model,tokenizer=FastLanguageModel.from_pretrained(model_name=MODEL_DIR,max_seq_length=MAX_LEN,load_in_4bit=False,load_in_16bit=True,full_finetuning=False,local_files_only=True)
tokenizer=getattr(tokenizer,"tokenizer",tokenizer)
if tokenizer.pad_token is None: tokenizer.pad_token=tokenizer.eos_token
model=FastLanguageModel.get_peft_model(model,r=LORA_R,target_modules=["q_proj","k_proj","v_proj","o_proj","gate_proj","up_proj","down_proj"],lora_alpha=LORA_ALPHA,lora_dropout=0.0,bias="none",use_rslora=True,use_gradient_checkpointing="unsloth")
bad=["vision_tower","audio_tower","embed_vision","embed_audio"]; froze=0
for n,p in model.named_parameters():
    if any(k in n for k in bad):
        if p.requires_grad: froze+=1
        p.requires_grad_(False)
log(f"froze={froze} trainable={sum(p.numel() for p in model.parameters() if p.requires_grad)/1e6:.1f}M")
def split_row(ex):
    msgs=ex.get("messages")
    if msgs:
        if isinstance(msgs,str): msgs=json.loads(msgs)
        la=None
        for i in range(len(msgs)-1,-1,-1):
            if msgs[i].get("role")=="assistant": la=i; break
        if la is not None:
            return tokenizer.apply_chat_template(msgs[:la],tokenize=False,add_generation_prompt=True),str(msgs[la].get("content","")),False
        return "",tokenizer.apply_chat_template(msgs,tokenize=False,add_generation_prompt=False),True
    p=ex.get("prompt") or ex.get("instruction") or ex.get("input"); c=ex.get("completion") or ex.get("output") or ex.get("response")
    if p is not None and c is not None:
        return tokenizer.apply_chat_template([{"role":"system","content":SYS},{"role":"user","content":str(p)}],tokenize=False,add_generation_prompt=True),str(c),False
    return "",str(ex.get("text") or ""),True
def tok_one(ex):
    p,c,ft=split_row(ex)
    if ft:
        ids=tokenizer(c,add_special_tokens=False)["input_ids"][:MAX_LEN]; labels=ids.copy()
    else:
        pids=tokenizer(p,add_special_tokens=False)["input_ids"]; cids=tokenizer(c,add_special_tokens=False)["input_ids"]+[tokenizer.eos_token_id]
        if len(pids)+len(cids)>MAX_LEN:
            kp=max(0,MAX_LEN-len(cids)); pids=pids[-kp:] if kp else []; cids=cids[:MAX_LEN-len(pids)]
        ids=pids+cids; labels=[-100]*len(pids)+cids
    return {"input_ids":ids,"labels":labels,"attention_mask":[1]*len(ids),"n_tokens":len(ids)}
class PadCollator:
    def __init__(self,tk): self.tk=tk
    def __call__(self,fts):
        ml=max(len(f["input_ids"]) for f in fts); pid=self.tk.pad_token_id
        ii,ll,am=[],[],[]
        for f in fts:
            n=len(f["input_ids"]); pad=ml-n
            ii.append(f["input_ids"]+[pid]*pad); ll.append(f["labels"]+[-100]*pad); am.append(f["attention_mask"]+[0]*pad)
        return {"input_ids":torch.tensor(ii),"labels":torch.tensor(ll),"attention_mask":torch.tensor(am)}
def build(path):
    d=load_dataset("json",data_files={"x":path})["x"]
    d=d.map(tok_one,remove_columns=d.column_names,desc="tok")
    return d.filter(lambda x: len(x["input_ids"])>0 and any(v!=-100 for v in x["labels"]),desc="flt")
log("loading datasets (train+eval)")
ds=build(DATA_PATH); eval_ds=build(EVAL_PATH) if os.path.exists(EVAL_PATH) else None
log(f"train={len(ds)} eval={len(eval_ds) if eval_ds else 0} avg_tok={sum(ds['n_tokens'])/max(1,len(ds)):.1f}")
WDIR="/tmp/worker"; JOBS=WDIR+"/jobs"; RES=WDIR+"/results"; os.makedirs(JOBS,exist_ok=True); os.makedirs(RES,exist_ok=True)
VALID={f.name for f in dataclasses.fields(TrainingArguments)}
def ready_ids(): return sorted(int(Path(p).stem) for p in glob.glob(JOBS+"/*.ready"))
last=max(ready_ids(),default=0); dev=torch.device(f"cuda:{local_rank}")
class StopCB(TrainerCallback):
    def __init__(self,jid): self.fl=[WDIR+"/STOP",WDIR+f"/STOP_{jid}"]
    def on_step_end(self,a,s,c,**k):
        loc=1.0 if any(os.path.exists(f) for f in self.fl) else 0.0
        if dist.is_initialized():
            t=torch.tensor([loc],device=dev); dist.all_reduce(t,op=dist.ReduceOp.MAX); loc=t.item()
        if loc>0: c.should_training_stop=True
        return c
log(f"WORKER READY (resident v6) last_job={last} world={torch.cuda.device_count()}")
while True:
    todo=[i for i in ready_ids() if i>last]
    if not todo: time.sleep(2); continue
    jid=todo[0]
    try: spec=json.load(open(JOBS+f"/{jid}.json"))
    except Exception: time.sleep(1); continue
    BATCH=int(spec.get("batch",8)); GACC=int(spec.get("grad_acc",2)); LR=float(spec.get("lr",5e-5))
    OUT=spec.get("out_dir",f"/tmp/gemma4_job_{jid}"); SAVE=bool(spec.get("save",True)); EVST=int(spec.get("eval_steps",50))
    EPOCHS=spec.get("epochs",None); STEPS=int(spec.get("max_steps",-1)); SAMP=spec.get("sampling","group_by_length")
    NEF=spec.get("neftune",5); WK=int(spec.get("workers",4)); WD=float(spec.get("weight_decay",0.01)); EVB=int(spec.get("eval_batch",4))
    logf=JOBS+f"/{jid}.log"
    def jlog(x):
        if rank==0:
            open(logf,"a").write(f"[{time.strftime('%H:%M:%S')}] {x}\n"); print(f"[job{jid}] {x}",flush=True)
    class LogCB(TrainerCallback):
        def on_log(self,a,s,c,logs=None,**k):
            if rank==0 and logs:
                d={kk:(round(vv,4) if isinstance(vv,float) else vv) for kk,vv in logs.items()}; d["step"]=s.global_step; jlog(json.dumps(d))
            return c
    kw=dict(output_dir=OUT,bf16=True,tf32=True,per_device_train_batch_size=BATCH,gradient_accumulation_steps=GACC,learning_rate=LR,warmup_ratio=0.05,weight_decay=WD,max_grad_norm=1.0,lr_scheduler_type="cosine",optim="adamw_torch_fused",logging_steps=2,report_to="none",remove_unused_columns=False,ddp_find_unused_parameters=False,dataloader_num_workers=WK,dataloader_persistent_workers=(WK>0),train_sampling_strategy=SAMP,length_column_name="n_tokens")
    if EPOCHS is not None: kw["num_train_epochs"]=float(EPOCHS)
    else: kw["max_steps"]=STEPS
    if NEF: kw["neftune_noise_alpha"]=float(NEF)
    if eval_ds is not None:
        kw.update(eval_strategy="steps",eval_steps=EVST,per_device_eval_batch_size=EVB,save_strategy="steps",save_steps=EVST,save_total_limit=2,load_best_model_at_end=True,metric_for_best_model="eval_loss",greater_is_better=False)
    elif SAVE:
        kw.update(save_strategy="steps",save_steps=EVST,save_total_limit=2)
    kw={k:v for k,v in kw.items() if k in VALID}
    torch.cuda.reset_peak_memory_stats()
    jlog(f"START batch={BATCH} gacc={GACC} epochs={EPOCHS} steps={STEPS} lr={LR} sampling={SAMP} neftune={NEF} eval={'yes' if eval_ds else 'no'}")
    tt=time.time()
    try:
        args=TrainingArguments(**kw)
        tr=Trainer(model=model,args=args,train_dataset=ds,eval_dataset=eval_ds,data_collator=PadCollator(tokenizer),callbacks=[StopCB(jid),LogCB()])
        res=tr.train(); secs=time.time()-tt
        if rank==0:
            ev=tr.evaluate() if eval_ds is not None else {}
            if SAVE: tr.save_model(OUT); tokenizer.save_pretrained(OUT)
            vram=torch.cuda.max_memory_allocated()/1024**3
            summ={"job":jid,"steps":res.global_step,"train_seconds":round(secs,1),"train_loss":round(res.training_loss,4),"eval_loss":round(ev.get("eval_loss",float("nan")),4) if ev else None,"max_vram_gb":round(vram,1),"samples_per_second":res.metrics.get("train_samples_per_second"),"batch":BATCH,"r":LORA_R,"max_len":MAX_LEN,"out_dir":OUT}
            json.dump(summ,open(RES+f"/{jid}.done","w"),indent=2); jlog("DONE "+json.dumps(summ))
    except Exception as e:
        import traceback
        if rank==0:
            json.dump({"job":jid,"error":repr(e)},open(RES+f"/{jid}.done","w")); jlog("ERROR "+repr(e)); open(logf,"a").write(traceback.format_exc())
    if dist.is_initialized(): dist.barrier()
    for f in [WDIR+"/STOP",WDIR+f"/STOP_{jid}"]:
        if os.path.exists(f):
            try: os.remove(f)
            except: pass
    last=jid
'''
import glob as _g
os.makedirs('/tmp/worker',exist_ok=True)
for d in ['jobs','results']:
    for f in _g.glob(f'/tmp/worker/{d}/*'):
        try: os.remove(f)
        except: pass
for f in _g.glob('/tmp/worker/STOP*'):
    try: os.remove(f)
    except: pass
open('/tmp/worker_server_v6.py','w').write(SERVER)
env=dict(os.environ); env.update({'MODEL_DIR':'/tmp/google_gemma4_e4b_model','DATA_PATH':'/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/train.jsonl','EVAL_PATH':'/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/eval.jsonl','MAX_LEN':'4096','LORA_R':'128','LORA_ALPHA':'256','HF_HUB_OFFLINE':'1','TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE':'1','PYTHONUNBUFFERED':'1'})
LOG='/tmp/worker/server.log'; open(LOG,'w').close()
cmd=[sys.executable,'-m','torch.distributed.run','--standalone','--nproc_per_node=2','/tmp/worker_server_v6.py']
proc=subprocess.Popen(cmd,env=env,stdout=open(LOG,'a'),stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,text=True,start_new_session=True)
open('/tmp/worker/server.pid','w').write(str(proc.pid))
print(ts(),'worker v6 launched pid',proc.pid,'| MAX_LEN=4096 r=128 | waiting READY (~3-5min)...',flush=True)
pos=0; ready=False; deadline=time.time()+600
while time.time()<deadline:
    if proc.poll() is not None: print(ts(),'EXITED rc=',proc.returncode,flush=True); break
    with open(LOG) as f: f.seek(pos); new=f.read(); pos=f.tell()
    for ln in new.splitlines():
        if re.search(r'READY|froze=|train=|loading|Error|Traceback|OutOfMemory|warn', ln): print(ts(), ln[:200], flush=True)
        if 'WORKER READY' in ln: ready=True
    if ready: break
    time.sleep(2)
print(ts(),'READY' if ready else 'NOT READY',flush=True)
