Python[TRAIN-QUALITY] 4096/r128/neftune, 4 epoch, eval+load_best (stream)[11]

  
# [TRAIN-QUALITY] MAX_LEN=4096 r128 a256, batch8 x grad_acc2 (eff32), 4 epoch, eval/50 + load_best.
JOB = dict(batch=8, grad_acc=2, epochs=4, lr=5e-5, eval_steps=50, eval_batch=4,
           weight_decay=0.01, neftune=5, sampling='group_by_length', workers=4,
           out_dir='/tmp/gemma4_quality_run', save=True)
import os, glob, json, time, datetime, re
t0=time.time()
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")} +{time.time()-t0:6.1f}s]'
WDIR='/tmp/worker'; JOBS=WDIR+'/jobs'; RES=WDIR+'/results'
if not os.path.exists(WDIR+'/server.pid'): print('worker chua chay'); raise SystemExit
ids=[int(os.path.basename(p)[:-5]) for p in glob.glob(JOBS+'/*.json')]
jid=(max(ids)+1) if ids else 1
json.dump(JOB,open(JOBS+f'/{jid}.json','w')); open(JOBS+f'/{jid}.ready','w').close()
print(ts(),f'submitted QUALITY job {jid}:',JOB, flush=True)
print(ts(),'~4 epoch (4969/32 ~= 155 step/epoch -> ~620 step). eval moi 50 step. Stream...', flush=True)
logf=JOBS+f'/{jid}.log'; donef=RES+f'/{jid}.done'; pos=0
def stepnum(ln):
    m=re.search(r'"step":\s*(\d+)', ln); return int(m.group(1)) if m else None
try:
    while True:
        if os.path.exists(logf):
            with open(logf) as f: f.seek(pos); new=f.read(); pos=f.tell()
            for ln in new.splitlines():
                show=('START' in ln) or ('DONE' in ln) or ('ERROR' in ln) or ('eval_loss' in ln) or ('train_runtime' in ln)
                sn=stepnum(ln)
                if sn is not None and (sn<=2 or sn%10==0): show=True
                if show: print(ts(), ln[-160:], flush=True)
        if os.path.exists(donef):
            print(ts(),'=== JOB DONE ===', flush=True); print(open(donef).read(), flush=True); break
        time.sleep(1)
except KeyboardInterrupt:
    print(ts(),'stopped watching (job van chay; dung han = [WORKER-STOP]).', flush=True)

import os, glob, json, subprocess, datetime
def ts(): return '['+datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%H:%M:%S')+']'
def sh(c): return subprocess.run(c,shell=True,capture_output=True,text=True).stdout
print(ts(),'results/*.done:', flush=True)
for p in sorted(glob.glob('/tmp/worker/results/*.done')):
    print('   ',os.path.basename(p),'=>',open(p).read()[:400], flush=True)
print(ts(),'worker pid alive?', sh('ps -p '+open('/tmp/worker/server.pid').read().strip()+' -o pid,etime,cmd --no-headers') or 'NOT RUNNING', flush=True)
print(ts(),'GPU:', flush=True); print(sh('nvidia-smi --query-gpu=index,memory.used,utilization.gpu --format=csv,noheader'), flush=True)
print(ts(),'server.log tail:', flush=True)
print(sh('tail -n 15 /tmp/worker/server.log'), flush=True)
print(ts(),'out_dir:', sh('ls -la /tmp/gemma4_quality_run 2>/dev/null') or 'none', flush=True)

import subprocess, time, datetime
def ts(): return '['+datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%H:%M:%S')+']'
def sh(c): return subprocess.run(c,shell=True,capture_output=True,text=True).stdout
sh('pkill -9 -f worker_server'); sh('pkill -9 -f torch.distributed.run'); time.sleep(5)
print(ts(),'after kill, GPU:', flush=True)
print(sh('nvidia-smi --query-gpu=index,memory.used,utilization.gpu --format=csv,noheader'), flush=True)
print(ts(),'saved checkpoints (overfit, ref only):', sh('ls /tmp/gemma4_quality_run 2>/dev/null') or 'none', flush=True)

# [SAVE-TO-STAGE v6] Day /tmp/gemma4_quality_run (checkpoint-400, -624) len stage de khoi mat khi suspend.
import os, glob, time, datetime
from snowflake.snowpark.context import get_active_session
session=get_active_session(); t0=time.time()
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")} +{time.time()-t0:6.1f}s]'
SRC='/tmp/gemma4_quality_run'; STAGE='@ML_DB.MODELS.FUZZ_DATASET_STAGE/gemma4_quality_run_v6_r128_4096_20260606'
if not os.path.isdir(SRC): print('khong thay',SRC); raise SystemExit
print(ts(),'source tree:', flush=True)
for d in sorted(glob.glob(SRC+'/*')):
    if os.path.isdir(d):
        tot=sum(os.path.getsize(f) for f in glob.glob(d+'/*') if os.path.isfile(f))
        print('   ',os.path.basename(d),f'({tot//1024//1024}MB)', flush=True)
    else:
        print('   ',os.path.basename(d), f'{os.path.getsize(d)//1024}KB', flush=True)
# PUT top-level files (neu co) + tung checkpoint dir
for p in [x for x in glob.glob(SRC+'/*') if os.path.isfile(x)]:
    session.file.put(p, STAGE+'/', auto_compress=False, overwrite=True)
for ck in sorted(glob.glob(SRC+'/checkpoint-*')):
    cn=os.path.basename(ck); files=[x for x in glob.glob(ck+'/*') if os.path.isfile(x)]
    print(ts(),f'PUT {len(files)} files -> {STAGE}/{cn}/', flush=True)
    for p in files:
        session.file.put(p, f'{STAGE}/{cn}/', auto_compress=False, overwrite=True)
print(ts(),'verify on stage:', flush=True)
for row in session.sql(f'LIST {STAGE}').collect()[:60]:
    print('   ',row[0], row[1], flush=True)
print(ts(),f'DONE -> {STAGE}', flush=True)

# [WORKER-START v7] Chong overfit: r64/2048 + lora_dropout, eval+EarlyStopping+load_best. Fix deadlock (khong evaluate() rank0-only).
import os, sys, time, datetime, subprocess, re
t0=time.time()
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")} +{time.time()-t0:6.1f}s]'
def sh(c): return subprocess.run(c,shell=True,capture_output=True,text=True).stdout
sh('pkill -9 -f worker_server'); sh('pkill -9 -f torch.distributed.run'); time.sleep(3)
SERVER = r'''
import os, sys, json, time, glob, dataclasses
from pathlib import Path
os.environ.setdefault("HF_HUB_OFFLINE","1"); os.environ.setdefault("TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE","1")
os.environ.setdefault("PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF","expandable_segments:True")
os.environ.setdefault("TOKENIZERS_PARALLELISM","false")
import torch, torch.distributed as dist
from datasets import load_dataset
from transformers import Trainer, TrainingArguments, TrainerCallback, EarlyStoppingCallback
import unsloth
try:
    import unsloth_zoo.temporary_patches.gemma4 as g4patch
    if hasattr(g4patch,"_Gemma4KVSharedSafeProxy"):
        def _pt(self,name): return getattr(object.__getattribute__(self,"_real"),name)
        g4patch._Gemma4KVSharedSafeProxy.__getattr__=_pt
except Exception as e:
    print("proxy warn",repr(e),flush=True)
from unsloth import FastLanguageModel
MODEL_DIR=os.environ.get("MODEL_DIR","/tmp/google_gemma4_e4b_model")
DATA_PATH=os.environ.get("DATA_PATH","/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/train.jsonl")
EVAL_PATH=os.environ.get("EVAL_PATH","/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/eval.jsonl")
MAX_LEN=int(os.environ.get("MAX_LEN","2048")); LORA_R=int(os.environ.get("LORA_R","64")); LORA_ALPHA=int(os.environ.get("LORA_ALPHA","128")); DROP=float(os.environ.get("LORA_DROPOUT","0.05"))
SYS=os.environ.get("SYSTEM_PROMPT","You are an assistant for defensive fuzzing of PyTorch/TensorFlow APIs.")
rank=int(os.environ.get("RANK","0")); local_rank=int(os.environ.get("LOCAL_RANK","0"))
if torch.cuda.is_available(): torch.cuda.set_device(local_rank)
def log(x):
    if rank==0: print(f"[{time.strftime('%H:%M:%S')}] {x}",flush=True)
log(f"v7 load max_len={MAX_LEN} r={LORA_R} a={LORA_ALPHA} dropout={DROP}")
model,tokenizer=FastLanguageModel.from_pretrained(model_name=MODEL_DIR,max_seq_length=MAX_LEN,load_in_4bit=False,load_in_16bit=True,full_finetuning=False,local_files_only=True)
tokenizer=getattr(tokenizer,"tokenizer",tokenizer)
if tokenizer.pad_token is None: tokenizer.pad_token=tokenizer.eos_token
model=FastLanguageModel.get_peft_model(model,r=LORA_R,target_modules=["q_proj","k_proj","v_proj","o_proj","gate_proj","up_proj","down_proj"],lora_alpha=LORA_ALPHA,lora_dropout=DROP,bias="none",use_rslora=True,use_gradient_checkpointing="unsloth")
bad=["vision_tower","audio_tower","embed_vision","embed_audio"]; froze=0
for n,p in model.named_parameters():
    if any(k in n for k in bad):
        if p.requires_grad: froze+=1
        p.requires_grad_(False)
log(f"froze={froze} trainable={sum(p.numel() for p in model.parameters() if p.requires_grad)/1e6:.1f}M")
def split_row(ex):
    msgs=ex.get("messages")
    if msgs:
        if isinstance(msgs,str): msgs=json.loads(msgs)
        la=None
        for i in range(len(msgs)-1,-1,-1):
            if msgs[i].get("role")=="assistant": la=i; break
        if la is not None:
            return tokenizer.apply_chat_template(msgs[:la],tokenize=False,add_generation_prompt=True),str(msgs[la].get("content","")),False
        return "",tokenizer.apply_chat_template(msgs,tokenize=False,add_generation_prompt=False),True
    p=ex.get("prompt") or ex.get("instruction") or ex.get("input"); c=ex.get("completion") or ex.get("output") or ex.get("response")
    if p is not None and c is not None:
        return tokenizer.apply_chat_template([{"role":"system","content":SYS},{"role":"user","content":str(p)}],tokenize=False,add_generation_prompt=True),str(c),False
    return "",str(ex.get("text") or ""),True
def tok_one(ex):
    p,c,ft=split_row(ex)
    if ft:
        ids=tokenizer(c,add_special_tokens=False)["input_ids"][:MAX_LEN]; labels=ids.copy()
    else:
        pids=tokenizer(p,add_special_tokens=False)["input_ids"]; cids=tokenizer(c,add_special_tokens=False)["input_ids"]+[tokenizer.eos_token_id]
        if len(pids)+len(cids)>MAX_LEN:
            kp=max(0,MAX_LEN-len(cids)); pids=pids[-kp:] if kp else []; cids=cids[:MAX_LEN-len(pids)]
        ids=pids+cids; labels=[-100]*len(pids)+cids
    return {"input_ids":ids,"labels":labels,"attention_mask":[1]*len(ids),"n_tokens":len(ids)}
class PadCollator:
    def __init__(self,tk): self.tk=tk
    def __call__(self,fts):
        ml=max(len(f["input_ids"]) for f in fts); pid=self.tk.pad_token_id
        ii,ll,am=[],[],[]
        for f in fts:
            n=len(f["input_ids"]); pad=ml-n
            ii.append(f["input_ids"]+[pid]*pad); ll.append(f["labels"]+[-100]*pad); am.append(f["attention_mask"]+[0]*pad)
        return {"input_ids":torch.tensor(ii),"labels":torch.tensor(ll),"attention_mask":torch.tensor(am)}
def build(path):
    d=load_dataset("json",data_files={"x":path})["x"]; d=d.map(tok_one,remove_columns=d.column_names,desc="tok")
    return d.filter(lambda x: len(x["input_ids"])>0 and any(v!=-100 for v in x["labels"]),desc="flt")
log("loading datasets")
ds=build(DATA_PATH); eval_ds=build(EVAL_PATH) if os.path.exists(EVAL_PATH) else None
log(f"train={len(ds)} eval={len(eval_ds) if eval_ds else 0}")
WDIR="/tmp/worker"; JOBS=WDIR+"/jobs"; RES=WDIR+"/results"; os.makedirs(JOBS,exist_ok=True); os.makedirs(RES,exist_ok=True)
VALID={f.name for f in dataclasses.fields(TrainingArguments)}
def ready_ids(): return sorted(int(Path(p).stem) for p in glob.glob(JOBS+"/*.ready"))
last=max(ready_ids(),default=0); dev=torch.device(f"cuda:{local_rank}")
class StopCB(TrainerCallback):
    def __init__(self,jid): self.fl=[WDIR+"/STOP",WDIR+f"/STOP_{jid}"]
    def on_step_end(self,a,s,c,**k):
        loc=1.0 if any(os.path.exists(f) for f in self.fl) else 0.0
        if dist.is_initialized():
            t=torch.tensor([loc],device=dev); dist.all_reduce(t,op=dist.ReduceOp.MAX); loc=t.item()
        if loc>0: c.should_training_stop=True
        return c
log(f"WORKER READY (resident v7) last_job={last} world={torch.cuda.device_count()}")
while True:
    todo=[i for i in ready_ids() if i>last]
    if not todo: time.sleep(2); continue
    jid=todo[0]
    try: spec=json.load(open(JOBS+f"/{jid}.json"))
    except Exception: time.sleep(1); continue
    BATCH=int(spec.get("batch",16)); GACC=int(spec.get("grad_acc",1)); LR=float(spec.get("lr",2e-5))
    OUT=spec.get("out_dir",f"/tmp/gemma4_job_{jid}"); EVST=int(spec.get("eval_steps",25))
    EPOCHS=spec.get("epochs",3); SAMP=spec.get("sampling","group_by_length"); NEF=spec.get("neftune",5)
    WK=int(spec.get("workers",4)); WD=float(spec.get("weight_decay",0.05)); EVB=int(spec.get("eval_batch",8)); PAT=int(spec.get("patience",3))
    logf=JOBS+f"/{jid}.log"
    def jlog(x):
        if rank==0:
            open(logf,"a").write(f"[{time.strftime('%H:%M:%S')}] {x}\n"); print(f"[job{jid}] {x}",flush=True)
    class LogCB(TrainerCallback):
        def on_log(self,a,s,c,logs=None,**k):
            if rank==0 and logs:
                d={kk:(round(vv,5) if isinstance(vv,float) else vv) for kk,vv in logs.items()}; d["step"]=s.global_step; jlog(json.dumps(d))
            return c
    kw=dict(output_dir=OUT,bf16=True,tf32=True,per_device_train_batch_size=BATCH,gradient_accumulation_steps=GACC,num_train_epochs=float(EPOCHS),learning_rate=LR,warmup_ratio=0.05,weight_decay=WD,max_grad_norm=1.0,lr_scheduler_type="cosine",optim="adamw_torch_fused",logging_steps=2,report_to="none",remove_unused_columns=False,ddp_find_unused_parameters=False,dataloader_num_workers=WK,dataloader_persistent_workers=(WK>0),train_sampling_strategy=SAMP,length_column_name="n_tokens")
    if NEF: kw["neftune_noise_alpha"]=float(NEF)
    cbs=[StopCB(jid),LogCB()]
    if eval_ds is not None:
        kw.update(eval_strategy="steps",eval_steps=EVST,per_device_eval_batch_size=EVB,save_strategy="steps",save_steps=EVST,save_total_limit=2,load_best_model_at_end=True,metric_for_best_model="eval_loss",greater_is_better=False)
        if PAT>0: cbs.append(EarlyStoppingCallback(early_stopping_patience=PAT))
    kw={k:v for k,v in kw.items() if k in VALID}
    torch.cuda.reset_peak_memory_stats()
    jlog(f"START batch={BATCH} epochs={EPOCHS} lr={LR} wd={WD} dropout={DROP} neftune={NEF} eval_steps={EVST} patience={PAT}")
    tt=time.time()
    try:
        args=TrainingArguments(**kw)
        tr=Trainer(model=model,args=args,train_dataset=ds,eval_dataset=eval_ds,data_collator=PadCollator(tokenizer),callbacks=cbs)
        res=tr.train(); secs=time.time()-tt
        tr.save_model(OUT)
        if rank==0: tokenizer.save_pretrained(OUT)
        if rank==0:
            best=getattr(tr.state,"best_metric",None); bestck=getattr(tr.state,"best_model_checkpoint",None)
            vram=torch.cuda.max_memory_allocated()/1024**3
            summ={"job":jid,"steps":res.global_step,"train_seconds":round(secs,1),"train_loss":round(res.training_loss,4),"best_eval_loss":round(best,4) if best else None,"best_ckpt":bestck,"max_vram_gb":round(vram,1),"r":LORA_R,"max_len":MAX_LEN,"epochs":EPOCHS,"lr":LR,"out_dir":OUT}
            json.dump(summ,open(RES+f"/{jid}.done","w"),indent=2); jlog("DONE "+json.dumps(summ))
    except Exception as e:
        import traceback
        if rank==0:
            json.dump({"job":jid,"error":repr(e)},open(RES+f"/{jid}.done","w")); jlog("ERROR "+repr(e)); open(logf,"a").write(traceback.format_exc())
    if dist.is_initialized(): dist.barrier()
    for f in [WDIR+"/STOP",WDIR+f"/STOP_{jid}"]:
        if os.path.exists(f):
            try: os.remove(f)
            except: pass
    last=jid
'''
import glob as _g
os.makedirs('/tmp/worker',exist_ok=True)
for d in ['jobs','results']:
    for f in _g.glob(f'/tmp/worker/{d}/*'):
        try: os.remove(f)
        except: pass
for f in _g.glob('/tmp/worker/STOP*'):
    try: os.remove(f)
    except: pass
open('/tmp/worker_server_v7.py','w').write(SERVER)
env=dict(os.environ); env.update({'MODEL_DIR':'/tmp/google_gemma4_e4b_model','DATA_PATH':'/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/train.jsonl','EVAL_PATH':'/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/eval.jsonl','MAX_LEN':'2048','LORA_R':'64','LORA_ALPHA':'128','LORA_DROPOUT':'0.05','HF_HUB_OFFLINE':'1','TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE':'1','PYTHONUNBUFFERED':'1'})
LOG='/tmp/worker/server.log'; open(LOG,'w').close()
cmd=[sys.executable,'-m','torch.distributed.run','--standalone','--nproc_per_node=2','/tmp/worker_server_v7.py']
proc=subprocess.Popen(cmd,env=env,stdout=open(LOG,'a'),stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,text=True,start_new_session=True)
open('/tmp/worker/server.pid','w').write(str(proc.pid))
print(ts(),'worker v7 launched pid',proc.pid,'| waiting READY (~3-4min)...',flush=True)
pos=0; ready=False; deadline=time.time()+540
while time.time()<deadline:
    if proc.poll() is not None: print(ts(),'EXITED rc=',proc.returncode,flush=True); break
    with open(LOG) as f: f.seek(pos); new=f.read(); pos=f.tell()
    for ln in new.splitlines():
        if re.search(r'READY|froze=|train=|loading|Error|Traceback|OutOfMemory|warn', ln): print(ts(), ln[:200], flush=True)
        if 'WORKER READY' in ln: ready=True
    if ready: break
    time.sleep(2)
print(ts(),'READY' if ready else 'NOT READY',flush=True)

Python[TRAIN-QUALITY v7] r64/2048 lr2e-5 wd0.05, eval/25 + EarlyStopping (stream)[16]

  
# [TRAIN-QUALITY v7] Chong overfit: r64/2048, lr2e-5, wd0.05, dropout0.05, eval/25 + EarlyStopping(pat=3), load_best.
JOB = dict(batch=16, grad_acc=1, epochs=3, lr=2e-5, weight_decay=0.05, eval_steps=25, eval_batch=8,
           patience=3, neftune=5, sampling='group_by_length', workers=4, out_dir='/tmp/gemma4_best_run')
import os, glob, json, time, datetime, re
t0=time.time()
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")} +{time.time()-t0:6.1f}s]'
WDIR='/tmp/worker'; JOBS=WDIR+'/jobs'; RES=WDIR+'/results'
if not os.path.exists(WDIR+'/server.pid'): print('worker chua chay'); raise SystemExit
ids=[int(os.path.basename(p)[:-5]) for p in glob.glob(JOBS+'/*.json')]
jid=(max(ids)+1) if ids else 1
json.dump(JOB,open(JOBS+f'/{jid}.json','w')); open(JOBS+f'/{jid}.ready','w').close()
print(ts(),f'submitted job {jid}:',JOB, flush=True)
print(ts(),'eval moi 25 step; EarlyStopping se dung khi eval_loss het giam. Stream (loss ~10 step + MOI eval_loss)...', flush=True)
logf=JOBS+f'/{jid}.log'; donef=RES+f'/{jid}.done'; pos=0
def sn(ln):
    m=re.search(r'"step":\s*(\d+)', ln); return int(m.group(1)) if m else None
try:
    while True:
        if os.path.exists(logf):
            with open(logf) as f: f.seek(pos); new=f.read(); pos=f.tell()
            for ln in new.splitlines():
                show=('START' in ln) or ('DONE' in ln) or ('ERROR' in ln) or ('eval_loss' in ln) or ('train_runtime' in ln)
                s=sn(ln)
                if s is not None and s%10==0: show=True
                if show: print(ts(), ln[-170:], flush=True)
        if os.path.exists(donef):
            print(ts(),'=== JOB DONE ===', flush=True); print(open(donef).read(), flush=True); break
        time.sleep(1)
except KeyboardInterrupt:
    print(ts(),'stopped watching (job van chay; dung han = [WORKER-STOP]).', flush=True)

Python[SAVE-TO-STAGE v7] persist BEST (eval-validated) adapter to stage[17]

  
# [SAVE-TO-STAGE v7] Day ban tot nhat (eval_loss 5.166 @ ckpt-125, da load_best) len stage.
import os, glob, time, datetime
from snowflake.snowpark.context import get_active_session
session=get_active_session(); t0=time.time()
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")} +{time.time()-t0:6.1f}s]'
SRC='/tmp/gemma4_best_run'; STAGE='@ML_DB.MODELS.FUZZ_DATASET_STAGE/gemma4_BEST_r64_2048_evalmin_20260606'
print(ts(),'top-level files (= best loaded adapter):', flush=True)
top=[p for p in glob.glob(SRC+'/*') if os.path.isfile(p)]
for p in top: print('   ',os.path.basename(p), os.path.getsize(p)//1024,'KB', flush=True)
print(ts(),f'PUT {len(top)} adapter files -> {STAGE}/adapter/', flush=True)
for p in top: session.file.put(p, STAGE+'/adapter/', auto_compress=False, overwrite=True)
# kem checkpoint-125 (best) de resume neu can
best=os.path.join(SRC,'checkpoint-125')
if os.path.isdir(best):
    files=[p for p in glob.glob(best+'/*') if os.path.isfile(p)]
    print(ts(),f'PUT {len(files)} files -> {STAGE}/checkpoint-125/', flush=True)
    for p in files: session.file.put(p, STAGE+'/checkpoint-125/', auto_compress=False, overwrite=True)
print(ts(),'verify:', flush=True)
for row in session.sql(f'LIST {STAGE}').collect()[:40]: print('   ',row[0], row[1], flush=True)
print(ts(),f'DONE -> {STAGE}', flush=True)

Python[WORKER-START v8] = v7 + adapter RESET per job (fair HP search)[18]

  
# [WORKER-START v8] Nhu v7 + reset LoRA ve init moi job (de moi cau hinh HP doc lap, khong train chong).
import os, sys, time, datetime, subprocess, re
t0=time.time()
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")} +{time.time()-t0:6.1f}s]'
def sh(c): return subprocess.run(c,shell=True,capture_output=True,text=True).stdout
sh('pkill -9 -f worker_server'); sh('pkill -9 -f torch.distributed.run'); time.sleep(3)
SERVER = r'''
import os, sys, json, time, glob, dataclasses
from pathlib import Path
os.environ.setdefault("HF_HUB_OFFLINE","1"); os.environ.setdefault("TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE","1")
os.environ.setdefault("PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF","expandable_segments:True")
os.environ.setdefault("TOKENIZERS_PARALLELISM","false")
import torch, torch.distributed as dist
from datasets import load_dataset
from transformers import Trainer, TrainingArguments, TrainerCallback, EarlyStoppingCallback
import unsloth
try:
    import unsloth_zoo.temporary_patches.gemma4 as g4patch
    if hasattr(g4patch,"_Gemma4KVSharedSafeProxy"):
        def _pt(self,name): return getattr(object.__getattribute__(self,"_real"),name)
        g4patch._Gemma4KVSharedSafeProxy.__getattr__=_pt
except Exception as e:
    print("proxy warn",repr(e),flush=True)
from unsloth import FastLanguageModel
MODEL_DIR=os.environ.get("MODEL_DIR","/tmp/google_gemma4_e4b_model")
DATA_PATH=os.environ.get("DATA_PATH","/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/train.jsonl")
EVAL_PATH=os.environ.get("EVAL_PATH","/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/eval.jsonl")
MAX_LEN=int(os.environ.get("MAX_LEN","2048")); LORA_R=int(os.environ.get("LORA_R","64")); LORA_ALPHA=int(os.environ.get("LORA_ALPHA","128")); DROP=float(os.environ.get("LORA_DROPOUT","0.05"))
SYS=os.environ.get("SYSTEM_PROMPT","You are an assistant for defensive fuzzing of PyTorch/TensorFlow APIs.")
rank=int(os.environ.get("RANK","0")); local_rank=int(os.environ.get("LOCAL_RANK","0"))
if torch.cuda.is_available(): torch.cuda.set_device(local_rank)
def log(x):
    if rank==0: print(f"[{time.strftime('%H:%M:%S')}] {x}",flush=True)
log(f"v8 load max_len={MAX_LEN} r={LORA_R} a={LORA_ALPHA} dropout={DROP}")
model,tokenizer=FastLanguageModel.from_pretrained(model_name=MODEL_DIR,max_seq_length=MAX_LEN,load_in_4bit=False,load_in_16bit=True,full_finetuning=False,local_files_only=True)
tokenizer=getattr(tokenizer,"tokenizer",tokenizer)
if tokenizer.pad_token is None: tokenizer.pad_token=tokenizer.eos_token
model=FastLanguageModel.get_peft_model(model,r=LORA_R,target_modules=["q_proj","k_proj","v_proj","o_proj","gate_proj","up_proj","down_proj"],lora_alpha=LORA_ALPHA,lora_dropout=DROP,bias="none",use_rslora=True,use_gradient_checkpointing="unsloth")
bad=["vision_tower","audio_tower","embed_vision","embed_audio"]; froze=0
for n,p in model.named_parameters():
    if any(k in n for k in bad):
        if p.requires_grad: froze+=1
        p.requires_grad_(False)
INIT={n:p.detach().clone() for n,p in model.named_parameters() if p.requires_grad}
log(f"froze={froze} trainable={sum(p.numel() for p in model.parameters() if p.requires_grad)/1e6:.1f}M init_saved={len(INIT)}")
def split_row(ex):
    msgs=ex.get("messages")
    if msgs:
        if isinstance(msgs,str): msgs=json.loads(msgs)
        la=None
        for i in range(len(msgs)-1,-1,-1):
            if msgs[i].get("role")=="assistant": la=i; break
        if la is not None:
            return tokenizer.apply_chat_template(msgs[:la],tokenize=False,add_generation_prompt=True),str(msgs[la].get("content","")),False
        return "",tokenizer.apply_chat_template(msgs,tokenize=False,add_generation_prompt=False),True
    p=ex.get("prompt") or ex.get("instruction") or ex.get("input"); c=ex.get("completion") or ex.get("output") or ex.get("response")
    if p is not None and c is not None:
        return tokenizer.apply_chat_template([{"role":"system","content":SYS},{"role":"user","content":str(p)}],tokenize=False,add_generation_prompt=True),str(c),False
    return "",str(ex.get("text") or ""),True
def tok_one(ex):
    p,c,ft=split_row(ex)
    if ft:
        ids=tokenizer(c,add_special_tokens=False)["input_ids"][:MAX_LEN]; labels=ids.copy()
    else:
        pids=tokenizer(p,add_special_tokens=False)["input_ids"]; cids=tokenizer(c,add_special_tokens=False)["input_ids"]+[tokenizer.eos_token_id]
        if len(pids)+len(cids)>MAX_LEN:
            kp=max(0,MAX_LEN-len(cids)); pids=pids[-kp:] if kp else []; cids=cids[:MAX_LEN-len(pids)]
        ids=pids+cids; labels=[-100]*len(pids)+cids
    return {"input_ids":ids,"labels":labels,"attention_mask":[1]*len(ids),"n_tokens":len(ids)}
class PadCollator:
    def __init__(self,tk): self.tk=tk
    def __call__(self,fts):
        ml=max(len(f["input_ids"]) for f in fts); pid=self.tk.pad_token_id
        ii,ll,am=[],[],[]
        for f in fts:
            n=len(f["input_ids"]); pad=ml-n
            ii.append(f["input_ids"]+[pid]*pad); ll.append(f["labels"]+[-100]*pad); am.append(f["attention_mask"]+[0]*pad)
        return {"input_ids":torch.tensor(ii),"labels":torch.tensor(ll),"attention_mask":torch.tensor(am)}
def build(path):
    d=load_dataset("json",data_files={"x":path})["x"]; d=d.map(tok_one,remove_columns=d.column_names,desc="tok")
    return d.filter(lambda x: len(x["input_ids"])>0 and any(v!=-100 for v in x["labels"]),desc="flt")
log("loading datasets")
ds=build(DATA_PATH); eval_ds=build(EVAL_PATH) if os.path.exists(EVAL_PATH) else None
log(f"train={len(ds)} eval={len(eval_ds) if eval_ds else 0}")
WDIR="/tmp/worker"; JOBS=WDIR+"/jobs"; RES=WDIR+"/results"; os.makedirs(JOBS,exist_ok=True); os.makedirs(RES,exist_ok=True)
VALID={f.name for f in dataclasses.fields(TrainingArguments)}
def ready_ids(): return sorted(int(Path(p).stem) for p in glob.glob(JOBS+"/*.ready"))
last=max(ready_ids(),default=0); dev=torch.device(f"cuda:{local_rank}")
class StopCB(TrainerCallback):
    def __init__(self,jid): self.fl=[WDIR+"/STOP",WDIR+f"/STOP_{jid}"]
    def on_step_end(self,a,s,c,**k):
        loc=1.0 if any(os.path.exists(f) for f in self.fl) else 0.0
        if dist.is_initialized():
            t=torch.tensor([loc],device=dev); dist.all_reduce(t,op=dist.ReduceOp.MAX); loc=t.item()
        if loc>0: c.should_training_stop=True
        return c
log(f"WORKER READY (resident v8) last_job={last} world={torch.cuda.device_count()}")
while True:
    todo=[i for i in ready_ids() if i>last]
    if not todo: time.sleep(2); continue
    jid=todo[0]
    try: spec=json.load(open(JOBS+f"/{jid}.json"))
    except Exception: time.sleep(1); continue
    BATCH=int(spec.get("batch",16)); GACC=int(spec.get("grad_acc",1)); LR=float(spec.get("lr",2e-5))
    OUT=spec.get("out_dir",f"/tmp/gemma4_job_{jid}"); EVST=int(spec.get("eval_steps",25))
    EPOCHS=spec.get("epochs",2); SAMP=spec.get("sampling","group_by_length"); NEF=spec.get("neftune",5)
    WK=int(spec.get("workers",4)); WD=float(spec.get("weight_decay",0.05)); EVB=int(spec.get("eval_batch",8)); PAT=int(spec.get("patience",3))
    WU=float(spec.get("warmup_ratio",0.05)); RESET=bool(spec.get("reset",True))
    logf=JOBS+f"/{jid}.log"
    def jlog(x):
        if rank==0:
            open(logf,"a").write(f"[{time.strftime('%H:%M:%S')}] {x}\n"); print(f"[job{jid}] {x}",flush=True)
    if RESET:
        with torch.no_grad():
            for n,p in model.named_parameters():
                if n in INIT: p.copy_(INIT[n])
        jlog("adapter RESET to init (independent run)")
    class LogCB(TrainerCallback):
        def on_log(self,a,s,c,logs=None,**k):
            if rank==0 and logs:
                d={kk:(round(vv,5) if isinstance(vv,float) else vv) for kk,vv in logs.items()}; d["step"]=s.global_step; jlog(json.dumps(d))
            return c
    kw=dict(output_dir=OUT,bf16=True,tf32=True,per_device_train_batch_size=BATCH,gradient_accumulation_steps=GACC,num_train_epochs=float(EPOCHS),learning_rate=LR,warmup_ratio=WU,weight_decay=WD,max_grad_norm=1.0,lr_scheduler_type="cosine",optim="adamw_torch_fused",logging_steps=5,report_to="none",remove_unused_columns=False,ddp_find_unused_parameters=False,dataloader_num_workers=WK,dataloader_persistent_workers=(WK>0),train_sampling_strategy=SAMP,length_column_name="n_tokens")
    if NEF: kw["neftune_noise_alpha"]=float(NEF)
    cbs=[StopCB(jid),LogCB()]
    if eval_ds is not None:
        kw.update(eval_strategy="steps",eval_steps=EVST,per_device_eval_batch_size=EVB,save_strategy="steps",save_steps=EVST,save_total_limit=1,load_best_model_at_end=True,metric_for_best_model="eval_loss",greater_is_better=False)
        if PAT>0: cbs.append(EarlyStoppingCallback(early_stopping_patience=PAT))
    kw={k:v for k,v in kw.items() if k in VALID}
    torch.cuda.reset_peak_memory_stats()
    jlog(f"START batch={BATCH} epochs={EPOCHS} lr={LR} wd={WD} warmup={WU} neftune={NEF} reset={RESET} eval/{EVST} pat={PAT}")
    tt=time.time()
    try:
        args=TrainingArguments(**kw)
        tr=Trainer(model=model,args=args,train_dataset=ds,eval_dataset=eval_ds,data_collator=PadCollator(tokenizer),callbacks=cbs)
        res=tr.train(); secs=time.time()-tt
        SAVE=bool(spec.get("save",False))
        if SAVE:
            tr.save_model(OUT)
            if rank==0: tokenizer.save_pretrained(OUT)
        if rank==0:
            best=getattr(tr.state,"best_metric",None); bestck=getattr(tr.state,"best_model_checkpoint",None)
            summ={"job":jid,"steps":res.global_step,"train_seconds":round(secs,1),"train_loss":round(res.training_loss,4),"best_eval_loss":round(best,4) if best else None,"best_ckpt":bestck,"lr":LR,"wd":WD,"neftune":NEF,"epochs":EPOCHS,"saved":SAVE,"out_dir":OUT}
            json.dump(summ,open(RES+f"/{jid}.done","w"),indent=2); jlog("DONE "+json.dumps(summ))
    except Exception as e:
        import traceback
        if rank==0:
            json.dump({"job":jid,"error":repr(e)},open(RES+f"/{jid}.done","w")); jlog("ERROR "+repr(e)); open(logf,"a").write(traceback.format_exc())
    if dist.is_initialized(): dist.barrier()
    for f in [WDIR+"/STOP",WDIR+f"/STOP_{jid}"]:
        if os.path.exists(f):
            try: os.remove(f)
            except: pass
    last=jid
'''
import glob as _g
os.makedirs('/tmp/worker',exist_ok=True)
for d in ['jobs','results']:
    for f in _g.glob(f'/tmp/worker/{d}/*'):
        try: os.remove(f)
        except: pass
for f in _g.glob('/tmp/worker/STOP*'):
    try: os.remove(f)
    except: pass
open('/tmp/worker_server_v8.py','w').write(SERVER)
env=dict(os.environ); env.update({'MODEL_DIR':'/tmp/google_gemma4_e4b_model','DATA_PATH':'/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/train.jsonl','EVAL_PATH':'/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/eval.jsonl','MAX_LEN':'2048','LORA_R':'64','LORA_ALPHA':'128','LORA_DROPOUT':'0.05','HF_HUB_OFFLINE':'1','TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE':'1','PYTHONUNBUFFERED':'1'})
LOG='/tmp/worker/server.log'; open(LOG,'w').close()
cmd=[sys.executable,'-m','torch.distributed.run','--standalone','--nproc_per_node=2','/tmp/worker_server_v8.py']
proc=subprocess.Popen(cmd,env=env,stdout=open(LOG,'a'),stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,text=True,start_new_session=True)
open('/tmp/worker/server.pid','w').write(str(proc.pid))
print(ts(),'worker v8 launched pid',proc.pid,'| waiting READY...',flush=True)
pos=0; ready=False; deadline=time.time()+540
while time.time()<deadline:
    if proc.poll() is not None: print(ts(),'EXITED rc=',proc.returncode,flush=True); break
    with open(LOG) as f: f.seek(pos); new=f.read(); pos=f.tell()
    for ln in new.splitlines():
        if re.search(r'READY|froze=|train=|loading|Error|Traceback|OutOfMemory', ln): print(ts(), ln[:200], flush=True)
        if 'WORKER READY' in ln: ready=True
    if ready: break
    time.sleep(2)
print(ts(),'READY' if ready else 'NOT READY',flush=True)

Python[QUALITY-SWEEP v8] fair HP search (reset per job), rank by best_eval_loss[19]

  
# [QUALITY-SWEEP v8] Tim HP tot nhat cho generalization. Moi job reset adapter -> doc lap. So best_eval_loss.
CONFIGS=[
  dict(tag='base_lr2e5_wd05_nef5',  lr=2e-5, weight_decay=0.05, neftune=5),
  dict(tag='low_lr1e5_wd05_nef5',   lr=1e-5, weight_decay=0.05, neftune=5),
  dict(tag='reg_lr2e5_wd10_nef10',  lr=2e-5, weight_decay=0.10, neftune=10),
  dict(tag='noneftune_lr2e5_wd05',  lr=2e-5, weight_decay=0.05, neftune=0),
]
import os, glob, json, time, datetime, re
t0=time.time()
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")} +{time.time()-t0:6.1f}s]'
WDIR='/tmp/worker'; JOBS=WDIR+'/jobs'; RES=WDIR+'/results'
rows=[]
for cfg in CONFIGS:
    ids=[int(os.path.basename(p)[:-5]) for p in glob.glob(JOBS+'/*.json')]
    jid=(max(ids)+1) if ids else 1
    spec=dict(batch=16,grad_acc=1,epochs=2,lr=cfg['lr'],weight_decay=cfg['weight_decay'],neftune=cfg['neftune'],
              eval_steps=25,eval_batch=8,patience=3,sampling='group_by_length',workers=4,reset=True,save=False,
              out_dir=f'/tmp/gemma4_hp_{cfg["tag"]}')
    json.dump(spec,open(JOBS+f'/{jid}.json','w')); open(JOBS+f'/{jid}.ready','w').close()
    print(ts(),f"--- {cfg['tag']} (job {jid}) ---", flush=True)
    logf=JOBS+f'/{jid}.log'; donef=RES+f'/{jid}.done'; pos=0
    while True:
        if os.path.exists(logf):
            with open(logf) as f: f.seek(pos); new=f.read(); pos=f.tell()
            for ln in new.splitlines():
                if 'eval_loss' in ln or 'START' in ln or 'DONE' in ln or 'ERROR' in ln or 'RESET' in ln: print(ts(), ln[-150:], flush=True)
        if os.path.exists(donef):
            s=json.load(open(donef))
            if 'error' in s: print(ts(),'ERR',cfg['tag'],s['error'][:120]); rows.append((cfg['tag'],'ERR','ERR')); 
            else: rows.append((cfg['tag'],s.get('best_eval_loss'),s.get('steps'))); print(ts(),f"OK {cfg['tag']}: best_eval_loss={s.get('best_eval_loss')} (stopped@{s.get('steps')})", flush=True)
            break
        time.sleep(1)
print('\n'+ts(),'===== RANK by best_eval_loss (thap = tot) =====', flush=True)
for r in sorted(rows, key=lambda x: x[1] if isinstance(x[1],(int,float)) else 9e9):
    print(f"  {r[0]:26} best_eval_loss={r[1]}  stop@{r[2]}", flush=True)

Python[DATA-AUDIT] train vs eval: format, fields, length distribution[20]

  
# [DATA-AUDIT] So sanh train.jsonl vs eval.jsonl: so dong, keys, do dai -> kiem tra eval co lech phan phoi khong
import json, statistics, datetime
def ts(): return '['+datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%H:%M:%S')+']'
def load(p):
    rows=[]
    with open(p) as f:
        for ln in f:
            ln=ln.strip()
            if ln: rows.append(json.loads(ln))
    return rows
TR='/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/train.jsonl'; EV='/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/eval.jsonl'
tr=load(TR); ev=load(EV)
def summ(name, rows):
    print(ts(),f'=== {name}: {len(rows)} rows ===', flush=True)
    keys={}
    for r in rows[:500]:
        for k in r.keys(): keys[k]=keys.get(k,0)+1
    print('   top-level keys:', keys, flush=True)
    r0=rows[0]
    print('   sample[0] keys:', list(r0.keys()), flush=True)
    # do dai text (uoc theo so ky tu cua json.dumps cua noi dung chinh)
    def content_len(r):
        if 'messages' in r:
            m=r['messages']; m=json.loads(m) if isinstance(m,str) else m
            return sum(len(str(x.get('content',''))) for x in m), len(m)
        return len(json.dumps(r, ensure_ascii=False)), 0
    lens=[content_len(r)[0] for r in rows]
    nmsg=[content_len(r)[1] for r in rows]
    print(f'   content chars: min={min(lens)} median={int(statistics.median(lens))} mean={int(statistics.mean(lens))} max={max(lens)}', flush=True)
    if any(nmsg): print(f'   #messages/row: median={int(statistics.median(nmsg))} max={max(nmsg)}', flush=True)
    # in 1 sample rut gon
    s=json.dumps(r0, ensure_ascii=False)
    print('   sample[0] (480c):', s[:480], flush=True)
summ('TRAIN', tr); print(flush=True); summ('EVAL', ev)
print('\n'+ts(),'roles trong messages (neu co):', flush=True)
for name,rows in [('train',tr),('eval',ev)]:
    roles={}
    for r in rows:
        m=r.get('messages');
        if m:
            m=json.loads(m) if isinstance(m,str) else m
            for x in m: roles[x.get('role')]=roles.get(x.get('role'),0)+1
    print('   ',name, roles, flush=True)

   top-level keys: {'text': 500, 'source_group': 500, 'sample_weight': 500, 'source_type': 500, 'source': 500, 'record_sha256': 500, 'created_by': 500, 'dataset_stamp': 500}



   sample[0] keys: ['text', 'source_group', 'sample_weight', 'source_type', 'source', 'record_sha256', 'created_by', 'dataset_stamp']



   content chars: min=434 median=950 mean=1935 max=175923



   #messages/row: median=3 max=3



   sample[0] (480c): {"text": "Repo: pytorch/pytorch\nTitle: torch.export: nn.MultiheadAttention (need_weights=False) exported on CPU fails on CUDA (permute→view after SDPA)\nLabels: ['oncall: pt2', 'oncall: export', 'bot-triaged']\nURL: https://github.com/pytorch/pytorch/issues/179287\n\n### 🐛 Describe the bug\n\n`torch.export` produces an `ExportedProgram` for `nn.MultiheadAttention` where the exported graph contains `aten.permute` followed directly by `aten.view` on the SDPA output, with no `a

   top-level keys: {'text': 35, 'source_group': 81, 'sample_weight': 81, 'source_type': 81, 'source': 81, 'record_sha256': 81, 'created_by': 81, 'dataset_stamp': 81, 'messages': 46}



   sample[0] keys: ['text', 'source_group', 'sample_weight', 'source_type', 'source', 'record_sha256', 'created_by', 'dataset_stamp']



   content chars: min=536 median=947 mean=1624 max=10558



   #messages/row: median=3 max=3



   sample[0] (480c): {"text": "Repo: pytorch/pytorch\nTitle: torch.compile + dynamic shapes + tensor subclass graph output is broken\nLabels: ['triaged', 'module: __torch_dispatch__', 'oncall: pt2', 'module: dynamic shapes']\nURL: https://github.com/pytorch/pytorch/issues/124619\n\nThis issue came up with NJT a few weeks ago (I believe @jbschlosser worked around it but we should fix this).\r\n\r\nSay you are in the following situation:\r\n(1) you are compiling a model where one of the graph outpu

    train {'system': 2981, 'user': 2981, 'assistant': 2981}



    eval {'system': 46, 'user': 46, 'assistant': 46}






  
Python[DATA-CLEAN] filter messages-only -> consistent objective + stats[21]

  
# [DATA-CLEAN] Loc CHI dong co 'messages' (mot muc tieu nhat quan) -> train_msgs/eval_msgs. Khong train.
import json, statistics, datetime
def ts(): return '['+datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%H:%M:%S')+']'
def load(p):
    out=[]
    with open(p) as f:
        for ln in f:
            ln=ln.strip()
            if ln: out.append(json.loads(ln))
    return out
D='/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/'
tr=load(D+'train.jsonl'); ev=load(D+'eval.jsonl')
def has_msgs(r):
    m=r.get('messages');
    if not m: return False
    m=json.loads(m) if isinstance(m,str) else m
    return any(x.get('role')=='assistant' and str(x.get('content','')).strip() for x in m)
tr_m=[r for r in tr if has_msgs(r)]; ev_m=[r for r in ev if has_msgs(r)]
print(ts(),f'train messages-only: {len(tr_m)}/{len(tr)} | eval messages-only: {len(ev_m)}/{len(ev)}', flush=True)
def comp_len(r):
    m=r['messages']; m=json.loads(m) if isinstance(m,str) else m
    la=[x for x in m if x.get('role')=='assistant'][-1]
    return len(str(la.get('content','')))
for name,rows in [('train_msgs',tr_m),('eval_msgs',ev_m)]:
    cl=[comp_len(r) for r in rows]
    print(ts(),f'{name}: completion chars min={min(cl)} median={int(statistics.median(cl))} mean={int(statistics.mean(cl))} max={max(cl)}', flush=True)
# ghi file de dung cho worker v9
with open(D+'train_msgs.jsonl','w') as f:
    for r in tr_m: f.write(json.dumps(r,ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
with open(D+'eval_msgs.jsonl','w') as f:
    for r in ev_m: f.write(json.dumps(r,ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
print(ts(),'wrote', D+'train_msgs.jsonl', 'and eval_msgs.jsonl', flush=True)
print(ts(),'sample assistant completion (eval[0], 300c):', flush=True)
m=ev_m[0]['messages']; m=json.loads(m) if isinstance(m,str) else m
print('   ', str([x for x in m if x['role']=='assistant'][-1]['content'])[:300], flush=True)

- Extract API names, tensor shapes, dtypes, devices, layouts, and autograd state.
- If there is a traceback or crash, build a minimal standalone reproducer first.

Python[WORKER-START v9] reuse v8 server on CLEAN messages-only data[22]

  
# [WORKER-START v9] Tai dung server v8 (co reset+eval+earlystop) nhung tro vao DATA SACH (messages-only).
import os, sys, time, datetime, subprocess, re, glob
t0=time.time()
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")} +{time.time()-t0:6.1f}s]'
def sh(c): return subprocess.run(c,shell=True,capture_output=True,text=True).stdout
sh('pkill -9 -f worker_server'); sh('pkill -9 -f torch.distributed.run'); time.sleep(3)
for d in ['jobs','results']:
    for f in glob.glob(f'/tmp/worker/{d}/*'):
        try: os.remove(f)
        except: pass
for f in glob.glob('/tmp/worker/STOP*'):
    try: os.remove(f)
    except: pass
env=dict(os.environ); env.update({'MODEL_DIR':'/tmp/google_gemma4_e4b_model','DATA_PATH':'/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/train_msgs.jsonl','EVAL_PATH':'/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/eval_msgs.jsonl','MAX_LEN':'2048','LORA_R':'64','LORA_ALPHA':'128','LORA_DROPOUT':'0.05','HF_HUB_OFFLINE':'1','TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE':'1','PYTHONUNBUFFERED':'1'})
LOG='/tmp/worker/server.log'; open(LOG,'w').close()
cmd=[sys.executable,'-m','torch.distributed.run','--standalone','--nproc_per_node=2','/tmp/worker_server_v8.py']
proc=subprocess.Popen(cmd,env=env,stdout=open(LOG,'a'),stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,text=True,start_new_session=True)
open('/tmp/worker/server.pid','w').write(str(proc.pid))
print(ts(),'worker v9 (clean data) launched pid',proc.pid,'| waiting READY...',flush=True)
pos=0; ready=False; deadline=time.time()+540
while time.time()<deadline:
    if proc.poll() is not None: print(ts(),'EXITED rc=',proc.returncode,flush=True); break
    with open(LOG) as f: f.seek(pos); new=f.read(); pos=f.tell()
    for ln in new.splitlines():
        if re.search(r'READY|froze=|train=|loading|Error|Traceback|OutOfMemory', ln): print(ts(), ln[:200], flush=True)
        if 'WORKER READY' in ln: ready=True
    if ready: break
    time.sleep(2)
print(ts(),'READY' if ready else 'NOT READY',flush=True)

Python[TRAIN-CLEAN] messages-only, r64/2048 lr2e-5, eval/25 + EarlyStop, save best[23]

  
# [TRAIN-CLEAN] Train tren data sach (messages-only). Theo doi eval_loss co giam that khong.
JOB = dict(batch=16, grad_acc=1, epochs=3, lr=2e-5, weight_decay=0.05, neftune=5,
           eval_steps=25, eval_batch=8, patience=4, sampling='group_by_length', workers=4,
           reset=True, save=True, out_dir='/tmp/gemma4_clean_run')
import os, glob, json, time, datetime, re
t0=time.time()
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")} +{time.time()-t0:6.1f}s]'
WDIR='/tmp/worker'; JOBS=WDIR+'/jobs'; RES=WDIR+'/results'
ids=[int(os.path.basename(p)[:-5]) for p in glob.glob(JOBS+'/*.json')]
jid=(max(ids)+1) if ids else 1
json.dump(JOB,open(JOBS+f'/{jid}.json','w')); open(JOBS+f'/{jid}.ready','w').close()
print(ts(),f'submitted CLEAN job {jid}:',JOB, flush=True)
logf=JOBS+f'/{jid}.log'; donef=RES+f'/{jid}.done'; pos=0
try:
    while True:
        if os.path.exists(logf):
            with open(logf) as f: f.seek(pos); new=f.read(); pos=f.tell()
            for ln in new.splitlines():
                if 'eval_loss' in ln or 'START' in ln or 'DONE' in ln or 'ERROR' in ln or 'RESET' in ln: print(ts(), ln[-160:], flush=True)
        if os.path.exists(donef):
            print(ts(),'=== JOB DONE ===', flush=True); print(open(donef).read(), flush=True); break
        time.sleep(1)
except KeyboardInterrupt:
    print(ts(),'stopped watching (job van chay).', flush=True)

Python[SAVE-TO-STAGE clean] persist clean-data best (eval 4.59)[24]

  
import os, glob, time, datetime
from snowflake.snowpark.context import get_active_session
session=get_active_session(); t0=time.time()
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")} +{time.time()-t0:6.1f}s]'
SRC='/tmp/gemma4_clean_run'; STAGE='@ML_DB.MODELS.FUZZ_DATASET_STAGE/gemma4_CLEAN_msgs_best_eval459_20260606'
top=[p for p in glob.glob(SRC+'/*') if os.path.isfile(p)]
print(ts(),f'PUT {len(top)} adapter files -> {STAGE}/adapter/', flush=True)
for p in top: session.file.put(p, STAGE+'/adapter/', auto_compress=False, overwrite=True)
for ck in sorted(glob.glob(SRC+'/checkpoint-*')):
    cn=os.path.basename(ck); files=[x for x in glob.glob(ck+'/*') if os.path.isfile(x)]
    for p in files: session.file.put(p, f'{STAGE}/{cn}/', auto_compress=False, overwrite=True)
# luu kem ban dataset sach de tai su dung
for f in ['train_msgs.jsonl','eval_msgs.jsonl']:
    session.file.put('/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/'+f, STAGE+'/dataset/', auto_compress=False, overwrite=True)
print(ts(),'verify:', flush=True)
for row in session.sql(f'LIST {STAGE}').collect()[:40]: print('   ',row[0], row[1], flush=True)
print(ts(),f'DONE -> {STAGE}', flush=True)

# [GET-ADAPTER] Tai adapter tot nhat (CLEAN, eval 4.59) ve /tmp/best_adapter
import os, glob, datetime
from snowflake.snowpark.context import get_active_session
session=get_active_session()
def ts(): return '['+datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%H:%M:%S')+']'
DST='/tmp/best_adapter'; os.makedirs(DST,exist_ok=True)
STAGE='@ML_DB.MODELS.FUZZ_DATASET_STAGE/gemma4_CLEAN_msgs_best_eval459_20260606/adapter'
r=session.file.get(STAGE+'/', DST+'/')
print(ts(),'downloaded:',[os.path.basename(x.file) for x in r], flush=True)
print(ts(),'files:', sorted(os.path.basename(p) for p in glob.glob(DST+'/*')), flush=True)

Python[INFER] load base+best adapter (1 GPU), generate on samples[3]

  
# [INFER] Chay thu model da train (base + adapter CLEAN eval4.59) tren 1 GPU.
import os
os.environ['CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES']='0'
os.environ['HF_HUB_OFFLINE']='1'; os.environ['TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE']='1'
os.environ.setdefault('PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF','expandable_segments:True')
os.environ['TOKENIZERS_PARALLELISM']='false'
import time, json, datetime, torch
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")}]'
import unsloth
try:
    import unsloth_zoo.temporary_patches.gemma4 as g4
    if hasattr(g4,'_Gemma4KVSharedSafeProxy'):
        def _pt(self,name): return getattr(object.__getattribute__(self,'_real'),name)
        g4._Gemma4KVSharedSafeProxy.__getattr__=_pt
except Exception as e: print('proxy warn',e, flush=True)
from unsloth import FastLanguageModel
from peft import PeftModel
t0=time.time(); print(ts(),'loading base model (1 GPU)...', flush=True)
model,tok=FastLanguageModel.from_pretrained(model_name='/tmp/google_gemma4_e4b_model',max_seq_length=2048,load_in_4bit=False,load_in_16bit=True,full_finetuning=False,local_files_only=True)
tok=getattr(tok,'tokenizer',tok)
if tok.pad_token is None: tok.pad_token=tok.eos_token
print(ts(),'attaching adapter...', flush=True)
model=PeftModel.from_pretrained(model,'/tmp/best_adapter')
FastLanguageModel.for_inference(model)
print(ts(),f'READY in {time.time()-t0:.1f}s', flush=True)

@torch.no_grad()
def gen(msgs, n=256):
    prompt=tok.apply_chat_template(msgs,tokenize=False,add_generation_prompt=True)
    enc=tok(prompt,return_tensors='pt').to('cuda')
    out=model.generate(**enc,max_new_tokens=n,do_sample=False,use_cache=True,pad_token_id=tok.pad_token_id)
    return tok.decode(out[0][enc['input_ids'].shape[1]:],skip_special_tokens=True)

ev=[json.loads(l) for l in open('/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/eval_msgs.jsonl')]
for i in range(2):
    m=ev[i]['messages']; m=json.loads(m) if isinstance(m,str) else m
    pm=[x for x in m if x['role']!='assistant']
    ref=[x for x in m if x['role']=='assistant'][-1]['content']
    print('\n'+ts(),f'======== EVAL SAMPLE {i} ========', flush=True)
    print('USER:', str(pm[-1]['content'])[:350], flush=True)
    g=gen(pm); print('\n--- MODEL OUTPUT ---\n'+g[:700], flush=True)
    print('\n--- REFERENCE ---\n'+str(ref)[:400], flush=True)

print('\n'+ts(),'======== CUSTOM PROMPT ========', flush=True)
custom=[{'role':'system','content':'You are an assistant for defensive fuzzing of PyTorch/TensorFlow APIs.'},{'role':'user','content':'Generate a minimal fuzzing test for torch.nn.functional.scaled_dot_product_attention that probes dtype and shape edge cases.'}]
print(gen(custom, 300), flush=True)
print('\n'+ts(),'DONE.', flush=True)

Python[INFER-FIX] load adapter the unsloth way + generate[4]

  
# [INFER-FIX] Nap adapter dung cach unsloth (from_pretrained tren adapter dir). Giai phong base cu truoc.
import gc, time, json, datetime, torch
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")}]'
try:
    del model, tok
except Exception: pass
gc.collect(); torch.cuda.empty_cache()
from unsloth import FastLanguageModel
t0=time.time(); print(ts(),'loading base+adapter via unsloth...', flush=True)
# adapter_config.base_model_name_or_path tro toi /tmp/google_gemma4_e4b_model
model,tok=FastLanguageModel.from_pretrained(model_name='/tmp/best_adapter',max_seq_length=2048,load_in_4bit=False,load_in_16bit=True,local_files_only=True)
tok=getattr(tok,'tokenizer',tok)
if tok.pad_token is None: tok.pad_token=tok.eos_token
FastLanguageModel.for_inference(model)
print(ts(),f'READY in {time.time()-t0:.1f}s', flush=True)

@torch.no_grad()
def gen(msgs, n=256):
    prompt=tok.apply_chat_template(msgs,tokenize=False,add_generation_prompt=True)
    enc=tok(prompt,return_tensors='pt').to('cuda')
    out=model.generate(**enc,max_new_tokens=n,do_sample=False,use_cache=True,pad_token_id=tok.pad_token_id)
    return tok.decode(out[0][enc['input_ids'].shape[1]:],skip_special_tokens=True)

ev=[json.loads(l) for l in open('/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/eval_msgs.jsonl')]
for i in range(2):
    m=ev[i]['messages']; m=json.loads(m) if isinstance(m,str) else m
    pm=[x for x in m if x['role']!='assistant']; ref=[x for x in m if x['role']=='assistant'][-1]['content']
    print('\n'+ts(),f'==== EVAL SAMPLE {i} ====', flush=True)
    print('USER:', str(pm[-1]['content'])[:300], flush=True)
    print('--- MODEL ---\n'+gen(pm)[:700], flush=True)
    print('--- REFERENCE ---\n'+str(ref)[:350], flush=True)
print('\n'+ts(),'==== CUSTOM ====', flush=True)
custom=[{'role':'system','content':'You are an assistant for defensive fuzzing of PyTorch/TensorFlow APIs.'},{'role':'user','content':'Generate a minimal fuzzing test for torch.nn.functional.scaled_dot_product_attention probing dtype and shape edge cases.'}]
print(gen(custom,300), flush=True)
print('\n'+ts(),'DONE.', flush=True)

# [INFER-GEN] Dung model+gen() da nap o cell truoc. Build prompt tu eval.jsonl (loc messages).
import json, datetime
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")}]'
rows=[json.loads(l) for l in open('/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/eval.jsonl')]
def msgs_of(r):
    m=r.get('messages')
    if not m: return None
    return json.loads(m) if isinstance(m,str) else m
msg_rows=[m for m in (msgs_of(r) for r in rows) if m and any(x.get('role')=='assistant' for x in m)]
print(ts(),f'{len(msg_rows)} eval messages-rows', flush=True)
for i in range(min(2,len(msg_rows))):
    m=msg_rows[i]
    pm=[x for x in m if x['role']!='assistant']; ref=[x for x in m if x['role']=='assistant'][-1]['content']
    print('\n'+ts(),f'==== EVAL SAMPLE {i} ====', flush=True)
    print('USER:', str(pm[-1]['content'])[:320], flush=True)
    print('--- MODEL ---\n'+gen(pm)[:700], flush=True)
    print('--- REFERENCE ---\n'+str(ref)[:350], flush=True)
print('\n'+ts(),'==== CUSTOM PROMPT ====', flush=True)
custom=[{'role':'system','content':'You are an assistant for defensive fuzzing of PyTorch/TensorFlow APIs.'},{'role':'user','content':'Generate a minimal fuzzing test for torch.nn.functional.scaled_dot_product_attention probing dtype and shape edge cases.'}]
print(gen(custom,300), flush=True)
print('\n'+ts(),'DONE.', flush=True)

# [AB-DIAG] Kiem tra adapter co that su thay doi model khong: norm LoRA-B + chenh lech logits base vs ft.
import torch, datetime
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")}]'
# 1) norm cac ma tran LoRA (B thuong init 0; neu van ~0 => adapter khong hoc duoc gi)
nB=nA=0.0; cB=cA=0
for n,p in model.named_parameters():
    if 'lora_B' in n: nB+=p.float().abs().sum().item(); cB+=p.numel()
    if 'lora_A' in n: nA+=p.float().abs().sum().item(); cA+=p.numel()
print(ts(),f'LoRA_A mean|w|={nA/max(1,cA):.3e} ({cA} params) | LoRA_B mean|w|={nB/max(1,cB):.3e} ({cB} params)', flush=True)
print(ts(),f'active_adapters={getattr(model,"active_adapters",lambda:"?")() if callable(getattr(model,"active_adapters",None)) else getattr(model,"active_adapter","?")}', flush=True)
# 2) chenh lech logits tren 1 input ngan: co adapter vs disable_adapter
txt=tok.apply_chat_template([{'role':'user','content':'Fuzz torch.add for dtype edge cases.'}],tokenize=False,add_generation_prompt=True)
enc=tok(txt,return_tensors='pt').to('cuda')
with torch.no_grad():
    lo_ft=model(**enc).logits[0,-1].float()
    with model.disable_adapter():
        lo_base=model(**enc).logits[0,-1].float()
d=(lo_ft-lo_base).abs()
print(ts(),f'logits max|diff|={d.max().item():.4f} mean|diff|={d.mean().item():.4e}', flush=True)
print(ts(),'=> neu diff ~0: adapter hau nhu khong tac dong (fine-tune khong doi hanh vi).', flush=True)

# [AB-DIAG2] Doc truc tiep file adapter da luu -> B trong FILE co =0 khong? Phan biet 'load loi' vs 'train khong hoc'.
import glob, datetime
from safetensors import safe_open
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")}]'
for path in ['/tmp/best_adapter/adapter_model.safetensors']:
    print(ts(),'file:',path, flush=True)

            t=f.get_tensor(k)
            if 'lora_B' in k: nB+=t.float().abs().sum().item(); cB+=t.numel()
            if 'lora_A' in k: nA+=t.float().abs().sum().item(); cA+=t.numel()
        ksample=keys[:4]
    print(ts(),f'#keys={len(keys)} sample={ksample}', flush=True)
    print(ts(),f'FILE LoRA_A mean|w|={nA/max(1,cA):.3e} | LoRA_B mean|w|={nB/max(1,cB):.3e}', flush=True)
print(ts(),'Neu B trong FILE !=0 => luc nap inference bi loi (unsloth tao LoRA moi). Neu =0 => train that su khong dich chuyen B.', flush=True)

Python[DBG1] structural: lora_B by group, requires_grad, norm (no reload)[9]

  
# [DBG1] Soi model dang nap: lora_A/B theo nhom (language vs vision/audio), requires_grad, norm. Khong reload.
import datetime, collections
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")}]'
def group(n):
    if 'audio_tower' in n: return 'audio'
    if 'vision_tower' in n or 'embed_vision' in n: return 'vision'
    if 'language_model' in n: return 'language'
    return 'other'
stats=collections.defaultdict(lambda: {'A_n':0,'A_w':0.0,'B_n':0,'B_w':0.0,'A_rg':0,'B_rg':0})
for n,p in model.named_parameters():
    g=group(n); s=stats[g]
    if 'lora_A' in n:
        s['A_n']+=p.numel(); s['A_w']+=p.float().abs().sum().item(); s['A_rg']+= int(p.requires_grad)
    elif 'lora_B' in n:
        s['B_n']+=p.numel(); s['B_w']+=p.float().abs().sum().item(); s['B_rg']+= int(p.requires_grad)
for g,s in stats.items():
    if s['A_n']+s['B_n']==0: continue
    print(ts(),f"{g:9} | A: {s['A_n']:>10} params mean|w|={s['A_w']/max(1,s['A_n']):.3e} rg_layers={s['A_rg']} | B: {s['B_n']:>10} mean|w|={s['B_w']/max(1,s['B_n']):.3e} rg_layers={s['B_rg']}", flush=True)
print(ts(),'=> Tim nhom language: B mean|w| co =0? requires_grad co True khong?', flush=True)

# [DBG2] Micro-train co kiem soat: lora_B (language) co nhan grad va doi khong? Quyet dinh bug o dau.
import gc, json, torch, datetime
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")}]'
try:
    del model, tok
except Exception: pass
gc.collect(); torch.cuda.empty_cache()
import os
os.environ['CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES']='0'
import unsloth
try:
    import unsloth_zoo.temporary_patches.gemma4 as g4
    if hasattr(g4,'_Gemma4KVSharedSafeProxy'):
        def _pt(self,name): return getattr(object.__getattribute__(self,'_real'),name)
        g4._Gemma4KVSharedSafeProxy.__getattr__=_pt
except Exception as e: print('proxy',e,flush=True)
from unsloth import FastLanguageModel
print(ts(),'fresh load base + get_peft_model...', flush=True)
m,tk=FastLanguageModel.from_pretrained(model_name='/tmp/google_gemma4_e4b_model',max_seq_length=1024,load_in_4bit=False,load_in_16bit=True,full_finetuning=False,local_files_only=True)
tk=getattr(tk,'tokenizer',tk)
if tk.pad_token is None: tk.pad_token=tk.eos_token
m=FastLanguageModel.get_peft_model(m,r=64,target_modules=['q_proj','k_proj','v_proj','o_proj','gate_proj','up_proj','down_proj'],lora_alpha=128,lora_dropout=0.05,bias='none',use_rslora=True,use_gradient_checkpointing='unsloth')
bad=['vision_tower','audio_tower','embed_vision','embed_audio']
for n,p in m.named_parameters():
    if any(k in n for k in bad): p.requires_grad_(False)
try: FastLanguageModel.for_training(m)
except Exception as e: print('for_training?',e,flush=True)
m.train()
nameB=[n for n,p in m.named_parameters() if 'language' in n and 'lora_B' in n and p.requires_grad][0]
pB=dict(m.named_parameters())[nameB]
print(ts(),'watch param:',nameB, flush=True)
print(ts(),f'init |B|={pB.abs().sum().item():.4e} requires_grad={pB.requires_grad}', flush=True)
# build 1 batch tu train_msgs
rows=[json.loads(l) for l in open('/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/train_msgs.jsonl')][:2]
def toks(r):
    mm=r['messages']; mm=json.loads(mm) if isinstance(mm,str) else mm
    pm=[x for x in mm if x['role']!='assistant']; comp=[x for x in mm if x['role']=='assistant'][-1]['content']
    pids=tk(tk.apply_chat_template(pm,tokenize=False,add_generation_prompt=True),add_special_tokens=False)['input_ids']
    cids=tk(comp,add_special_tokens=False)['input_ids']+[tk.eos_token_id]
    ids=(pids+cids)[:1024]; lab=([-100]*len(pids)+cids)[:1024]
    return ids,lab
B=[toks(r) for r in rows]; ml=max(len(i) for i,_ in B)
import torch as T
ii=T.tensor([i+[tk.pad_token_id]*(ml-len(i)) for i,_ in B]).cuda()
ll=T.tensor([l+[-100]*(ml-len(l)) for _,l in B]).cuda()
am=(ii!=tk.pad_token_id).long()
opt=T.optim.AdamW([p for p in m.parameters() if p.requires_grad],lr=1e-4)
for step in range(4):
    out=m(input_ids=ii,attention_mask=am,labels=ll)
    out.loss.backward()
    g=pB.grad
    print(ts(),f'step{step} loss={out.loss.item():.4f} B.grad={"None" if g is None else f"{g.abs().sum().item():.4e}"}', flush=True)
    opt.step(); opt.zero_grad()
    print(ts(),f'   |B| after step={pB.abs().sum().item():.4e}', flush=True)
print(ts(),'KET LUAN: B.grad!=0 va |B| tang => training OK (bug o save/load_best). B.grad=0/None => grad khong toi B (bug setup).', flush=True)

Python[DBG2b] micro-train using loaded m, batch from train.jsonl[11]

  
# [DBG2b] Dung m,tk,pB da nap o DBG2. Build batch tu train.jsonl (loc messages).
import json, torch as T, datetime
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")}]'
rows=[]
for l in open('/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/train.jsonl'):
    r=json.loads(l); mm=r.get('messages')
    if not mm: continue
    mm=json.loads(mm) if isinstance(mm,str) else mm
    if any(x.get('role')=='assistant' for x in mm): rows.append(mm)
    if len(rows)>=2: break
print(ts(),'got',len(rows),'msg rows', flush=True)
def toks(mm):
    pm=[x for x in mm if x['role']!='assistant']; comp=[x for x in mm if x['role']=='assistant'][-1]['content']
    pids=tk(tk.apply_chat_template(pm,tokenize=False,add_generation_prompt=True),add_special_tokens=False)['input_ids']
    cids=tk(str(comp),add_special_tokens=False)['input_ids']+[tk.eos_token_id]
    ids=(pids+cids)[:1024]; lab=([-100]*len(pids)+cids)[:1024]
    return ids,lab
BB=[toks(mm) for mm in rows]; ml=max(len(i) for i,_ in BB)
ii=T.tensor([i+[tk.pad_token_id]*(ml-len(i)) for i,_ in BB]).cuda()
ll=T.tensor([l+[-100]*(ml-len(l)) for _,l in BB]).cuda()
am=(ii!=tk.pad_token_id).long()
opt=T.optim.AdamW([p for p in m.parameters() if p.requires_grad],lr=1e-4)
m.train()
for step in range(4):
    out=m(input_ids=ii,attention_mask=am,labels=ll)
    out.loss.backward()
    g=pB.grad
    print(ts(),f'step{step} loss={out.loss.item():.4f} B.grad={"None" if g is None else f"{g.abs().sum().item():.4e}"} |B|before={pB.abs().sum().item():.4e}', flush=True)
    opt.step(); opt.zero_grad()
    print(ts(),f'   |B| after={pB.abs().sum().item():.4e}', flush=True)
print(ts(),'=> B.grad!=0 & |B| tang => train OK -> bug o save/load_best. Nguoc lai -> bug grad/setup.', flush=True)

# [DBG3] Luu m vua micro-train (B!=0) -> doc lai file: B co !=0 khong? Xac nhan save_pretrained dung.
import glob, datetime
from safetensors import safe_open
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")}]'
OUT='/tmp/dbg_adapter'
m.save_pretrained(OUT)
f=[p for p in glob.glob(OUT+'/*.safetensors')][0]
nB=cB=0
with safe_open(f,framework='pt') as h:
    for k in h.keys():
        if 'language' in k and 'lora_B' in k:
            t=h.get_tensor(k); nB+=t.float().abs().sum().item(); cB+=t.numel()
print(ts(),f'SAVED file language lora_B mean|w|={nB/max(1,cB):.4e}  (ky vong !=0)', flush=True)
print(ts(),'=> Neu !=0: save dung. Bug 100%% o load_best_model_at_end (nap nham checkpoint init) trong worker.', flush=True)

Python[DBG4] check mid-training checkpoints on stage for nonzero lora_B (salvage?)[13]

  
# [DBG4] Kiem tra cac checkpoint-NNN da luu tren stage co B!=0 khong (co cuu duoc khong). Khong train.
import os, glob, datetime
from safetensors import safe_open
from snowflake.snowpark.context import get_active_session
session=get_active_session()
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")}]'
CHECKS=[
  ('CLEAN/checkpoint-125','@ML_DB.MODELS.FUZZ_DATASET_STAGE/gemma4_CLEAN_msgs_best_eval459_20260606/checkpoint-125'),
  ('final_run/checkpoint-312','@ML_DB.MODELS.FUZZ_DATASET_STAGE/gemma4_final_run_20260606/checkpoint-312'),
  ('v6/checkpoint-624','@ML_DB.MODELS.FUZZ_DATASET_STAGE/gemma4_quality_run_v6_r128_4096_20260606/checkpoint-624'),
]
for tag,stg in CHECKS:
    d=f'/tmp/chk_{tag.replace("/","_")}'; os.makedirs(d,exist_ok=True)
    try:
        session.file.get(stg+'/adapter_model.safetensors', d+'/')
    except Exception as e:
        print(ts(),tag,'GET err',repr(e)[:100], flush=True); continue
    f=glob.glob(d+'/*.safetensors')
    if not f: print(ts(),tag,'no file', flush=True); continue
    nB=cB=0
    with safe_open(f[0],framework='pt') as h:
        for k in h.keys():
            if 'language' in k and 'lora_B' in k:
                t=h.get_tensor(k); nB+=t.float().abs().sum().item(); cB+=t.numel()
    v=nB/max(1,cB)
    print(ts(),f'{tag:26} language lora_B mean|w|={v:.4e}  -> {"TRAINED (cuu duoc!)" if v>1e-7 else "B=0 (bo)"}', flush=True)

Python[SG-TRAIN] single-GPU 20-epoch, clean data, per-epoch eval + |B| verify[14]

  
# [SG-TRAIN] Single-GPU (KHONG DDP) 20 epoch, data sach messages-only, r64/2048.
# Do |lora_B| + eval_loss moi epoch, luu best, VERIFY file B!=0. Tranh bug worker.
import os, json, math, time, random, glob, datetime, torch as T
import torch.nn.functional as F
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")}]'
from unsloth import FastLanguageModel

# --- reset adapter cua m ve init sach (A=kaiming, B=0) ---
import torch.nn.init as init, math as _m
nreset=0
with T.no_grad():
    for n,p in m.named_parameters():
        if 'lora_A' in n: init.kaiming_uniform_(p, a=_m.sqrt(5)); nreset+=1
        elif 'lora_B' in n: p.zero_()
print(ts(),f'reset adapter: {nreset} lora_A re-init, lora_B->0', flush=True)
FastLanguageModel.for_training(m); m.train()
watchB=[p for n,p in m.named_parameters() if 'language' in n and 'lora_B' in n][0]
print(ts(),f'|B| sau reset = {watchB.abs().sum().item():.3e} (phai ~0)', flush=True)

# --- data sach messages-only ---
def load_msgs(path):
    out=[]
    for l in open(path):
        r=json.loads(l); mm=r.get('messages')
        if not mm: continue
        mm=json.loads(mm) if isinstance(mm,str) else mm
        if any(x.get('role')=='assistant' and str(x.get('content','')).strip() for x in mm): out.append(mm)
    return out
D='/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/'
tr=load_msgs(D+'train.jsonl'); ev=load_msgs(D+'eval.jsonl')
print(ts(),f'train={len(tr)} eval={len(ev)}', flush=True)
ML=2048
def enc(mm):
    pm=[x for x in mm if x['role']!='assistant']; comp=str([x for x in mm if x['role']=='assistant'][-1]['content'])
    pids=tk(tk.apply_chat_template(pm,tokenize=False,add_generation_prompt=True),add_special_tokens=False)['input_ids']
    cids=tk(comp,add_special_tokens=False)['input_ids']+[tk.eos_token_id]
    if len(pids)+len(cids)>ML:
        kp=max(0,ML-len(cids)); pids=pids[-kp:] if kp else []; cids=cids[:ML-len(pids)]
    ids=pids+cids; lab=[-100]*len(pids)+cids
    return ids,lab
trE=[enc(x) for x in tr]; evE=[enc(x) for x in ev]
trE=[e for e in trE if any(t!=-100 for t in e[1])]; evE=[e for e in evE if any(t!=-100 for t in e[1])]
trE.sort(key=lambda e: len(e[0]))  # length grouping (giam padding)
print(ts(),f'tokenized train={len(trE)} eval={len(evE)}', flush=True)

def batches(data, bs):
    idx=list(range(0,len(data),bs)); 
    return idx
def collate(items):
    ml=max(len(i) for i,_ in items); pid=tk.pad_token_id
    ii=T.tensor([i+[pid]*(ml-len(i)) for i,_ in items])
    ll=T.tensor([l+[-100]*(ml-len(l)) for _,l in items])
    am=(ii!=pid).long(); return ii.cuda(),am.cuda(),ll.cuda()
@T.no_grad()
def evaluate():
    m.eval(); tot=0.0; ntok=0
    for s in range(0,len(evE),8):
        ii,am,ll=collate(evE[s:s+8])
        out=m(input_ids=ii,attention_mask=am,labels=ll)
        nt=(ll!=-100).sum().item(); tot+=out.loss.item()*nt; ntok+=nt
    m.train(); return tot/max(1,ntok)

BS=16; EPOCHS=20
bstarts=list(range(0,len(trE),BS))
total_steps=len(bstarts)*EPOCHS; warmup=int(0.03*total_steps)
opt=T.optim.AdamW([p for p in m.parameters() if p.requires_grad], lr=2e-5, weight_decay=0.05)
def lr_at(step):
    if step<warmup: return step/max(1,warmup)
    prog=(step-warmup)/max(1,total_steps-warmup); return 0.5*(1+math.cos(math.pi*prog))
base_lr=2e-5; gstep=0; best=1e9; best_ep=-1; OUT='/tmp/gemma4_sg_best'
print(ts(),f'START single-GPU train: {EPOCHS} epochs, {len(bstarts)} steps/epoch, total {total_steps}', flush=True)
e0=evaluate(); print(ts(),f'epoch0 (pre-train) eval_loss={e0:.4f} |B|={watchB.abs().sum().item():.3e}', flush=True)
for ep in range(1,EPOCHS+1):
    random.shuffle(bstarts); m.train(); tl=0.0; nb=0
    for bs0 in bstarts:
        items=trE[bs0:bs0+BS]; ii,am,ll=collate(items)
        for g in opt.param_groups: g['lr']=base_lr*lr_at(gstep)
        out=m(input_ids=ii,attention_mask=am,labels=ll); loss=out.loss
        loss.backward(); T.nn.utils.clip_grad_norm_([p for p in m.parameters() if p.requires_grad],1.0)
        opt.step(); opt.zero_grad(); gstep+=1; tl+=loss.item(); nb+=1
    el=evaluate(); bn=watchB.abs().sum().item()
    flag=''
    if el<best:
        best=el; best_ep=ep; m.save_pretrained(OUT); tk.save_pretrained(OUT)
        # verify file B!=0 ngay
        fp=glob.glob(OUT+'/*.safetensors')[0]
        from safetensors import safe_open
        nB=cB=0
        with safe_open(fp,framework='pt') as h:
            for k in h.keys():
                if 'language' in k and 'lora_B' in k: t=h.get_tensor(k); nB+=t.float().abs().sum().item(); cB+=t.numel()
        flag=f' <- SAVED best (file |B|mean={nB/max(1,cB):.3e})'
    print(ts(),f'epoch{ep:2d} train_loss={tl/nb:.4f} eval_loss={el:.4f} |B|={bn:.3e}{flag}', flush=True)
print(ts(),f'DONE. best eval_loss={best:.4f} @ epoch{best_ep}, saved -> {OUT}', flush=True)

Python[SG-TRAIN2] free mem + 20-epoch single-GPU batch8 grad_acc2 (reuse m, trE, evE)[1]

  
# [SG-TRAIN2] Giai phong rac GPU + train 20 epoch single-GPU, batch8 x grad_acc2. Tai dung m (da reset B=0), trE, evE.
import gc, math, time, random, glob, datetime, torch as T
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")}]'
# free leftovers tu cac cell inference/debug
for v in ['model','out','lo_ft','lo_base','enc','ii','ll','am']:
    if v in globals():
        try: del globals()[v]
        except Exception: pass
gc.collect(); T.cuda.empty_cache()
free,total=T.cuda.mem_get_info(); print(ts(),f'GPU free={free/1e9:.1f}GB / {total/1e9:.1f}GB', flush=True)
from unsloth import FastLanguageModel
from safetensors import safe_open
assert 'm' in globals() and 'trE' in globals() and 'evE' in globals(), 'thieu m/trE/evE - chay lai [SG-TRAIN] truoc'
watchB=[p for n,p in m.named_parameters() if 'language' in n and 'lora_B' in n][0]
print(ts(),f'|B| start={watchB.abs().sum().item():.3e} (phai ~0)', flush=True)
FastLanguageModel.for_training(m)
def collate(items):
    ml=max(len(i) for i,_ in items); pid=tk.pad_token_id
    ii=T.tensor([i+[pid]*(ml-len(i)) for i,_ in items]); ll=T.tensor([l+[-100]*(ml-len(l)) for _,l in items])
    return ii.cuda(),(ii!=pid).long().cuda(),ll.cuda()
@T.no_grad()
def evaluate():
    m.eval(); tot=0.0; nt=0
    for s in range(0,len(evE),4):
        ii,am,ll=collate(evE[s:s+4]); o=m(input_ids=ii,attention_mask=am,labels=ll)
        k=(ll!=-100).sum().item(); tot+=o.loss.item()*k; nt+=k
    m.train(); return tot/max(1,nt)
BS=8; ACC=2; EPOCHS=20; OUT='/tmp/gemma4_sg_best'
starts=list(range(0,len(trE),BS)); spe=len(starts); total_steps=math.ceil(spe/ACC)*EPOCHS; warm=int(0.03*total_steps)
opt=T.optim.AdamW([p for p in m.parameters() if p.requires_grad],lr=2e-5,weight_decay=0.05)
def sched(s): return s/max(1,warm) if s<warm else 0.5*(1+math.cos(math.pi*(s-warm)/max(1,total_steps-warm)))
gs=0; best=1e9; bep=-1
print(ts(),f'START 20ep single-GPU: {spe} microbatches/ep, eff_batch={BS*ACC}, total_optstep={total_steps}', flush=True)
print(ts(),f'epoch0 pre eval_loss={evaluate():.4f}', flush=True)
for ep in range(1,EPOCHS+1):
    random.shuffle(starts); m.train(); tl=0.0; nb=0; opt.zero_grad()
    for bi,s0 in enumerate(starts):
        ii,am,ll=collate(trE[s0:s0+BS]); loss=m(input_ids=ii,attention_mask=am,labels=ll).loss/ACC
        loss.backward(); tl+=loss.item()*ACC; nb+=1
        if (bi+1)%ACC==0 or bi==len(starts)-1:
            for g in opt.param_groups: g['lr']=2e-5*sched(gs)
            T.nn.utils.clip_grad_norm_([p for p in m.parameters() if p.requires_grad],1.0)
            opt.step(); opt.zero_grad(); gs+=1
    el=evaluate(); bn=watchB.abs().sum().item(); flag=''
    if el<best:
        best=el; bep=ep; m.save_pretrained(OUT); tk.save_pretrained(OUT)
        fp=glob.glob(OUT+'/*.safetensors')[0]; nB=cB=0
        with safe_open(fp,framework='pt') as h:
            for k in h.keys():
                if 'language' in k and 'lora_B' in k: t=h.get_tensor(k); nB+=t.float().abs().sum().item(); cB+=t.numel()
        flag=f' <-SAVED best (file|B|={nB/max(1,cB):.3e})'
    print(ts(),f'epoch{ep:2d} train_loss={tl/nb:.4f} eval_loss={el:.4f} |B|={bn:.3e}{flag}', flush=True)
print(ts(),f'DONE best eval_loss={best:.4f} @ep{bep} -> {OUT}', flush=True)

Python[DDP-WRITE] write 2-GPU manual-DDP training script (B-verify + self-abort)[2]

  
# [DDP-WRITE] Ghi script train 2-GPU = DDP + manual loop (KHONG HF Trainer). Tu-kiem |lora_B| + verify file.
SCRIPT=r'''
import os, json, math, time, glob, random
os.environ.setdefault("HF_HUB_OFFLINE","1"); os.environ.setdefault("TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE","1")
os.environ.setdefault("PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF","expandable_segments:True"); os.environ.setdefault("TOKENIZERS_PARALLELISM","false")
import torch, torch.distributed as dist
import unsloth
try:
    import unsloth_zoo.temporary_patches.gemma4 as g4
    if hasattr(g4,"_Gemma4KVSharedSafeProxy"):
        def _pt(self,n): return getattr(object.__getattribute__(self,"_real"),n)
        g4._Gemma4KVSharedSafeProxy.__getattr__=_pt
except Exception as e: print("proxy",e,flush=True)
from unsloth import FastLanguageModel
from torch.nn.parallel import DistributedDataParallel as DDP
from safetensors import safe_open
rank=int(os.environ.get("RANK",0)); local=int(os.environ.get("LOCAL_RANK",0)); world=int(os.environ.get("WORLD_SIZE",1))
dist.init_process_group("nccl"); torch.cuda.set_device(local); dev=torch.device(f"cuda:{local}")
def log(*a):
    if rank==0: print("[ddp]",*a,flush=True)
MODEL="/tmp/google_gemma4_e4b_model"; D="/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/"
ML=2048; R=64; AL=128; EPOCHS=int(os.environ.get("EPOCHS","20")); BS=int(os.environ.get("BS","8")); LR=float(os.environ.get("LR","2e-5")); OUT=os.environ.get("OUT","/tmp/gemma4_ddp_best")
log(f"world={world} loading model...")
model,tok=FastLanguageModel.from_pretrained(model_name=MODEL,max_seq_length=ML,load_in_4bit=False,load_in_16bit=True,full_finetuning=False,local_files_only=True)
tok=getattr(tok,"tokenizer",tok)
if tok.pad_token is None: tok.pad_token=tok.eos_token
model=FastLanguageModel.get_peft_model(model,r=R,target_modules=["q_proj","k_proj","v_proj","o_proj","gate_proj","up_proj","down_proj"],lora_alpha=AL,lora_dropout=0.0,bias="none",use_rslora=True,use_gradient_checkpointing="unsloth")
for n,p in model.named_parameters():
    if any(k in n for k in ["vision_tower","audio_tower","embed_vision","embed_audio"]): p.requires_grad_(False)
FastLanguageModel.for_training(model)
watchB=[p for n,p in model.named_parameters() if "language" in n and "lora_B" in n][0]
log(f"init |B|={watchB.abs().sum().item():.3e} trainable={sum(p.numel() for p in model.parameters() if p.requires_grad)/1e6:.1f}M")
def load_msgs(path):
    out=[]
    for l in open(path):
        r=json.loads(l); mm=r.get("messages")
        if not mm: continue
        mm=json.loads(mm) if isinstance(mm,str) else mm
        if any(x.get("role")=="assistant" and str(x.get("content","")).strip() for x in mm): out.append(mm)
    return out
def enc(mm):
    pm=[x for x in mm if x["role"]!="assistant"]; comp=str([x for x in mm if x["role"]=="assistant"][-1]["content"])
    pids=tok(tok.apply_chat_template(pm,tokenize=False,add_generation_prompt=True),add_special_tokens=False)["input_ids"]
    cids=tok(comp,add_special_tokens=False)["input_ids"]+[tok.eos_token_id]
    if len(pids)+len(cids)>ML:
        kp=max(0,ML-len(cids)); pids=pids[-kp:] if kp else []; cids=cids[:ML-len(pids)]
    return pids+cids, [-100]*len(pids)+cids
trE=[enc(x) for x in load_msgs(D+"train.jsonl")]; trE=[e for e in trE if any(t!=-100 for t in e[1])]
evE=[enc(x) for x in load_msgs(D+"eval.jsonl")]; evE=[e for e in evE if any(t!=-100 for t in e[1])]
trE.sort(key=lambda e: len(e[0]))
log(f"train={len(trE)} eval={len(evE)}")
def collate(items):
    ml=max(len(i) for i,_ in items); pid=tok.pad_token_id
    ii=torch.tensor([i+[pid]*(ml-len(i)) for i,_ in items]); ll=torch.tensor([l+[-100]*(ml-len(l)) for _,l in items])
    return ii.to(dev),(ii!=pid).long().to(dev),ll.to(dev)
ddp=DDP(model,device_ids=[local],find_unused_parameters=False,gradient_as_bucket_view=True)
opt=torch.optim.AdamW([p for p in model.parameters() if p.requires_grad],lr=LR,weight_decay=0.05)
nsteps=(len(trE)//world)//BS; total=nsteps*EPOCHS; warm=max(1,int(0.03*total))
def sched(s): return s/warm if s<warm else 0.5*(1+math.cos(math.pi*(s-warm)/max(1,total-warm)))
@torch.no_grad()
def evaluate():
    model.eval(); tot=0.0; nt=0
    for s in range(0,len(evE),4):
        ii,am,ll=collate(evE[s:s+4]); o=model(input_ids=ii,attention_mask=am,labels=ll)
        k=(ll!=-100).sum().item(); tot+=o.loss.item()*k; nt+=k
    model.train(); return tot/max(1,nt)
log(f"nsteps/ep={nsteps} total={total}")
if rank==0: log(f"epoch0 eval={evaluate():.4f}")
gs=0; best=1e9; bep=-1; abort=torch.zeros(1,device=dev)
for ep in range(1,EPOCHS+1):
    sh=trE[rank::world]; idx=list(range(nsteps)); random.Random(ep).shuffle(idx)
    ddp.train(); tl=0.0
    for st in idx:
        items=sh[st*BS:(st+1)*BS]
        if len(items)<1: continue
        ii,am,ll=collate(items)
        for g in opt.param_groups: g["lr"]=LR*sched(gs)
        loss=ddp(input_ids=ii,attention_mask=am,labels=ll).loss
        loss.backward(); torch.nn.utils.clip_grad_norm_([p for p in model.parameters() if p.requires_grad],1.0)
        opt.step(); opt.zero_grad(); gs+=1; tl+=loss.item()
        if gs%10==0: log(f"ep{ep} gs{gs} loss={loss.item():.4f} |B|={watchB.abs().sum().item():.3e} lr={opt.param_groups[0]['lr']:.2e}")
        if gs==12:
            bn=watchB.abs().sum().item()
            if rank==0 and bn<1e-7: abort[0]=1.0; log("!!! SELF-CHECK FAIL: |B|~0 sau 12 step -> ABORT")
            dist.all_reduce(abort,op=dist.ReduceOp.MAX)
            if abort.item()>0: break
    if abort.item()>0: break
    if rank==0:
        el=evaluate(); bn=watchB.abs().sum().item(); flag=""
        if el<best:
            best=el; bep=ep; model.save_pretrained(OUT); tok.save_pretrained(OUT)
            fp=glob.glob(OUT+"/*.safetensors")[0]; nB=cB=0
            with safe_open(fp,framework="pt") as h:
                for k in h.keys():
                    if "language" in k and "lora_B" in k: t=h.get_tensor(k); nB+=t.float().abs().sum().item(); cB+=t.numel()
            flag=f" SAVED best (file|B|={nB/max(1,cB):.3e})"
        log(f"== epoch{ep} train_loss={tl/max(1,nsteps):.4f} eval={el:.4f} |B|={bn:.3e}{flag}")
    dist.barrier()
if rank==0 and abort.item()==0: log(f"DONE best eval={best:.4f} @ep{bep} -> {OUT}")
dist.destroy_process_group()
'''
open('/tmp/ddp_train.py','w').write(SCRIPT)
import os
print('written /tmp/ddp_train.py', len(SCRIPT),'bytes')
print('model present:', os.path.exists('/tmp/google_gemma4_e4b_model/model.safetensors'))
print('data present:', os.path.exists('/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/train.jsonl'))

model present: True
data present: True






  
Python[DDP-RUN] launch torchrun 2-GPU 20 epochs (stream, self-abort)[3]

  
# [DDP-RUN] torchrun nproc=2 chay /tmp/ddp_train.py, EPOCHS=20. Stream. Self-check abort neu B~0 o step12.
import os, sys, subprocess, time, datetime, signal
t0=time.time()
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")} +{time.time()-t0:6.1f}s]'
env=dict(os.environ); env.update({'EPOCHS':'20','BS':'8','LR':'2e-5','OUT':'/tmp/gemma4_ddp_best','HF_HUB_OFFLINE':'1','TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE':'1','PYTHONUNBUFFERED':'1','PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF':'expandable_segments:True'})
cmd=[sys.executable,'-m','torch.distributed.run','--standalone','--nproc_per_node=2','/tmp/ddp_train.py']
print(ts(),'launch 2-GPU DDP (model load ~3min, then self-check @step12)...', flush=True)
p=subprocess.Popen(cmd,env=env,stdout=subprocess.PIPE,stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,text=True,bufsize=1)
try:
    for line in p.stdout:
        s=line.rstrip()
        if ('[ddp]' in s) or ('Error' in s) or ('Traceback' in s) or ('OutOfMemory' in s) or ('abort' in s.lower()) or ('SAVED' in s):
            print(ts(), s[-200:], flush=True)
    p.wait(); print(ts(),'EXIT rc=',p.returncode, flush=True)
except KeyboardInterrupt:
    print(ts(),'INTERRUPT -> stop torchrun', flush=True); p.send_signal(signal.SIGINT); time.sleep(5)
    if p.poll() is None: p.terminate()
    if p.poll() is None: p.kill()

import subprocess, os, glob, datetime
def ts(): return '['+datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%H:%M:%S')+']'
def sh(c): return subprocess.run(c,shell=True,capture_output=True,text=True).stdout
print(ts(),'procs ddp_train / torchrun:', flush=True)
print(sh("ps -eo pid,etime,pcpu,cmd | grep -E 'ddp_train|torch.distributed.run' | grep -v grep") or '  (none running)', flush=True)

print(sh('nvidia-smi --query-gpu=index,memory.used,utilization.gpu --format=csv,noheader'), flush=True)
print(ts(),'saved best dir /tmp/gemma4_ddp_best:', flush=True)

import subprocess, time, datetime
def ts(): return '['+datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%H:%M:%S')+']'
def sh(c): return subprocess.run(c,shell=True,capture_output=True,text=True).stdout
sh('pkill -9 -f ddp_train'); sh('pkill -9 -f torch.distributed.run'); time.sleep(4)
print(ts(),'remaining procs:', sh("ps -eo pid,cmd | grep -E 'ddp_train|distributed.run' | grep -v grep") or '(none)', flush=True)
print(ts(),'GPU:', flush=True)
print(sh('nvidia-smi --query-gpu=index,memory.used,utilization.gpu --format=csv,noheader'), flush=True)
