Python[DDP-RUN2] launch-or-attach watcher + heartbeat (interrupt-safe)[3]

  
# [DDP-RUN2] Launch torchrun 2-GPU nen (start_new_session, KHONG kill khi interrupt). Watcher + heartbeat 15s.
# Neu da co tien trinh ddp_train -> CHI xem tiep (khong launch lai). Ngat cell nay = train van chay nen.
import os, sys, subprocess, time, datetime, glob
t0=time.time(); LOG='/tmp/ddp.log'
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")} +{time.time()-t0:5.0f}s]'
def sh(c): return subprocess.run(c,shell=True,capture_output=True,text=True).stdout
running = sh("pgrep -f ddp_train.py").strip()
if running:
    print(ts(),'da co ddp_train dang chay (pid',running.replace(chr(10),","),') -> chi xem tiep.', flush=True)
else:
    env=dict(os.environ); env.update({'EPOCHS':'20','BS':'8','LR':'2e-5','OUT':'/tmp/gemma4_ddp_best','HF_HUB_OFFLINE':'1','TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE':'1','PYTHONUNBUFFERED':'1','PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF':'expandable_segments:True'})
    cmd=[sys.executable,'-m','torch.distributed.run','--standalone','--nproc_per_node=2','/tmp/ddp_train.py']
    open(LOG,'w').close()
    p=subprocess.Popen(cmd,env=env,stdout=open(LOG,'a'),stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,text=True,start_new_session=True)
    print(ts(),'launched pid',p.pid,'(nen). Load ~5min; self-check @step12. DUNG NGAT cho toi khi thay gs10/SELF-CHECK.', flush=True)
pos=0; last=0
try:
    while True:
        alive=sh("pgrep -f ddp_train.py").strip()
        if os.path.exists(LOG):
            with open(LOG) as f: f.seek(pos); new=f.read(); pos=f.tell()
            for ln in new.splitlines():
                if ('[ddp]' in ln) or ('Error' in ln) or ('Traceback' in ln) or ('OutOfMemory' in ln) or ('abort' in ln.lower()) or ('SAVED' in ln): print(ts(), ln[-200:], flush=True)
        if time.time()-last>15:
            g=sh("nvidia-smi --query-gpu=utilization.gpu,memory.used --format=csv,noheader").replace(chr(10),' | ')
            print(ts(),f'heartbeat alive={"yes" if alive else "NO(exited)"} GPU[{g.strip()}]', flush=True); last=time.time()
        if not alive:
            print(ts(),'process ended. Tail:', flush=True); print(sh('tail -n 8 '+LOG), flush=True); break
        time.sleep(3)
except KeyboardInterrupt:
    print(ts(),'NGUNG XEM (train VAN chay nen). Chay lai cell nay de xem tiep.', flush=True)

Python[KILL-ALL] nuke all training procs, verify GPU empty[7]

  
import subprocess, time, datetime
def ts(): return '['+datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%H:%M:%S')+']'
def sh(c): return subprocess.run(c,shell=True,capture_output=True,text=True).stdout
for pat in ['ddp_train','torch.distributed.run','torchrun','elastic_agent','torch.distributed.elastic']:
    sh(f'pkill -9 -f {pat}')
time.sleep(5)
print(ts(),'remaining train procs:', sh("ps -eo pid,cmd | grep -E 'ddp_train|distributed|torchrun' | grep -v grep") or '(none)', flush=True)
print(ts(),'all python procs:', flush=True)
print(sh("ps -eo pid,pcpu,rss,cmd | grep python | grep -v grep | head -20"), flush=True)
print(ts(),'GPU:', flush=True)
print(sh('nvidia-smi --query-gpu=index,memory.used,utilization.gpu --format=csv,noheader'), flush=True)

Python[INSPECT] what is the running ddp proc + its log

  
import subprocess, os, datetime
def ts(): return '['+datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%H:%M:%S')+']'
def sh(c): return subprocess.run(c,shell=True,capture_output=True,text=True).stdout
print(ts(),'all ddp/torchrun procs (pid ppid etime cmd):', flush=True)
print(sh("ps -eo pid,ppid,etime,pcpu,cmd | grep -E 'ddp_train|distributed.run' | grep -v grep") or '(none)', flush=True)
print(ts(),'GPU:', sh('nvidia-smi --query-gpu=index,memory.used,utilization.gpu --format=csv,noheader'), flush=True)
print(ts(),'nvidia-smi compute procs:', flush=True)
print(sh('nvidia-smi --query-compute-apps=pid,used_memory --format=csv,noheader') or '(none)', flush=True)
print(ts(),'/tmp/ddp.log tail:', flush=True)
print(sh('tail -n 20 /tmp/ddp.log 2>/dev/null') or '(no log)', flush=True)

  




  
Python[DDP-GO] clean-launch 2-GPU + clear streaming (mem heartbeat, per-step log)[4]

  
# [DDP-GO] Don proc cu -> launch 2-GPU moi -> stream RO (moi dong log + heartbeat 10s co GPU mem).
import os, sys, subprocess, time, datetime
t0=time.time(); LOG='/tmp/ddp.log'
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")} +{time.time()-t0:4.0f}s]'
def sh(c): return subprocess.run(c,shell=True,capture_output=True,text=True).stdout

# --- ghi script (logging ro hon: per-step 15 step dau + moc load) ---
SCRIPT=r'''
import os, json, math, glob, random, time
os.environ.setdefault("HF_HUB_OFFLINE","1"); os.environ.setdefault("TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE","1")
os.environ.setdefault("PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF","expandable_segments:True"); os.environ.setdefault("TOKENIZERS_PARALLELISM","false")
import torch, torch.distributed as dist
def now(): return time.strftime("%H:%M:%S")
import unsloth
try:
    import unsloth_zoo.temporary_patches.gemma4 as g4
    if hasattr(g4,"_Gemma4KVSharedSafeProxy"):
        def _pt(self,n): return getattr(object.__getattribute__(self,"_real"),n)
        g4._Gemma4KVSharedSafeProxy.__getattr__=_pt
except Exception as e: print("proxy",e,flush=True)
from unsloth import FastLanguageModel
from torch.nn.parallel import DistributedDataParallel as DDP
from safetensors import safe_open
rank=int(os.environ.get("RANK",0)); local=int(os.environ.get("LOCAL_RANK",0)); world=int(os.environ.get("WORLD_SIZE",1))
dist.init_process_group("nccl"); torch.cuda.set_device(local); dev=torch.device(f"cuda:{local}")
def log(*a):
    if rank==0: print(f"[ddp {now()}]",*a,flush=True)
MODEL="/tmp/google_gemma4_e4b_model"; D="/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/"
ML=2048; R=64; AL=128; EPOCHS=int(os.environ.get("EPOCHS","20")); BS=int(os.environ.get("BS","8")); LR=float(os.environ.get("LR","2e-5")); OUT=os.environ.get("OUT","/tmp/gemma4_ddp_best")
log(f"world={world} -> loading 16GB model (mat ~3-5min)...")
model,tok=FastLanguageModel.from_pretrained(model_name=MODEL,max_seq_length=ML,load_in_4bit=False,load_in_16bit=True,full_finetuning=False,local_files_only=True)
log("model loaded -> building LoRA r64")
tok=getattr(tok,"tokenizer",tok)
if tok.pad_token is None: tok.pad_token=tok.eos_token
model=FastLanguageModel.get_peft_model(model,r=R,target_modules=["q_proj","k_proj","v_proj","o_proj","gate_proj","up_proj","down_proj"],lora_alpha=AL,lora_dropout=0.0,bias="none",use_rslora=True,use_gradient_checkpointing="unsloth")
for n,p in model.named_parameters():
    if any(k in n for k in ["vision_tower","audio_tower","embed_vision","embed_audio"]): p.requires_grad_(False)
FastLanguageModel.for_training(model)
watchB=[p for n,p in model.named_parameters() if "language" in n and "lora_B" in n][0]
log(f"LoRA ready init|B|={watchB.abs().sum().item():.3e} trainable={sum(p.numel() for p in model.parameters() if p.requires_grad)/1e6:.1f}M")
def lm(path):
    o=[]
    for l in open(path):
        r=json.loads(l); mm=r.get("messages")
        if not mm: continue
        mm=json.loads(mm) if isinstance(mm,str) else mm
        if any(x.get("role")=="assistant" and str(x.get("content","")).strip() for x in mm): o.append(mm)
    return o
def enc(mm):
    pm=[x for x in mm if x["role"]!="assistant"]; c=str([x for x in mm if x["role"]=="assistant"][-1]["content"])
    pids=tok(tok.apply_chat_template(pm,tokenize=False,add_generation_prompt=True),add_special_tokens=False)["input_ids"]
    cids=tok(c,add_special_tokens=False)["input_ids"]+[tok.eos_token_id]
    if len(pids)+len(cids)>ML:
        kp=max(0,ML-len(cids)); pids=pids[-kp:] if kp else []; cids=cids[:ML-len(pids)]
    return pids+cids, [-100]*len(pids)+cids
trE=[e for e in (enc(x) for x in lm(D+"train.jsonl")) if any(t!=-100 for t in e[1])]
evE=[e for e in (enc(x) for x in lm(D+"eval.jsonl")) if any(t!=-100 for t in e[1])]
trE.sort(key=lambda e:len(e[0]))
log(f"data ready train={len(trE)} eval={len(evE)}")
def coll(items):
    ml=max(len(i) for i,_ in items); pid=tok.pad_token_id
    ii=torch.tensor([i+[pid]*(ml-len(i)) for i,_ in items]); ll=torch.tensor([l+[-100]*(ml-len(l)) for _,l in items])
    return ii.to(dev),(ii!=pid).long().to(dev),ll.to(dev)
ddp=DDP(model,device_ids=[local],find_unused_parameters=False,gradient_as_bucket_view=True)
opt=torch.optim.AdamW([p for p in model.parameters() if p.requires_grad],lr=LR,weight_decay=0.05)
nst=(len(trE)//world)//BS; total=nst*EPOCHS; warm=max(1,int(0.03*total))
sched=lambda s:s/warm if s<warm else 0.5*(1+math.cos(math.pi*(s-warm)/max(1,total-warm)))
@torch.no_grad()
def ev():
    model.eval(); t=0.0; n=0
    for s in range(0,len(evE),4):
        ii,am,ll=coll(evE[s:s+4]); o=model(input_ids=ii,attention_mask=am,labels=ll); k=(ll!=-100).sum().item(); t+=o.loss.item()*k; n+=k
    model.train(); return t/max(1,n)
log(f"nsteps/ep={nst} total_steps={total} -> bat dau train")
if rank==0: log(f"epoch0 (chua train) eval_loss={ev():.4f}")
gs=0; best=1e9; bep=-1; ab=torch.zeros(1,device=dev)
for ep in range(1,EPOCHS+1):
    sh=trE[rank::world]; idx=list(range(nst)); random.Random(ep).shuffle(idx); ddp.train(); tl=0.0
    for j,st in enumerate(idx):
        it=sh[st*BS:(st+1)*BS]
        if not it: continue
        ii,am,ll=coll(it)
        for g in opt.param_groups: g["lr"]=LR*sched(gs)
        loss=ddp(input_ids=ii,attention_mask=am,labels=ll).loss
        loss.backward(); torch.nn.utils.clip_grad_norm_([p for p in model.parameters() if p.requires_grad],1.0)
        opt.step(); opt.zero_grad(); gs+=1; tl+=loss.item()
        if gs<=15 or gs%10==0: log(f"ep{ep} step{gs}/{total} loss={loss.item():.4f} |B|={watchB.abs().sum().item():.3e} lr={opt.param_groups[0]['lr']:.2e}")
        if gs==12:
            bn=watchB.abs().sum().item()
            if rank==0 and bn<1e-7: ab[0]=1.0; log("!!! SELF-CHECK FAIL |B|~0 -> ABORT")
            elif rank==0: log(f">>> SELF-CHECK OK: |B|={bn:.3e} (>0) -> 2-GPU train DUNG, chay tiep")
            dist.all_reduce(ab,op=dist.ReduceOp.MAX)
            if ab.item()>0: break
    if ab.item()>0: break
    if rank==0:
        el=ev(); bn=watchB.abs().sum().item(); fl=""
        if el<best:
            best=el; bep=ep; model.save_pretrained(OUT); tok.save_pretrained(OUT)
            fp=glob.glob(OUT+"/*.safetensors")[0]; nB=cB=0
            with safe_open(fp,framework="pt") as h:
                for k in h.keys():
                    if "language" in k and "lora_B" in k: t=h.get_tensor(k); nB+=t.float().abs().sum().item(); cB+=t.numel()
            fl=f" <== SAVED best (file|B|={nB/max(1,cB):.3e})"
        log(f"##### EPOCH {ep}/{EPOCHS} done: train_loss={tl/max(1,nst):.4f} eval_loss={el:.4f} |B|={bn:.3e}{fl}")
    dist.barrier()
if rank==0 and ab.item()==0: log(f"ALL DONE best eval_loss={best:.4f} @epoch{bep} -> {OUT}")
dist.destroy_process_group()
'''
open('/tmp/ddp_train.py','w').write(SCRIPT)

# --- don proc cu ---
for pat in ['ddp_train','torch.distributed.run','torchrun','torch.distributed.elastic']: sh(f'pkill -9 -f {pat}')
time.sleep(4)
print(ts(),'cleaned. GPU:', sh('nvidia-smi --query-gpu=index,memory.used,utilization.gpu --format=csv,noheader').strip().replace(chr(10),' || '), flush=True)

# --- launch fresh ---
env=dict(os.environ); env.update({'EPOCHS':'20','BS':'8','LR':'2e-5','OUT':'/tmp/gemma4_ddp_best','HF_HUB_OFFLINE':'1','TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE':'1','PYTHONUNBUFFERED':'1','PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF':'expandable_segments:True'})
cmd=[sys.executable,'-m','torch.distributed.run','--standalone','--nproc_per_node=2','/tmp/ddp_train.py']
open(LOG,'w').close()
p=subprocess.Popen(cmd,env=env,stdout=open(LOG,'a'),stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,text=True,start_new_session=True)
print(ts(),f'LAUNCHED pid={p.pid}. Cho [ddp ...] xuat hien. GPU mem se tang dan 0->~16GB khi nap model.', flush=True)

# --- stream ro: moi dong log + heartbeat 10s co GPU mem ---
pos=0; last=time.time()
try:
    while True:
        alive=sh('pgrep -f ddp_train.py').strip()
        with open(LOG) as f: f.seek(pos); new=f.read(); pos=f.tell()
        for ln in new.splitlines():
            if ln.strip(): print(ts(), ln[-200:], flush=True)
        if time.time()-last>10:
            g=sh('nvidia-smi --query-gpu=memory.used,utilization.gpu --format=csv,noheader').strip().replace(chr(10),' | ')
            print(ts(),f'... heartbeat alive={"yes" if alive else "ENDED"} GPU[{g}]', flush=True); last=time.time()
        if not alive:
            with open(LOG) as f: f.seek(pos); print(f.read(), flush=True)
            print(ts(),'PROCESS ENDED.', flush=True); break
        time.sleep(3)
except KeyboardInterrupt:
    print(ts(),'ngung xem (train VAN chay nen pid',p.pid,'). Chay [DDP-RUN2] de xem tiep.', flush=True)

Python[PEEK] read ddp.log [ddp] lines + rank count + GPU[7]

  
import subprocess, datetime
def ts(): return '['+datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%H:%M:%S')+']'
def sh(c): return subprocess.run(c,shell=True,capture_output=True,text=True).stdout
print(ts(),'=== [ddp] log lines ===', flush=True)
print(sh("grep '\\[ddp' /tmp/ddp.log | tail -40") or '(chua co dong [ddp] nao)', flush=True)
print(ts(),'=== rank procs (dem may rank) ===', flush=True)
print(sh("ps -eo pid,etime,pcpu,rss,cmd | grep ddp_train.py | grep -v grep") or '(none)', flush=True)
print(ts(),'=== GPU + compute-apps ===', flush=True)
print(sh('nvidia-smi --query-gpu=index,memory.used,utilization.gpu --format=csv,noheader'), flush=True)
print(sh('nvidia-smi --query-compute-apps=pid,used_memory --format=csv,noheader') or '(none)', flush=True)
print(ts(),'=== last 8 raw log lines ===', flush=True)
print(sh('tail -n 8 /tmp/ddp.log'), flush=True)

import subprocess, datetime
def ts(): return '['+datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%H:%M:%S')+']'
def sh(c): return subprocess.run(c,shell=True,capture_output=True,text=True).stdout
print(ts(),'=== [ddp] log lines ===', flush=True)
print(sh("grep '\\[ddp' /tmp/ddp.log | tail -n 30") or '(chua co dong [ddp] nao)', flush=True)
print(ts(),'=== compute-apps (pid -> GPU mem) ===', flush=True)
print(sh('nvidia-smi --query-compute-apps=gpu_uuid,pid,used_memory --format=csv,noheader') or '(none)', flush=True)
print(ts(),'=== GPU ===', flush=True)
print(sh('nvidia-smi --query-gpu=index,memory.used,utilization.gpu --format=csv,noheader'), flush=True)
print(ts(),'procs:', sh("ps -eo pid,etime,cmd | grep ddp_train | grep -v grep") or '(none)', flush=True)
print(ts(),'saved?', sh('ls /tmp/gemma4_ddp_best 2>/dev/null') or '(chua luu)', flush=True)

  




  
Python[DDP-GO2] FIX device (CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=LOCAL_RANK) + relaunch + stream[6]

  
# [DDP-GO2] Va script: moi rank chi thay 1 GPU (sua 'ca 2 rank tren GPU0'). Kill cu -> launch -> stream ro.
import os, sys, subprocess, time, datetime
t0=time.time(); LOG='/tmp/ddp.log'
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")} +{time.time()-t0:4.0f}s]'
def sh(c): return subprocess.run(c,shell=True,capture_output=True,text=True).stdout
# --- patch: chen CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=LOCAL_RANK truoc import torch ---
src=open('/tmp/ddp_train.py').read()
if 'CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES' not in src:
    src=src.replace('import torch, torch.distributed as dist','os.environ["CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES"]=os.environ.get("LOCAL_RANK","0")\nimport torch, torch.distributed as dist',1)
    open('/tmp/ddp_train.py','w').write(src); print(ts(),'patched: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES per-rank added', flush=True)
else:
    print(ts(),'already patched', flush=True)
# --- kill stale ---
for pat in ['ddp_train','torch.distributed.run','torchrun','torch.distributed.elastic']: sh(f'pkill -9 -f {pat}')
time.sleep(5)
print(ts(),'cleaned. GPU:', sh('nvidia-smi --query-gpu=index,memory.used,utilization.gpu --format=csv,noheader').strip().replace(chr(10),' || '), flush=True)
# --- launch fresh (KHONG set CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES o launcher env de torchrun tu set LOCAL_RANK) ---
env=dict(os.environ); env.pop('CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES',None)
env.update({'EPOCHS':'20','BS':'8','LR':'2e-5','OUT':'/tmp/gemma4_ddp_best','HF_HUB_OFFLINE':'1','TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE':'1','PYTHONUNBUFFERED':'1','PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF':'expandable_segments:True'})
cmd=[sys.executable,'-m','torch.distributed.run','--standalone','--nproc_per_node=2','/tmp/ddp_train.py']
open(LOG,'w').close()
p=subprocess.Popen(cmd,env=env,stdout=open(LOG,'a'),stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,text=True,start_new_session=True)
print(ts(),f'LAUNCHED pid={p.pid}. Lan nay GPU0 va GPU1 deu phai tang mem (~16GB moi cai).', flush=True)
pos=0; last=time.time()
try:
    while True:
        alive=sh('pgrep -f ddp_train.py').strip()
        with open(LOG) as f: f.seek(pos); new=f.read(); pos=f.tell()
        for ln in new.splitlines():
            if ln.strip(): print(ts(), ln[-200:], flush=True)
        if time.time()-last>10:
            g=sh('nvidia-smi --query-gpu=memory.used,utilization.gpu --format=csv,noheader').strip().replace(chr(10),' | ')
            print(ts(),f'... hb alive={"yes" if alive else "ENDED"} GPU[{g}]', flush=True); last=time.time()
        if not alive:
            with open(LOG) as f: f.seek(pos); print(f.read(), flush=True)
            print(ts(),'ENDED.', flush=True); break
        time.sleep(3)
except KeyboardInterrupt:
    print(ts(),'ngung xem (train van chay nen pid',p.pid,').', flush=True)

Python[DDP-GO3] fix device index ->0 (CVD isolates) + relaunch + stream[8]

  
# [DDP-GO3] Voi CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES per-rank, moi rank chi thay 1 GPU=index0 -> set_device(0), cuda:0, device_ids=[0].
import os, sys, subprocess, time, datetime
t0=time.time(); LOG='/tmp/ddp.log'
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")} +{time.time()-t0:4.0f}s]'
def sh(c): return subprocess.run(c,shell=True,capture_output=True,text=True).stdout
src=open('/tmp/ddp_train.py').read()
src=src.replace('torch.cuda.set_device(local); dev=torch.device(f"cuda:{local}")','torch.cuda.set_device(0); dev=torch.device("cuda:0")')
src=src.replace('device_ids=[local]','device_ids=[0]')
open('/tmp/ddp_train.py','w').write(src)
print(ts(),'patched device->0. checks:', 'set_device(0)' in src, 'device_ids=[0]' in src, 'CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES' in src, flush=True)
for pat in ['ddp_train','torch.distributed.run','torchrun','torch.distributed.elastic']: sh(f'pkill -9 -f {pat}')
time.sleep(5)
print(ts(),'cleaned GPU:', sh('nvidia-smi --query-gpu=index,memory.used --format=csv,noheader').strip().replace(chr(10),' || '), flush=True)
env=dict(os.environ); env.pop('CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES',None)
env.update({'EPOCHS':'20','BS':'8','LR':'2e-5','OUT':'/tmp/gemma4_ddp_best','HF_HUB_OFFLINE':'1','TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE':'1','PYTHONUNBUFFERED':'1','PYTORCH_ALLOC_CONF':'expandable_segments:True'})
cmd=[sys.executable,'-m','torch.distributed.run','--standalone','--nproc_per_node=2','/tmp/ddp_train.py']
open(LOG,'w').close()
p=subprocess.Popen(cmd,env=env,stdout=open(LOG,'a'),stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,text=True,start_new_session=True)
print(ts(),f'LAUNCHED pid={p.pid}. Cho 2 GPU cung tang mem ~16GB; roi gs1..15 + SELF-CHECK.', flush=True)
pos=0; last=time.time()
try:
    while True:
        alive=sh('pgrep -f ddp_train.py').strip()
        with open(LOG) as f: f.seek(pos); new=f.read(); pos=f.tell()
        for ln in new.splitlines():
            if ln.strip(): print(ts(), ln[-200:], flush=True)
        if time.time()-last>10:
            g=sh('nvidia-smi --query-gpu=memory.used,utilization.gpu --format=csv,noheader').strip().replace(chr(10),' | ')
            print(ts(),f'... hb alive={"yes" if alive else "ENDED"} GPU[{g}]', flush=True); last=time.time()
        if not alive:
            with open(LOG) as f: f.seek(pos); print(f.read(), flush=True)
            print(ts(),'ENDED.', flush=True); break
        time.sleep(3)
except KeyboardInterrupt:
    print(ts(),'ngung xem (train van chay nen pid',p.pid,').', flush=True)

Python[WATCH-MIN] meaningful progress, 1/min (no heartbeat spam)[25]

  
# [WATCH-MIN] Theo doi train nen (pid ddp_train). In moc quan trong ngay khi xuat hien + trang thai 60s/lan.
# Khong spam heartbeat. Ngat = chi ngung xem, train van chay.
import subprocess, time, datetime
LOG='/tmp/ddp.log'; t0=time.time(); pos=0; last_status=0
def sh(c): return subprocess.run(c,shell=True,capture_output=True,text=True).stdout
def clk(): return datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%H:%M:%S')
IMPORTANT=('model loaded','data ready','SELF-CHECK','EPOCH','SAVED','ALL DONE','ABORT','Error','Traceback','OutOfMemory','nsteps')
last_ddp='(chua co)'
print(f'[{clk()}] bat dau theo doi (60s/lan + moc quan trong)...', flush=True)
try:
    while True:
        alive=sh('pgrep -f ddp_train.py').strip()
        with open(LOG) as f: f.seek(pos); new=f.read(); pos=f.tell()
        for ln in new.splitlines():
            if '[ddp' in ln:
                last_ddp=ln.strip()
                if any(k in ln for k in IMPORTANT): print(f'[{clk()}] >> {ln.strip()[-200:]}', flush=True)
        if time.time()-last_status>=60:
            mem=sh('nvidia-smi --query-gpu=memory.used --format=csv,noheader').strip().replace(chr(10),' / ')
            el=int(time.time()-t0)
            print(f'[{clk()}] (+{el//60}m{el%60}s) dang o: {last_ddp[-160:]} | GPU mem {mem}', flush=True)
            last_status=time.time()
        if not alive:
            with open(LOG) as f: f.seek(pos); rest=f.read()
            for ln in rest.splitlines():
                if '[ddp' in ln: print(f'[{clk()}] >> {ln.strip()[-200:]}', flush=True)
            print(f'[{clk()}] === PROCESS KET THUC ===', flush=True); break
        time.sleep(5)
except KeyboardInterrupt:
    print(f'[{clk()}] ngung xem (train van chay nen). dang o: {last_ddp[-160:]}', flush=True)

  
[18:15:37] bat dau theo doi (60s/lan + moc quan trong)...



[18:15:37] (+0m0s) dang o: (chua co) | GPU mem 755 MiB / 3 MiB



[18:16:37] (+1m0s) dang o: [ddp 18:16:29] world=2 -> loading 16GB model (mat ~3-5min)... | GPU mem 1694 MiB / 943 MiB



[18:17:37] (+2m0s) dang o: [ddp 18:16:29] world=2 -> loading 16GB model (mat ~3-5min)... | GPU mem 1694 MiB / 943 MiB



[18:18:38] (+3m0s) dang o: [ddp 18:16:29] world=2 -> loading 16GB model (mat ~3-5min)... | GPU mem 1694 MiB / 943 MiB

Python[DDP-GO4] grad_ckpt unsloth->True (DDP-compat) + relaunch[10]

  
# [DDP-GO4] Doi use_gradient_checkpointing 'unsloth'->True (HF, tuong thich DDP). Kill+launch. Roi chay [WATCH-MIN].
import os, sys, subprocess, time, datetime
def ts(): return '['+datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%H:%M:%S')+']'
def sh(c): return subprocess.run(c,shell=True,capture_output=True,text=True).stdout
src=open('/tmp/ddp_train.py').read()
src=src.replace('use_gradient_checkpointing="unsloth"','use_gradient_checkpointing=True')
open('/tmp/ddp_train.py','w').write(src)
print(ts(),'grad_ckpt=True set:', 'use_gradient_checkpointing=True' in src, '| CVD:', 'CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES' in src, '| dev0:', 'set_device(0)' in src, flush=True)
for pat in ['ddp_train','torch.distributed.run','torchrun','torch.distributed.elastic']: sh(f'pkill -9 -f {pat}')
time.sleep(5)
print(ts(),'GPU:', sh('nvidia-smi --query-gpu=index,memory.used --format=csv,noheader').strip().replace(chr(10),' || '), flush=True)
env=dict(os.environ); env.pop('CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES',None)
env.update({'EPOCHS':'20','BS':'8','LR':'2e-5','OUT':'/tmp/gemma4_ddp_best','HF_HUB_OFFLINE':'1','TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE':'1','PYTHONUNBUFFERED':'1','PYTORCH_ALLOC_CONF':'expandable_segments:True'})
cmd=[sys.executable,'-m','torch.distributed.run','--standalone','--nproc_per_node=2','/tmp/ddp_train.py']
open('/tmp/ddp.log','w').close()
p=subprocess.Popen(cmd,env=env,stdout=open('/tmp/ddp.log','a'),stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,text=True,start_new_session=True)
print(ts(),f'LAUNCHED pid={p.pid}. Chay cell [WATCH-MIN] de theo doi (model load ~3-4min roi SELF-CHECK @step12).', flush=True)

import subprocess, glob, os, datetime
from safetensors import safe_open
def ts(): return '['+datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%H:%M:%S')+']'
def sh(c): return subprocess.run(c,shell=True,capture_output=True,text=True).stdout
print(ts(),'cac lan SAVED best trong log:', flush=True)
print(sh("grep SAVED /tmp/ddp.log") or '(chua co)', flush=True)
O='/tmp/gemma4_ddp_best'
if os.path.isdir(O):
    f=glob.glob(O+'/*.safetensors')
    print(ts(),'files:', sorted(os.path.basename(x) for x in glob.glob(O+'/*')), flush=True)
    if f:
        nB=cB=0
        with safe_open(f[0],framework='pt') as h:
            for k in h.keys():
                if 'language' in k and 'lora_B' in k: t=h.get_tensor(k); nB+=t.float().abs().sum().item(); cB+=t.numel()
        print(ts(),f'adapter mtime={datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp(os.path.getmtime(f[0])).strftime("%H:%M:%S")} | language lora_B mean|w|={nB/max(1,cB):.3e}  -> {"OK (B!=0)" if nB/max(1,cB)>1e-7 else "B=0!"}', flush=True)
else:
    print(ts(),'chua co thu muc best', flush=True)

Python[SAVE-2GPU-BEST] snapshot + PUT best (B!=0) to stage[14]

  
# [SAVE-2GPU-BEST] Snapshot /tmp/gemma4_ddp_best (tranh doc lúc train ghi) -> PUT len stage. Verify B!=0.
import os, glob, shutil, datetime, time
from safetensors import safe_open
from snowflake.snowpark.context import get_active_session
session=get_active_session()
def ts(): return '['+datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%H:%M:%S')+']'
SRC='/tmp/gemma4_ddp_best'; SNAP='/tmp/best_snapshot'
if os.path.isdir(SNAP): shutil.rmtree(SNAP)
shutil.copytree(SRC,SNAP)
f=glob.glob(SNAP+'/*.safetensors')[0]; nB=cB=0
with safe_open(f,framework='pt') as h:
    for k in h.keys():
        if 'language' in k and 'lora_B' in k: t=h.get_tensor(k); nB+=t.float().abs().sum().item(); cB+=t.numel()
v=nB/max(1,cB)
print(ts(),f'snapshot B mean|w|={v:.3e} -> {"OK" if v>1e-7 else "B=0!!"}', flush=True)
assert v>1e-7, 'B=0, khong PUT'
STAGE='@ML_DB.MODELS.FUZZ_DATASET_STAGE/gemma4_2GPU_best_ep3_eval0074_20260606'
top=[p for p in glob.glob(SNAP+'/*') if os.path.isfile(p)]
print(ts(),f'PUT {len(top)} files -> {STAGE}/adapter/', flush=True)
for p in top: session.file.put(p, STAGE+'/adapter/', auto_compress=False, overwrite=True)
print(ts(),'verify on stage:', flush=True)
for r in session.sql(f'LIST {STAGE}').collect(): print('   ',r[0], r[1], flush=True)
print(ts(),f'DONE -> {STAGE}', flush=True)

import subprocess, time, datetime
def ts(): return '['+datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%H:%M:%S')+']'
def sh(c): return subprocess.run(c,shell=True,capture_output=True,text=True).stdout
for pat in ['ddp_train','torch.distributed.run','torchrun','torch.distributed.elastic']: sh(f'pkill -9 -f {pat}')
time.sleep(5)
print(ts(),'procs:', sh("ps -eo pid,cmd | grep -E 'ddp_train|distributed' | grep -v grep") or '(none)', flush=True)
print(ts(),'GPU:', sh('nvidia-smi --query-gpu=index,memory.used,utilization.gpu --format=csv,noheader').strip().replace(chr(10),' || '), flush=True)

Python[ABTEST-2GPU] base vs fine-tuned(ep3, B!=0), same prompts[18]

  
# [ABTEST-2GPU] Nap base+adapter ep3 (B!=0) tren 1 GPU -> so base (disable_adapter) vs fine-tuned.
import os
os.environ['CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES']='0'
os.environ['HF_HUB_OFFLINE']='1'; os.environ['TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE']='1'; os.environ['TOKENIZERS_PARALLELISM']='false'
os.environ.setdefault('PYTORCH_ALLOC_CONF','expandable_segments:True')
import time, json, datetime, torch
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")}]'
import unsloth
try:
    import unsloth_zoo.temporary_patches.gemma4 as g4
    if hasattr(g4,'_Gemma4KVSharedSafeProxy'):
        def _pt(self,n): return getattr(object.__getattribute__(self,'_real'),n)
        g4._Gemma4KVSharedSafeProxy.__getattr__=_pt
except Exception as e: print('proxy',e,flush=True)
from unsloth import FastLanguageModel
ADP='/tmp/best_snapshot' if os.path.exists('/tmp/best_snapshot/adapter_model.safetensors') else '/tmp/gemma4_ddp_best'
t0=time.time(); print(ts(),'loading base+adapter from',ADP,'(~5min)...', flush=True)
model,tok=FastLanguageModel.from_pretrained(model_name=ADP,max_seq_length=2048,load_in_4bit=False,load_in_16bit=True,local_files_only=True)
tok=getattr(tok,'tokenizer',tok)
if tok.pad_token is None: tok.pad_token=tok.eos_token
FastLanguageModel.for_inference(model)
wB=[p for n,p in model.named_parameters() if 'language' in n and 'lora_B' in n][0]
print(ts(),f'READY {time.time()-t0:.0f}s | adapter |B|sum={wB.abs().sum().item():.3e} (>0 = co fine-tune)', flush=True)
@torch.no_grad()
def gen(msgs,n=200):
    enc=tok(tok.apply_chat_template(msgs,tokenize=False,add_generation_prompt=True),return_tensors='pt').to('cuda')
    out=model.generate(**enc,max_new_tokens=n,do_sample=False,use_cache=True,pad_token_id=tok.pad_token_id)
    return tok.decode(out[0][enc['input_ids'].shape[1]:],skip_special_tokens=True)
@torch.no_grad()
def gen_base(msgs,n=200):
    with model.disable_adapter(): return gen(msgs,n)
rows=[json.loads(l) for l in open('/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/eval.jsonl')]
msgr=[ (json.loads(r['messages']) if isinstance(r.get('messages'),str) else r.get('messages')) for r in rows if r.get('messages')]
msgr=[m for m in msgr if m and any(x.get('role')=='assistant' for x in m)]
for i in range(min(2,len(msgr))):
    m=msgr[i]; pm=[x for x in m if x['role']!='assistant']; ref=[x for x in m if x['role']=='assistant'][-1]['content']
    print('\n'+'='*68, flush=True); print(ts(),f'SAMPLE {i} USER:', str(pm[-1]['content'])[:240], flush=True)
    print('\n--- [BASE goc] ---\n'+gen_base(pm)[:600], flush=True)
    print('\n--- [FINE-TUNED ep3] ---\n'+gen(pm)[:600], flush=True)
    print('\n--- [REFERENCE] ---\n'+str(ref)[:300], flush=True)
print('\n'+ts(),'DONE AB.', flush=True)

Repo: pytorch/pytorch
Title: DDP hangs on forward pass of transformer



--- [BASE goc] ---
This bug report describes a deadlock or hang condition within PyTorch's Distributed Data Parallel (DDP) implementation when specific, non-standard execution patterns are used (i.e., selectively running the forward pass across processes).

Here is the analysis for defensive fuzzing:

---

## 🛡️ Defensive Fuzzing Analysis

### 🎯 Suspected APIs
The core issue revolves around distributed synchronization and model parallelism/execution control.

1.  **`torch.nn.parallel.DistributedDataParallel` (DDP):** The primary suspect, as the hang occurs during the forward pass within the DDP wrapper.
2.  **`t

Repo: pytorch/pytorch
Title: Training runs 50% slower when using 2 GP



--- [BASE goc] ---
This bug report describes a performance degradation and a crash during distributed training in PyTorch. The core issue appears to be related to the interaction between distributed processes, checkpointing, and resource management under multi-GPU load.

Here is the analysis for defensive fuzzing:

---

## 🔬 Fuzzing Analysis Report

### 🎯 Suspected APIs

The bug is explicitly tied to distributed training mechanisms.

1.  **`torch.distributed` / `torchrun` / `torch.distributed.launch`**: The entry points for setting up and running distributed jobs.
2.  **`torch.distributed.elastic`**: Mentioned i

Python[ADV-DECODE] fine-tuned with repetition_penalty + no_repeat_ngram + sampling[19]

  
# [ADV-DECODE] Dung model+tok da nap (cell A/B). Thu giai ma cao cap de cuu output fine-tuned.
import json, datetime, torch
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")}]'
assert 'model' in globals() and 'tok' in globals(), 'chay [ABTEST-2GPU] truoc de nap model'
@torch.no_grad()
def gen_adv(msgs,n=220,greedy=False):
    enc=tok(tok.apply_chat_template(msgs,tokenize=False,add_generation_prompt=True),return_tensors='pt').to('cuda')
    kw=dict(max_new_tokens=n,use_cache=True,pad_token_id=tok.pad_token_id,repetition_penalty=1.3,no_repeat_ngram_size=3)
    if greedy: kw['do_sample']=False
    else: kw.update(do_sample=True,temperature=0.7,top_p=0.9)
    out=model.generate(**enc,**kw)
    return tok.decode(out[0][enc['input_ids'].shape[1]:],skip_special_tokens=True)
rows=[json.loads(l) for l in open('/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/eval.jsonl')]
msgr=[(json.loads(r['messages']) if isinstance(r.get('messages'),str) else r.get('messages')) for r in rows if r.get('messages')]
msgr=[m for m in msgr if m and any(x.get('role')=='assistant' for x in m)]
m=msgr[0]; pm=[x for x in m if x['role']!='assistant']
print(ts(),'USER:', str(pm[-1]['content'])[:220], flush=True)
print('\n--- FINE-TUNED + repetition_penalty=1.3 + greedy ---\n'+gen_adv(pm,greedy=True)[:650], flush=True)
print('\n--- FINE-TUNED + rep_pen + sampling(0.7) ---\n'+gen_adv(pm,greedy=False)[:650], flush=True)
print('\n'+ts(),'DONE adv-decode.', flush=True)

  
[17:48:48] USER: Analyze this PyTorch/TensorFlow/Keras bug report for defensive fuzzing. Return suspected APIs, bug class, minimal repro strategy, oracle design, and next seed mutations.

Repo: pytorch/pytorch
Title: DDP hangs on forward



--- FINE-TUNED + repetition_penalty=1.3 + greedy ---

# [DATA-INSPECT-FULL] Hieu data that su: full completion, do dai, co phai keyword-list khong.
import json, statistics, datetime
def ts(): return '['+datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%H:%M:%S')+']'
rows=[json.loads(l) for l in open('/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/train.jsonl')]
msg=[]; txt=[]
for r in rows:
    mm=r.get('messages')
    if mm:
        mm=json.loads(mm) if isinstance(mm,str) else mm
        if any(x.get('role')=='assistant' for x in mm): msg.append(mm)
    elif r.get('text'): txt.append(r['text'])
print(ts(),f'messages rows={len(msg)} | text-only rows={len(txt)}', flush=True)
# do dai completion (tokens ~ words)
cl=[len(str([x for x in m if x['role']=='assistant'][-1]['content'])) for m in msg]
print(ts(),f'completion chars: min={min(cl)} p50={int(statistics.median(cl))} mean={int(statistics.mean(cl))} max={max(cl)}', flush=True)
# in 2 completion FULL
for i in [0,1]:
    m=msg[i]; usr=[x for x in m if x['role']=='user'][-1]['content']; asst=[x for x in m if x['role']=='assistant'][-1]['content']
    print('\n'+'='*70, flush=True)
    print(ts(),f'--- SAMPLE {i} USER (300c) ---', flush=True); print(str(usr)[:300], flush=True)
    print(ts(),f'--- SAMPLE {i} ASSISTANT (FULL) ---', flush=True); print(str(asst), flush=True)
# 1 text-only row
if txt:
    print('\n'+'='*70, flush=True); print(ts(),'--- TEXT-ONLY sample (400c) ---', flush=True); print(str(txt[0])[:400], flush=True)

Repo: pytorch/pytorch
Title: torch.export: nn.MultiheadAttention (need_weights=False) exported on CPU fails on CUDA (permute→view after SDPA)
Labels: ['oncall: pt2', 'oncall: export', 'bot-triaged']
URL: https://github.com/pytorch/pytorch/issues/179287

### 🐛 Describe the bug

`torch.export` produces an `ExportedProgram` for `nn.MultiheadAttention` where the exported graph contains `aten.permute`

# [BUILD-STD] Dung BASE model (disable_adapter) sinh phan tich CHI TIET rieng tung issue that.
# Tao dataset chuan (issue -> detailed analysis), da dang. Demo N nho truoc de kiem chat luong.
import json, datetime, time, torch
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")}]'
assert 'model' in globals(), 'can model da nap (chay [ABTEST-2GPU])'
SYS='You are an expert assistant for defensive fuzzing of PyTorch/TensorFlow APIs. Given a bug report, produce a DETAILED, bug-specific analysis with sections: Suspected APIs, Bug class, Minimal repro, Oracle design, Next seed mutations. Be concrete to THIS bug.'
rows=[json.loads(l) for l in open('/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/train.jsonl')]
issues=[r['text'] for r in rows if r.get('text') and not r.get('messages')][:12]  # demo 12 issue that
print(ts(),f'sinh phan tich cho {len(issues)} issue (base model, disable_adapter)...', flush=True)
@torch.no_grad()
def analyze(issue, n=360):
    msgs=[{'role':'system','content':SYS},{'role':'user','content':'Bug report:\n'+issue[:3500]}]
    enc=tok(tok.apply_chat_template(msgs,tokenize=False,add_generation_prompt=True),return_tensors='pt').to('cuda')
    with model.disable_adapter():
        out=model.generate(**enc,max_new_tokens=n,do_sample=False,use_cache=True,pad_token_id=tok.pad_token_id,repetition_penalty=1.1)
    return tok.decode(out[0][enc['input_ids'].shape[1]:],skip_special_tokens=True)
std=[]; t0=time.time()
for i,iss in enumerate(issues):
    a=analyze(iss)
    std.append({'messages':[{'role':'system','content':SYS},{'role':'user','content':'Bug report:\n'+iss[:3500]},{'role':'assistant','content':a}]})
    print(ts(),f'  [{i+1}/{len(issues)}] gen {len(a)} chars (+{time.time()-t0:.0f}s)', flush=True)
with open('/tmp/train_std.jsonl','w') as f:
    for r in std: f.write(json.dumps(r,ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
lens=[len(r['messages'][-1]['content']) for r in std]
import statistics
print(ts(),f'SAVED /tmp/train_std.jsonl n={len(std)} | completion chars min={min(lens)} mean={int(statistics.mean(lens))} max={max(lens)} (da dang neu spread rong)', flush=True)
print('\n=== SAMPLE 0 analysis ===\n'+std[0]['messages'][-1]['content'][:700], flush=True)
print('\n=== SAMPLE 1 analysis ===\n'+std[1]['messages'][-1]['content'][:700], flush=True)

=== SAMPLE 0 analysis ===
## Defensive Fuzzing Analysis Report

**Bug Report Summary:** Exporting `nn.MultiheadAttention` with `need_weights=False` results in an `ExportedProgram` containing a sequence of `aten.permute` immediately followed by `aten.view` without an intervening `aten.contiguous` call. This sequence works correctly on the CPU but fails with a `RuntimeError` on CUDA because the memory layout required by `view` is violated after the permutation on the GPU.

---

### Suspected APIs

1.  **`torch.export.export`**: The primary entry point that traces the model and generates the static graph representation (`ExportedProgram`). The tracing mechanism failed to insert necessary memory synchronization operation



=== SAMPLE 1 analysis ===
## Defensive Fuzzing Analysis for PyTorch Dynamo Refleak Issue

This analysis targets the reported failure in `test_parameter_free` within `test/dynamo/test_misc.py` when running on Python 3.12 and involving dynamic shapes, specifically related to a "refleak" issue in Dynamo.

---

### Suspected APIs

The failure points directly to the interaction between **PyTorch Dynamo** (the compiler/tracing mechanism) and **Python 3.12's runtime behavior**, particularly concerning how tracing handles dynamic shape inference or parameter-free execution paths.

1.  **`torch._dynamo` internals:** The core tracing and compilation logic within Dynamo is the primary suspect.
2.  **Shape Inference Mechanisms:*






  
Python[BUILD-STD-BATCH] batched distillation -> train_std(150)+eval_std(20)[22]

  
# [BUILD-STD-BATCH] Sinh batched (base model, left-pad) phan tich chi tiet/issue. 150 train + 20 eval.
import json, datetime, time, torch, statistics
def ts(): return f'[{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")} ]'
assert 'model' in globals(), 'can model da nap'
SYS='You are an expert assistant for defensive fuzzing of PyTorch/TensorFlow APIs. Given a bug report, produce a DETAILED, bug-specific analysis with sections: Suspected APIs, Bug class, Minimal repro, Oracle design, Next seed mutations. Be concrete to THIS bug.'
rows=[json.loads(l) for l in open('/tmp/gemma4_full_support/dataset/train.jsonl')]
issues=[r['text'] for r in rows if r.get('text') and not r.get('messages')]
issues=issues[:170]
print(ts(),f'tong issue dung: {len(issues)} (150 train + 20 eval)', flush=True)
old_side=tok.padding_side; tok.padding_side='left'
@torch.no_grad()
def gen_batch(batch_issues, n=360):
    prompts=[tok.apply_chat_template([{'role':'system','content':SYS},{'role':'user','content':'Bug report:\n'+iss[:3000]}],tokenize=False,add_generation_prompt=True) for iss in batch_issues]
    enc=tok(prompts,return_tensors='pt',padding=True,truncation=True,max_length=1100).to('cuda')
    with model.disable_adapter():
        out=model.generate(**enc,max_new_tokens=n,do_sample=False,use_cache=True,pad_token_id=tok.pad_token_id,repetition_penalty=1.1)
    gen=out[:,enc['input_ids'].shape[1]:]
    return [tok.decode(g,skip_special_tokens=True) for g in gen]
std=[]; t0=time.time(); BS=8
for s in range(0,len(issues),BS):
    bi=issues[s:s+BS]; outs=gen_batch(bi)
    for iss,a in zip(bi,outs):
        std.append({'messages':[{'role':'system','content':SYS},{'role':'user','content':'Bug report:\n'+iss[:3000]},{'role':'assistant','content':a.strip()}]})
    print(ts(),f'  {len(std)}/{len(issues)} (+{time.time()-t0:.0f}s)', flush=True)
tok.padding_side=old_side
train=std[:150]; ev=std[150:170]
with open('/tmp/train_std.jsonl','w') as f:
    for r in train: f.write(json.dumps(r,ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
with open('/tmp/eval_std.jsonl','w') as f:
    for r in ev: f.write(json.dumps(r,ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
lens=[len(r['messages'][-1]['content']) for r in std]
print(ts(),f'SAVED train_std={len(train)} eval_std={len(ev)} | completion chars min={min(lens)} mean={int(statistics.mean(lens))} max={max(lens)}', flush=True)
print('\n=== sample analysis (300c) ===\n'+train[5]['messages'][-1]['content'][:300], flush=True)

## Defensive Fuzzing Analysis

### Suspected APIs
The crash occurs deep within the C++ backend related to memory allocation configuration (`c10::AllocatorConfig.h`) and specifically involves CUDA caching allocat






  
Python[STD-SAVE+FREE] persist std datasets to stage + free kernel model[23]

  
# [STD-SAVE+FREE] Luu train_std/eval_std len stage + giai phong model trong kernel (cho training 2-GPU).
import gc, datetime, torch
from snowflake.snowpark.context import get_active_session
session=get_active_session()
def ts(): return '['+datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%H:%M:%S')+']'
STAGE='@ML_DB.MODELS.FUZZ_DATASET_STAGE/std_dataset_distilled_20260606'
for f in ['/tmp/train_std.jsonl','/tmp/eval_std.jsonl']:
    session.file.put('file://'+f, STAGE+'/', auto_compress=False, overwrite=True)
print(ts(),'std data -> stage:', flush=True)
for r in session.sql(f'LIST {STAGE}').collect(): print('   ',r[0], r[1], flush=True)
# free kernel model
for v in ['model','tok','gen','gen_base','gen_adv','analyze']:
    if v in globals():
        try: del globals()[v]
        except Exception: pass
gc.collect(); torch.cuda.empty_cache()
free,total=torch.cuda.mem_get_info(); print(ts(),f'kernel model freed. GPU free={free/1e9:.1f}/{total/1e9:.1f}GB', flush=True)

Python[STD-TRAIN] point DDP script to std data, 3 epochs lr1e-5, launch[24]

  
# [STD-TRAIN] Tro ddp_train.py vao data CHUAN (std), EPOCHS=3, LR=1e-5. Cac fix (CVD/dev0/grad_ckpt=True) da co.
import os, sys, subprocess, time, datetime
def ts(): return '['+datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%H:%M:%S')+']'
def sh(c): return subprocess.run(c,shell=True,capture_output=True,text=True).stdout
src=open('/tmp/ddp_train.py').read()
src=src.replace('lm(D+"train.jsonl")','lm("/tmp/train_std.jsonl")').replace('lm(D+"eval.jsonl")','lm("/tmp/eval_std.jsonl")')
open('/tmp/ddp_train.py','w').write(src)
print(ts(),'data->std:', 'train_std.jsonl' in src, '| grad_ckpt True:', 'use_gradient_checkpointing=True' in src, '| CVD:', 'CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES' in src, flush=True)
for pat in ['ddp_train','torch.distributed.run','torchrun']: sh(f'pkill -9 -f {pat}')
time.sleep(4)
env=dict(os.environ); env.pop('CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES',None)
env.update({'EPOCHS':'3','BS':'8','LR':'1e-5','OUT':'/tmp/gemma4_std_best','HF_HUB_OFFLINE':'1','TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE':'1','PYTHONUNBUFFERED':'1','PYTORCH_ALLOC_CONF':'expandable_segments:True'})
cmd=[sys.executable,'-m','torch.distributed.run','--standalone','--nproc_per_node=2','/tmp/ddp_train.py']
open('/tmp/ddp.log','w').close()
p=subprocess.Popen(cmd,env=env,stdout=open('/tmp/ddp.log','a'),stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,text=True,start_new_session=True)
print(ts(),f'LAUNCHED pid={p.pid} (3 epoch tren 150 mau std). Chay [WATCH-MIN] de theo doi.', flush=True)

Python[STD-SAVE-BEST] persist std-trained adapter to stage (verify B!=0)

  
import os, glob, shutil, datetime
from safetensors import safe_open
from snowflake.snowpark.context import get_active_session
session=get_active_session()
def ts(): return '['+datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%H:%M:%S')+']'
SRC='/tmp/gemma4_std_best'; SNAP='/tmp/std_best_snap'
if os.path.isdir(SNAP): shutil.rmtree(SNAP)
shutil.copytree(SRC,SNAP)
f=glob.glob(SNAP+'/*.safetensors')[0]; nB=cB=0
with safe_open(f,framework='pt') as h:
    for k in h.keys():
        if 'language' in k and 'lora_B' in k: t=h.get_tensor(k); nB+=t.float().abs().sum().item(); cB+=t.numel()
v=nB/max(1,cB); print(ts(),f'std adapter B mean|w|={v:.3e} -> {"OK" if v>1e-7 else "B=0"}', flush=True)
assert v>1e-7
STAGE='@ML_DB.MODELS.FUZZ_DATASET_STAGE/gemma4_STD_distill_3ep_eval042_20260606'
for p in [x for x in glob.glob(SNAP+'/*') if os.path.isfile(x)]:
    session.file.put('file://'+p, STAGE+'/adapter/', auto_compress=False, overwrite=True)
print(ts(),'saved:', flush=True)
for r in session.sql(f'LIST {STAGE}').collect(): print('   ',r[0], r[1], flush=True)
print(ts(),f'DONE -> {STAGE}', flush=True)
